search_text: Learning cosmology and clustering with cosmic graphs 使用宇宙图学习宇宙学和聚类 We train deep learning models on thousands of galaxy catalogues from the state-of-the-art hydrodynamic simulations of the CAMELS project to perform regression and inference. We employ Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), architectures designed to work with irregular and sparse data, like the distribution of galaxies in the Universe. We first show that GNNs can learn to compute the power spectrum of galaxy catalogues with a few percent accuracy. We then train GNNs to perform likelihood-free inference at the galaxy-field level. Our models are able to infer the value of $Ω_{\rm m}$ with a $\sim12\%-13\%$ accuracy just from the positions of $\sim1000$ galaxies in a volume of $(25~h^{-1}{\rm Mpc})^3$ at $z=0$ while accounting for astrophysical uncertainties as modelled in CAMELS. Incorporating information from galaxy properties, such as stellar mass, stellar metallicity, and stellar radius, increases the accuracy to $4\%-8\%$. Our models are built to be translational and rotational invariant, and they can extract information from any scale larger than the minimum distance between two galaxies. However, our models are not completely robust: testing on simulations run with a different subgrid physics than the ones used for training does not yield as accurate results. 我们在来自 CAMELS 项目最先进的流体动力学模拟的数千个星系目录上训练深度学习模型，以执行回归和推理。我们采用图神经网络（GNN），这种架构旨在处理不规则和稀疏的数据，例如宇宙中星系的分布。我们首先证明 GNN 可以学习以百分之几的精度计算星系目录的功率谱。然后，我们训练 GNN 在星系场级别执行无似然推理。我们的模型能够仅根据 $(25~h^{-1}{\rm Mpc})^3$ 体积中 $z=0$ 处 $\sim1000$ 星系的位置以 $\sim12\%-13\%$ 精度推断 $Ω_{\rm m}$ 的值，同时考虑到 CAMELS 中建模的天体物理不确定性。结合星系属性的信息，例如恒星质量、恒星金属丰度和恒星半径，将精度提高到 $4\%-8\%$。我们的模型被构建为具有平移和旋转不变性，并且它们可以从大于两个星系之间的最小距离的任何尺度中提取信息。然而，我们的模型并不完全稳健：使用与训练所用的子网格物理不同的子网格物理运行的模拟测试不会产生准确的结果。 该论文利用图神经网络（GNN）分析宇宙大尺度结构数据，通过模拟星系目录进行回归和参数推断，以提高宇宙学参数的预测精度。 Pablo Villanueva-Domingo,Francisco Villaescusa-Navarro astro-ph.CO,astro-ph.GA,astro-ph.IM,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: A Unified and Modular Model Predictive Control Framework for Soft Continuum Manipulators under Internal and External Constraints
title_zh: 内外约束下软连续体统一模块化模型预测控制框架
comment: Accepted for IROS2022, Kyoto. Several changes according to reviews: updated MODEL section II, included comparison with Quasi-Static control, revised plots and figures
comments: Accepted for IROS2022, Kyoto. Several changes according to reviews: updated MODEL section II, included comparison with Quasi-Static control, revised plots and figures
abstract: Fluidically actuated soft robots have promising capabilities such as inherent compliance and user safety. The control of soft robots needs to properly handle nonlinear actuation dynamics, motion constraints, workspace limitations, and variable shape stiffness, so having a unique algorithm for all these issues would be extremely beneficial. In this work, we adapt Model Predictive Control (MPC), popular for rigid robots, to a soft robotic arm called SoPrA. We address the challenges that current control methods are facing, by proposing a framework that handles these in a modular manner. While previous work focused on Joint-Space formulations, we show through simulation and experimental results that Task-Space MPC can be successfully implemented for dynamic soft robotic control. We provide a way to couple the Piece-wise Constant Curvature and Augmented Rigid Body Model assumptions with internal and external constraints and actuation dynamics, delivering an algorithm that unites these aspects and optimizes over them. We believe that a MPC implementation based on our approach could be the way to address most of model-based soft robotics control issues within a unified and modular framework, while allowing to include improvements that usually belong to other control domains such as machine learning techniques.
summary: Fluidically actuated soft robots have promising capabilities such as inherent compliance and user safety. The control of soft robots needs to properly handle nonlinear actuation dynamics, motion constraints, workspace limitations, and variable shape stiffness, so having a unique algorithm for all these issues would be extremely beneficial. In this work, we adapt Model Predictive Control (MPC), popular for rigid robots, to a soft robotic arm called SoPrA. We address the challenges that current control methods are facing, by proposing a framework that handles these in a modular manner. While previous work focused on Joint-Space formulations, we show through simulation and experimental results that Task-Space MPC can be successfully implemented for dynamic soft robotic control. We provide a way to couple the Piece-wise Constant Curvature and Augmented Rigid Body Model assumptions with internal and external constraints and actuation dynamics, delivering an algorithm that unites these aspects and optimizes over them. We believe that a MPC implementation based on our approach could be the way to address most of model-based soft robotics control issues within a unified and modular framework, while allowing to include improvements that usually belong to other control domains such as machine learning techniques.
abstract_zh: 流体驱动的软机器人具有良好的性能，例如固有的顺应性和用户安全性。软机器人的控制需要正确处理非线性驱动动力学、运动约束、工作空间限制和可变形状刚度，因此针对所有这些问题拥有独特的算法将非常有益。在这项工作中，我们将刚性机器人中流行的模型预测控制 (MPC) 应用于名为 SoPrA 的软机械臂。我们通过提出一个以模块化方式处理这些问题的框架来解决当前控制方法所面临的挑战。虽然之前的工作主要集中在关节空间公式上，但我们通过仿真和实验结果表明，任务空间 MPC 可以成功实现动态软机器人控制。我们提供了一种将分段恒定曲率和增强刚体模型假设与内部和外部约束以及驱动动力学相结合的方法，提供了一种将这些方面结合起来并对其进行优化的算法。我们相信，基于我们的方法的 MPC 实现可能是在统一和模块化框架内解决大多数基于模型的软机器人控制问题的方法，同时允许包含通常属于其他控制领域（例如机器学习技术）的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一且模块化的模型预测控制（MPC）框架，用于解决软体连续机械臂在内部和外部约束下的控制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有软体机器人控制方法难以有效处理非线性驱动动力学、运动约束、工作空间限制及形状刚度变化等复杂问题，亟需一种统一的解决方案。
AI.method: 将MPC应用于软体机械臂SoPrA，采用任务空间MPC方法，结合分段常数曲率模型与增强刚体模型假设，模块化整合内部/外部约束与驱动动力学。
AI.result: 通过仿真与实验验证，证明任务空间MPC可有效实现动态软体机器人控制，框架能够统一处理多方面约束与优化问题。
AI.conclusion: 该MPC框架为软体机器人控制提供了统一模块化方案，未来可进一步融合机器学习等跨领域技术提升性能。

title: Tag-assisted Multimodal Sentiment Analysis under Uncertain Missing Modalities
title_zh: 不确定缺失模态下标签辅助的多模态情感分析
abstract: Multimodal sentiment analysis has been studied under the assumption that all modalities are available. However, such a strong assumption does not always hold in practice, and most of multimodal fusion models may fail when partial modalities are missing. Several works have addressed the missing modality problem; but most of them only considered the single modality missing case, and ignored the practically more general cases of multiple modalities missing. To this end, in this paper, we propose a Tag-Assisted Transformer Encoder (TATE) network to handle the problem of missing uncertain modalities. Specifically, we design a tag encoding module to cover both the single modality and multiple modalities missing cases, so as to guide the network's attention to those missing modalities. Besides, we adopt a new space projection pattern to align common vectors. Then, a Transformer encoder-decoder network is utilized to learn the missing modality features. At last, the outputs of the Transformer encoder are used for the final sentiment classification. Extensive experiments are conducted on CMU-MOSI and IEMOCAP datasets, showing that our method can achieve significant improvements compared with several baselines.
summary: Multimodal sentiment analysis has been studied under the assumption that all modalities are available. However, such a strong assumption does not always hold in practice, and most of multimodal fusion models may fail when partial modalities are missing. Several works have addressed the missing modality problem; but most of them only considered the single modality missing case, and ignored the practically more general cases of multiple modalities missing. To this end, in this paper, we propose a Tag-Assisted Transformer Encoder (TATE) network to handle the problem of missing uncertain modalities. Specifically, we design a tag encoding module to cover both the single modality and multiple modalities missing cases, so as to guide the network's attention to those missing modalities. Besides, we adopt a new space projection pattern to align common vectors. Then, a Transformer encoder-decoder network is utilized to learn the missing modality features. At last, the outputs of the Transformer encoder are used for the final sentiment classification. Extensive experiments are conducted on CMU-MOSI and IEMOCAP datasets, showing that our method can achieve significant improvements compared with several baselines.
abstract_zh: 多模态情感分析是在所有模态可用的假设下进行研究的。然而，这样一个强有力的假设在实践中并不总是成立，并且当部分模态缺失时，大多数多模态融合模型可能会失败。一些著作已经解决了模态缺失的问题；但大多数人只考虑了单一模态缺失的情况，而忽略了实际上更一般的多种模态缺失的情况。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种标签辅助变换编码器（TATE）网络来处理丢失不确定模态的问题。具体来说，我们设计了一个标签编码模块来覆盖单模态和多模态缺失的情况，从而引导网络对那些缺失模态的关注。此外，我们采用新的空间投影模式来对齐公共向量。然后，利用 Transformer 编码器-解码器网络来学习缺失的模态特征。最后，Transformer 编码器的输出用于最终的情感分类。在 CMU-MOSI 和 IEMOCAP 数据集上进行了大量的实验，表明我们的方法与几个基线相比可以实现显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种标签辅助的Transformer编码器网络（TATE），用于处理多模态情感分析中不确定缺失模态的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究假设所有模态均可用，但实际中常出现单模态或多模态缺失的情况，现有方法难以有效处理多模态缺失的复杂场景。
AI.method: 设计标签编码模块处理单/多模态缺失，通过空间投影对齐特征向量，采用Transformer编码器-解码器网络学习缺失模态特征，最终输出情感分类结果。
AI.result: 在CMU-MOSI和IEMOCAP数据集上实验表明，该方法相比多个基线模型取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: TATE网络通过标签引导机制有效解决了不确定缺失模态问题，为多模态情感分析提供了新思路。

search_text: Tag-assisted Multimodal Sentiment Analysis under Uncertain Missing Modalities 不确定缺失模态下标签辅助的多模态情感分析 Multimodal sentiment analysis has been studied under the assumption that all modalities are available. However, such a strong assumption does not always hold in practice, and most of multimodal fusion models may fail when partial modalities are missing. Several works have addressed the missing modality problem; but most of them only considered the single modality missing case, and ignored the practically more general cases of multiple modalities missing. To this end, in this paper, we propose a Tag-Assisted Transformer Encoder (TATE) network to handle the problem of missing uncertain modalities. Specifically, we design a tag encoding module to cover both the single modality and multiple modalities missing cases, so as to guide the network's attention to those missing modalities. Besides, we adopt a new space projection pattern to align common vectors. Then, a Transformer encoder-decoder network is utilized to learn the missing modality features. At last, the outputs of the Transformer encoder are used for the final sentiment classification. Extensive experiments are conducted on CMU-MOSI and IEMOCAP datasets, showing that our method can achieve significant improvements compared with several baselines. 多模态情感分析是在所有模态可用的假设下进行研究的。然而，这样一个强有力的假设在实践中并不总是成立，并且当部分模态缺失时，大多数多模态融合模型可能会失败。一些著作已经解决了模态缺失的问题；但大多数人只考虑了单一模态缺失的情况，而忽略了实际上更一般的多种模态缺失的情况。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种标签辅助变换编码器（TATE）网络来处理丢失不确定模态的问题。具体来说，我们设计了一个标签编码模块来覆盖单模态和多模态缺失的情况，从而引导网络对那些缺失模态的关注。此外，我们采用新的空间投影模式来对齐公共向量。然后，利用 Transformer 编码器-解码器网络来学习缺失的模态特征。最后，Transformer 编码器的输出用于最终的情感分类。在 CMU-MOSI 和 IEMOCAP 数据集上进行了大量的实验，表明我们的方法与几个基线相比可以实现显着的改进。 本文提出一种标签辅助的Transformer编码器网络（TATE），用于处理多模态情感分析中不确定缺失模态的问题。 Jiandian Zeng,Tianyi Liu,Jiantao Zhou cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Coupling Deep Imputation with Multitask Learning for Downstream Tasks on Genomics Data
title_zh: 将深度插补与基因组数据下游任务的多任务学习相结合
comment: Accepted as Oral presentation at The International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
comments: Accepted as Oral presentation at The International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
abstract: Genomics data such as RNA gene expression, methylation and micro RNA expression are valuable sources of information for various clinical predictive tasks. For example, predicting survival outcomes, cancer histology type and other patients' related information is possible using not only clinical data but molecular data as well. Moreover, using these data sources together, for example in multitask learning, can boost the performance. However, in practice, there are many missing data points which leads to significantly lower patient numbers when analysing full cases, which in our setting refers to all modalities being present. In this paper we investigate how imputing data with missing values using deep learning coupled with multitask learning can help to reach state-of-the-art performance results using combined genomics modalities, RNA, micro RNA and methylation. We propose a generalised deep imputation method to impute values where a patient has all modalities present except one. Interestingly enough, deep imputation alone outperforms multitask learning alone for the classification and regression tasks across most combinations of modalities. In contrast, when using all modalities for survival prediction we observe that multitask learning alone outperforms deep imputation alone with statistical significance (adjusted p-value 0.03). Thus, both approaches are complementary when optimising performance for downstream predictive tasks.
summary: Genomics data such as RNA gene expression, methylation and micro RNA expression are valuable sources of information for various clinical predictive tasks. For example, predicting survival outcomes, cancer histology type and other patients' related information is possible using not only clinical data but molecular data as well. Moreover, using these data sources together, for example in multitask learning, can boost the performance. However, in practice, there are many missing data points which leads to significantly lower patient numbers when analysing full cases, which in our setting refers to all modalities being present. In this paper we investigate how imputing data with missing values using deep learning coupled with multitask learning can help to reach state-of-the-art performance results using combined genomics modalities, RNA, micro RNA and methylation. We propose a generalised deep imputation method to impute values where a patient has all modalities present except one. Interestingly enough, deep imputation alone outperforms multitask learning alone for the classification and regression tasks across most combinations of modalities. In contrast, when using all modalities for survival prediction we observe that multitask learning alone outperforms deep imputation alone with statistical significance (adjusted p-value 0.03). Thus, both approaches are complementary when optimising performance for downstream predictive tasks.
abstract_zh: RNA 基因表达、甲基化和微小 RNA 表达等基因组数据是各种临床预测任务的宝贵信息来源。例如，不仅可以使用临床数据，还可以使用分子数据来预测生存结果、癌症组织学类型和其他患者的相关信息。此外，一起使用这些数据源（例如在多任务学习中）可以提高性能。然而，在实践中，存在许多缺失的数据点，导致在分析完整病例时患者数量显着减少，在我们的设置中指的是存在的所有模式。在本文中，我们研究了如何使用深度学习与多任务学习结合使用缺失值来填补数据，从而使用组合的基因组学模式、RNA、微小 RNA 和甲基化来帮助达到最先进的性能结果。我们提出了一种广义的深度插补方法来插补患者具有除一种以外的所有模式的值。有趣的是，对于大多数模态组合的分类和回归任务，单独的深度插补优于单独的多任务学习。相比之下，当使用所有模式进行生存预测时，我们观察到单独的多任务学习优于单独的深度插补，具有统计显着性（调整后的 p 值 0.03）。因此，在优化下游预测任务的性能时，这两种方法是互补的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合深度填补与多任务学习的方法，以处理基因组学数据中的缺失值并提升下游预测任务性能。
AI.motivation: 基因组学数据（如RNA、甲基化等）在临床预测任务中具有重要价值，但存在大量缺失值导致样本数量减少，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 提出一种通用深度填补方法，针对缺失单模态数据进行填补，并结合多任务学习框架联合优化多个下游预测任务。
AI.result: 深度填补在多数任务组合中优于多任务学习，而多任务学习在生存预测中表现更优（p=0.03），两者方法具有互补性。
AI.conclusion: 深度填补与多任务学习应结合使用，以优化不同下游预测任务的性能表现。

title: Hyperbolic Hierarchical Knowledge Graph Embeddings for Link Prediction in Low Dimensions
title_zh: 用于低维链接预测的双曲分层知识图嵌入
abstract: Knowledge graph embeddings (KGE) have been validated as powerful methods for inferring missing links in knowledge graphs (KGs) that they typically map entities into Euclidean space and treat relations as transformations of entities. Recently, some Euclidean KGE methods have been enhanced to model semantic hierarchies commonly found in KGs, improving the performance of link prediction. To embed hierarchical data, hyperbolic space has emerged as a promising alternative to traditional Euclidean space, offering high fidelity and lower memory consumption. Unlike Euclidean, hyperbolic space provides countless curvatures to choose from. However, it is difficult for existing hyperbolic KGE methods to obtain the optimal curvature settings manually, thereby limiting their ability to effectively model semantic hierarchies. To address this limitation, we propose a novel KGE model called $\textbf{Hyp}$erbolic $\textbf{H}$ierarchical $\textbf{KGE}$ (HypHKGE). This model introduces attention-based learnable curvatures for hyperbolic space, which helps preserve rich semantic hierarchies. Furthermore, to utilize the preserved hierarchies for inferring missing links, we define hyperbolic hierarchical transformations based on the theory of hyperbolic geometry, including both inter-level and intra-level modeling. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed HypHKGE model on the three benchmark datasets (WN18RR, FB15K-237, and YAGO3-10). The source code will be publicly released at https://github.com/wjzheng96/HypHKGE.
summary: Knowledge graph embeddings (KGE) have been validated as powerful methods for inferring missing links in knowledge graphs (KGs) that they typically map entities into Euclidean space and treat relations as transformations of entities. Recently, some Euclidean KGE methods have been enhanced to model semantic hierarchies commonly found in KGs, improving the performance of link prediction. To embed hierarchical data, hyperbolic space has emerged as a promising alternative to traditional Euclidean space, offering high fidelity and lower memory consumption. Unlike Euclidean, hyperbolic space provides countless curvatures to choose from. However, it is difficult for existing hyperbolic KGE methods to obtain the optimal curvature settings manually, thereby limiting their ability to effectively model semantic hierarchies. To address this limitation, we propose a novel KGE model called $\textbf{Hyp}$erbolic $\textbf{H}$ierarchical $\textbf{KGE}$ (HypHKGE). This model introduces attention-based learnable curvatures for hyperbolic space, which helps preserve rich semantic hierarchies. Furthermore, to utilize the preserved hierarchies for inferring missing links, we define hyperbolic hierarchical transformations based on the theory of hyperbolic geometry, including both inter-level and intra-level modeling. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed HypHKGE model on the three benchmark datasets (WN18RR, FB15K-237, and YAGO3-10). The source code will be publicly released at https://github.com/wjzheng96/HypHKGE.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入（KGE）已被验证为推断知识图（KG）中缺失链接的强大方法，它们通常将实体映射到欧几里德空间并将关系视为实体的转换。最近，一些欧几里德知识图谱生成方法得到了增强，可以对知识图谱中常见的语义层次结构进行建模，从而提高链接预测的性能。为了嵌入分层数据，双曲空间已成为传统欧几里得空间的有前途的替代品，提供高保真度和更低的内存消耗。与欧几里得不同，双曲空间提供了无数的曲率可供选择。然而，现有的双曲 KGE 方法很难手动获得最佳曲率设置，从而限制了它们有效建模语义层次结构的能力。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新颖的 KGE 模型，称为 $\textbf{Hyp}$erbolic $\textbf{H}$ierarchical $\textbf{KGE}$ (HypHKGE)。该模型为双曲空间引入了基于注意力的可学习曲率，这有助于保留丰富的语义层次结构。此外，为了利用保留的层次结构来推断缺失的链接，我们基于双曲几何理论定义了双曲层次变换，包括层间和层内建模。实验证明了所提出的 HypHKGE 模型在三个基准数据集（WN18RR、FB15K-237 和 YAGO3-10）上的有效性。源代码将在https://github.com/wjzheng96/HypHKGE公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双曲空间的层次化知识图谱嵌入模型HypHKGE，用于在低维空间中进行链接预测。
AI.motivation: 现有双曲空间知识图谱嵌入方法难以手动选择最优曲率参数，限制了对语义层次结构的有效建模。
AI.method: 引入基于注意力机制的可学习曲率参数，并定义双曲层次变换（包括跨层和层内建模）以保留语义层次结构。
AI.result: 在WN18RR、FB15K-237和YAGO3-10三个基准数据集上验证了HypHKGE的有效性。
AI.conclusion: HypHKGE通过双曲几何与注意力机制结合，实现了对知识图谱层次结构的高效建模，提升了链接预测性能。

The source code will be publicly released at https://github.com/wjzheng96/HypHKGE. 知识图嵌入（KGE）已被验证为推断知识图（KG）中缺失链接的强大方法，它们通常将实体映射到欧几里德空间并将关系视为实体的转换。最近，一些欧几里德知识图谱生成方法得到了增强，可以对知识图谱中常见的语义层次结构进行建模，从而提高链接预测的性能。为了嵌入分层数据，双曲空间已成为传统欧几里得空间的有前途的替代品，提供高保真度和更低的内存消耗。与欧几里得不同，双曲空间提供了无数的曲率可供选择。然而，现有的双曲 KGE 方法很难手动获得最佳曲率设置，从而限制了它们有效建模语义层次结构的能力。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新颖的 KGE 模型，称为 $\textbf{Hyp}$erbolic $\textbf{H}$ierarchical $\textbf{KGE}$ (HypHKGE)。该模型为双曲空间引入了基于注意力的可学习曲率，这有助于保留丰富的语义层次结构。此外，为了利用保留的层次结构来推断缺失的链接，我们基于双曲几何理论定义了双曲层次变换，包括层间和层内建模。实验证明了所提出的 HypHKGE 模型在三个基准数据集（WN18RR、FB15K-237 和 YAGO3-10）上的有效性。源代码将在https://github.com/wjzheng96/HypHKGE公开发布。 本文提出一种基于双曲空间的层次化知识图谱嵌入模型HypHKGE，用于在低维空间中进行链接预测。 Wenjie Zheng,Wenxue Wang,Shu Zhao,Fulan Qian cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Channel Pruned YOLOv5-based Deep Learning Approach for Rapid and Accurate Outdoor Obstacles Detection
title_zh: 基于通道修剪的 YOLOv5 深度学习方法，用于快速准确的室外障碍物检测
abstract: One-stage algorithm have been widely used in target detection systems that need to be trained with massive data. Most of them perform well both in real-time and accuracy. However, due to their convolutional structure, they need more computing power and greater memory consumption. Hence, we applied pruning strategy to target detection networks to reduce the number of parameters and the size of model. To demonstrate the practicality of the pruning method, we select the YOLOv5 model for experiments and provide a data set of outdoor obstacles to show the effect of model. In this specific data set, in the best circumstances, the volume of the network model is reduced by 49.7% compared with the original model, and the reasoning time is reduced by 52.5%. Meanwhile, it also uses data processing methods to compensate for the drop in accuracy caused by pruning.
summary: One-stage algorithm have been widely used in target detection systems that need to be trained with massive data. Most of them perform well both in real-time and accuracy. However, due to their convolutional structure, they need more computing power and greater memory consumption. Hence, we applied pruning strategy to target detection networks to reduce the number of parameters and the size of model. To demonstrate the practicality of the pruning method, we select the YOLOv5 model for experiments and provide a data set of outdoor obstacles to show the effect of model. In this specific data set, in the best circumstances, the volume of the network model is reduced by 49.7% compared with the original model, and the reasoning time is reduced by 52.5%. Meanwhile, it also uses data processing methods to compensate for the drop in accuracy caused by pruning.
abstract_zh: 一阶段算法已广泛应用于需要海量数据训练的目标检测系统中。其中大多数在实时性和准确性方面都表现良好。然而，由于它们的卷积结构，它们需要更多的计算能力和更大的内存消耗。因此，我们将剪枝策略应用于目标检测网络，以减少参数数量和模型大小。为了证明剪枝方法的实用性，我们选择YOLOv5模型进行实验，并提供室外障碍物的数据集来展示模型的效果。在这个特定的数据集中，在最好的情况下，网络模型的体积比原始模型减少了49.7%，推理时间减少了52.5%。同时，它还利用数据处理方法来补偿剪枝带来的精度下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于通道剪枝的YOLOv5深度学习方法，用于快速准确的户外障碍物检测。
AI.motivation: 单阶段目标检测算法虽在实时性和准确性上表现良好，但其卷积结构导致计算量大、内存消耗高，需通过剪枝策略优化模型效率。
AI.method: 采用通道剪枝策略减少YOLOv5模型参数量和体积，并结合数据处理方法补偿剪枝导致的精度下降。
AI.result: 在最佳情况下，模型体积减少49.7%，推理时间减少52.5%，同时通过数据处理保持检测精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过剪枝与数据补偿有效平衡了模型效率与检测精度，验证了剪枝策略在户外障碍物检测中的实用性。

title: How Much is Performance Worth to Users? A Quantitative Approach
title_zh: 性能对用户来说值多少钱？定量方法
abstract: Architects and systems designers artfully balance multiple competing design constraints during the design process but are unable to translate between system metrics and end user experience. This work presents three methodologies to fill in this gap. The first is an incentive-compatible methodology that determines a "ground truth" measurement of users' value of speed in terms of US dollars, and find that users would accept a performance losses of 10%, 20%, and 30% to their personal computer in exchange for \$2.27, \$4.07, and \$4.43 per day, respectively. However, while highly accurate the methodology is a painstaking process and does not scale with large numbers of participants. To allow for scalability, we introduce a second methodology -- a lab-based simulation experiment -- which finds that users would accept a permanent performance loss of 10%, 20%, and 30% to their personal computer in exchange for \$127, \$169, and \$823, respectively. Finally, to allow for even greater scalability, we introduce a third methodology -- a survey -- and observe that the lack of incentive compatibility and the lack of hands-on experience with throttled device performance skews the results significantly, thus demonstrating the need for lab-based or incentive compatible study designs. By quantifying the tradeoff between user satisfaction and performance, we enable architects and systems designers to make more nuanced tradeoffs between design requirements.
summary: Architects and systems designers artfully balance multiple competing design constraints during the design process but are unable to translate between system metrics and end user experience. This work presents three methodologies to fill in this gap. The first is an incentive-compatible methodology that determines a "ground truth" measurement of users' value of speed in terms of US dollars, and find that users would accept a performance losses of 10%, 20%, and 30% to their personal computer in exchange for \$2.27, \$4.07, and \$4.43 per day, respectively. However, while highly accurate the methodology is a painstaking process and does not scale with large numbers of participants. To allow for scalability, we introduce a second methodology -- a lab-based simulation experiment -- which finds that users would accept a permanent performance loss of 10%, 20%, and 30% to their personal computer in exchange for \$127, \$169, and \$823, respectively. Finally, to allow for even greater scalability, we introduce a third methodology -- a survey -- and observe that the lack of incentive compatibility and the lack of hands-on experience with throttled device performance skews the results significantly, thus demonstrating the need for lab-based or incentive compatible study designs. By quantifying the tradeoff between user satisfaction and performance, we enable architects and systems designers to make more nuanced tradeoffs between design requirements.
abstract_zh: 架构师和系统设计师在设计过程中巧妙地平衡多个相互竞争的设计约束，但无法在系统指标和最终用户体验之间进行转换。这项工作提出了三种方法来填补这一空白。第一种是激励兼容的方法，该方法确定了以美元为单位的用户速度价值的“基本事实”测量，并发现用户愿意接受个人计算机 10%、20% 和 30% 的性能损失，以换取每天 2.27 美元、4.07 美元和 4.43 美元的损失。然而，虽然高度准确，但该方法是一个艰苦的过程，并且无法适应大量参与者。为了实现可扩展性，我们引入了第二种方法——基于实验室的模拟实验——该方法发现用户愿意接受个人计算机性能永久损失 10%、20% 和 30%，以分别换取 127 美元、169 美元和 823 美元。最后，为了实现更大的可扩展性，我们引入了第三种方法（一项调查），并观察到缺乏激励兼容性和缺乏节流设备性能的实践经验会严重影响结果，从而证明需要基于实验室或激励兼容的研究设计。通过量化用户满意度和性能之间的权衡，我们使架构师和系统设计师能够在设计要求之间做出更细致的权衡。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过三种方法量化用户对系统性能价值的货币化评估，帮助架构师和系统设计者在性能与用户体验间做出更精准的权衡。
AI.motivation: 系统设计者难以将系统性能指标与用户实际体验进行量化关联，导致设计决策缺乏数据支持。
AI.method: 提出三种方法：1) 激励相容机制测量用户对速度的美元价值；2) 实验室模拟实验评估永久性能损失的补偿意愿；3) 调查法验证其局限性。
AI.result: 用户接受10%/20%/30%性能损失的每日补偿分别为2.27/4.07/4.43美元；永久损失补偿为127/169/823美元；调查法因缺乏激励和体验导致结果偏差显著。
AI.conclusion: 激励相容机制和实验法能有效量化性能与用户体验的权衡，而调查法存在显著局限，需结合实验室或激励设计以提高准确性。

title: Federated Learning: Balancing the Thin Line Between Data Intelligence and Privacy
title_zh: 联邦学习：平衡数据智能和隐私之间的界限
comment: 36th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI-2022)--Workshop on AI in Financial Services: Adaptiveness, Resilience & Governance
comments: 36th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI-2022)--Workshop on AI in Financial Services: Adaptiveness, Resilience & Governance
abstract: Federated learning holds great promise in learning from fragmented sensitive data and has revolutionized how machine learning models are trained. This article provides a systematic overview and detailed taxonomy of federated learning. We investigate the existing security challenges in federated learning and provide a comprehensive overview of established defense techniques for data poisoning, inference attacks, and model poisoning attacks. The work also presents an overview of current training challenges for federated learning, focusing on handling non-i.i.d. data, high dimensionality issues, and heterogeneous architecture, and discusses several solutions for the associated challenges. Finally, we discuss the remaining challenges in managing federated learning training and suggest focused research directions to address the open questions. Potential candidate areas for federated learning, including IoT ecosystem, healthcare applications, are discussed with a particular focus on banking and financial domains.
summary: Federated learning holds great promise in learning from fragmented sensitive data and has revolutionized how machine learning models are trained. This article provides a systematic overview and detailed taxonomy of federated learning. We investigate the existing security challenges in federated learning and provide a comprehensive overview of established defense techniques for data poisoning, inference attacks, and model poisoning attacks. The work also presents an overview of current training challenges for federated learning, focusing on handling non-i.i.d. data, high dimensionality issues, and heterogeneous architecture, and discusses several solutions for the associated challenges. Finally, we discuss the remaining challenges in managing federated learning training and suggest focused research directions to address the open questions. Potential candidate areas for federated learning, including IoT ecosystem, healthcare applications, are discussed with a particular focus on banking and financial domains.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习在从分散的敏感数据中学习方面具有巨大的前景，并且彻底改变了机器学习模型的训练方式。本文提供了联邦学习的系统概述和详细分类。我们研究了联邦学习中现有的安全挑战，并全面概述了数据中毒、推理攻击和模型中毒攻击的现有防御技术。这项工作还概述了联邦学习当前的培训挑战，重点是处理非独立同分布。数据、高维问题和异构架构，并讨论了相关挑战的几种解决方案。最后，我们讨论了管理联邦学习培训中剩余的挑战，并提出了重点研究方向来解决悬而未决的问题。讨论了联邦学习的潜在候选领域，包括物联网生态系统、医疗保健应用，特别关注银行和金融领域。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述联邦学习的现状，分析其安全挑战与训练难题，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在隐私保护与数据智能间存在平衡难题，需系统梳理安全威胁与训练障碍以推动技术发展。
AI.method: 通过文献综述构建联邦学习分类体系，分析数据投毒、推理攻击等安全问题，并探讨非独立同分布数据等训练挑战的解决方案。
AI.result: 总结现有防御技术与训练优化方法，明确物联网、医疗等场景的应用潜力，指出银行金融领域需重点关注的开放问题。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习需在异构架构兼容性、高维数据处理及动态攻击防御方面深化研究，以实现更广泛的实际应用。

search_text: Federated Learning: Balancing the Thin Line Between Data Intelligence and Privacy 联邦学习：平衡数据智能和隐私之间的界限 Federated learning holds great promise in learning from fragmented sensitive data and has revolutionized how machine learning models are trained. This article provides a systematic overview and detailed taxonomy of federated learning. We investigate the existing security challenges in federated learning and provide a comprehensive overview of established defense techniques for data poisoning, inference attacks, and model poisoning attacks. The work also presents an overview of current training challenges for federated learning, focusing on handling non-i.i.d. data, high dimensionality issues, and heterogeneous architecture, and discusses several solutions for the associated challenges. Finally, we discuss the remaining challenges in managing federated learning training and suggest focused research directions to address the open questions. Potential candidate areas for federated learning, including IoT ecosystem, healthcare applications, are discussed with a particular focus on banking and financial domains. 联邦学习在从分散的敏感数据中学习方面具有巨大的前景，并且彻底改变了机器学习模型的训练方式。本文提供了联邦学习的系统概述和详细分类。我们研究了联邦学习中现有的安全挑战，并全面概述了数据中毒、推理攻击和模型中毒攻击的现有防御技术。这项工作还概述了联邦学习当前的培训挑战，重点是处理非独立同分布。数据、高维问题和异构架构，并讨论了相关挑战的几种解决方案。最后，我们讨论了管理联邦学习培训中剩余的挑战，并提出了重点研究方向来解决悬而未决的问题。讨论了联邦学习的潜在候选领域，包括物联网生态系统、医疗保健应用，特别关注银行和金融领域。 本文系统综述联邦学习的现状，分析其安全挑战与训练难题，并提出未来研究方向。 Sherin Mary Mathews,Samuel A. authors_text: Zhi-Hao Lin,Wei-Chiu Ma,Hao-Yu Hsu,Yu-Chiang Frank Wang,Shenlong Wang
title: NeurMiPs: Neural Mixture of Planar Experts for View Synthesis
title_zh: NeurMiPs：用于视图合成的平面专家的神经混合
abstract: We present Neural Mixtures of Planar Experts (NeurMiPs), a novel planar-based scene representation for modeling geometry and appearance. NeurMiPs leverages a collection of local planar experts in 3D space as the scene representation. Each planar expert consists of the parameters of the local rectangular shape representing geometry and a neural radiance field modeling the color and opacity. We render novel views by calculating ray-plane intersections and composite output colors and densities at intersected points to the image. NeurMiPs blends the efficiency of explicit mesh rendering and flexibility of the neural radiance field. Experiments demonstrate superior performance and speed of our proposed method, compared to other 3D representations in novel view synthesis.
summary: We present Neural Mixtures of Planar Experts (NeurMiPs), a novel planar-based scene representation for modeling geometry and appearance. NeurMiPs leverages a collection of local planar experts in 3D space as the scene representation. Each planar expert consists of the parameters of the local rectangular shape representing geometry and a neural radiance field modeling the color and opacity. We render novel views by calculating ray-plane intersections and composite output colors and densities at intersected points to the image. NeurMiPs blends the efficiency of explicit mesh rendering and flexibility of the neural radiance field. Experiments demonstrate superior performance and speed of our proposed method, compared to other 3D representations in novel view synthesis.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了平面专家的神经混合 (NeurMiPs)，这是一种新颖的基于平面的场景表示，用于建模几何和外观。 NeurMiPs 利用 3D 空间中的本地平面专家集合作为场景表示。每个平面专家由表示几何形状的局部矩形形状的参数和对颜色和不透明度进行建模的神经辐射场组成。我们通过计算光线平面交点以及图像相交点处的复合输出颜色和密度来渲染新颖的视图。 NeurMiPs 融合了显式网格渲染的效率和神经辐射场的灵活性。实验证明，与新颖视图合成中的其他 3D 表示相比，我们提出的方法具有卓越的性能和速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeurMiPs，一种基于平面专家混合的神经网络方法，用于视图合成中的场景表示。
AI.motivation: 传统三维表示方法在视图合成中存在效率与灵活性的平衡问题，需结合显式网格与神经辐射场的优势。
AI.method: 通过三维空间中局部平面专家集合表示场景，每个专家包含几何参数和神经辐射场，利用光线-平面交点计算并合成颜色与密度生成新视图。
AI.result: 实验表明，NeurMiPs在视图合成任务中优于其他三维表示方法，兼具高效性与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: NeurMiPs有效融合显式几何与神经辐射场，为视图合成提供了高效且灵活的解决方案。

title: Bilinear value networks
title_zh: 双线性价值网络
abstract: The dominant framework for off-policy multi-goal reinforcement learning involves estimating goal conditioned Q-value function. When learning to achieve multiple goals, data efficiency is intimately connected with the generalization of the Q-function to new goals. The de-facto paradigm is to approximate Q(s, a, g) using monolithic neural networks. To improve the generalization of the Q-function, we propose a bilinear decomposition that represents the Q-value via a low-rank approximation in the form of a dot product between two vector fields. The first vector field, f(s, a), captures the environment's local dynamics at the state s; whereas the second component, φ(s, g), captures the global relationship between the current state and the goal. We show that our bilinear decomposition scheme substantially improves data efficiency, and has superior transfer to out-of-distribution goals compared to prior methods. Empirical evidence is provided on the simulated Fetch robot task-suite and dexterous manipulation with a Shadow hand.
summary: The dominant framework for off-policy multi-goal reinforcement learning involves estimating goal conditioned Q-value function. When learning to achieve multiple goals, data efficiency is intimately connected with the generalization of the Q-function to new goals. The de-facto paradigm is to approximate Q(s, a, g) using monolithic neural networks. To improve the generalization of the Q-function, we propose a bilinear decomposition that represents the Q-value via a low-rank approximation in the form of a dot product between two vector fields. The first vector field, f(s, a), captures the environment's local dynamics at the state s; whereas the second component, φ(s, g), captures the global relationship between the current state and the goal. We show that our bilinear decomposition scheme substantially improves data efficiency, and has superior transfer to out-of-distribution goals compared to prior methods. Empirical evidence is provided on the simulated Fetch robot task-suite and dexterous manipulation with a Shadow hand.
abstract_zh: 离策略多目标强化学习的主要框架涉及估计目标条件 Q 值函数。当学习实现多个目标时，数据效率与 Q 函数对新目标的泛化密切相关。事实上的范例是使用单片神经网络来近似 Q(s, a, g)。为了提高 Q 函数的泛化能力，我们提出了一种双线性分解，通过低秩近似以两个向量场之间的点积的形式表示 Q 值。第一个向量场 f(s, a) 捕获状态 s 下环境的局部动态；而第二个分量 φ(s, g) 捕获当前状态和目标之间的全局关系。我们表明，与之前的方法相比，我们的双线性分解方案大大提高了数据效率，并且具有向分布外目标的优异转移。提供了关于模拟 Fetch 机器人任务套件和 Shadow 手灵巧操作的经验证据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双线性价值网络方法，通过分解Q函数为局部动态和全局目标关系的向量场点积，提升多目标强化学习的数据效率和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用单一神经网络近似Q(s,a,g)时，难以有效平衡数据效率与多目标泛化能力，尤其在分布外目标迁移时表现不足。
AI.method: 将Q值表示为两个向量场的点积：f(s,a)建模环境局部动态，φ(s,g)建模状态与目标的全局关系，实现低秩双线性分解。
AI.result: 在Fetch机器人和Shadow手任务中，该方法较基线提升数据效率，且对分布外目标的迁移性能显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 双线性分解有效解耦了状态动作动态与目标关系建模，为多目标强化学习提供了更高效且泛化性更强的Q函数表示框架。

The first vector field, f(s, a), captures the environment's local dynamics at the state s; whereas the second component, φ(s, g), captures the global relationship between the current state and the goal. We show that our bilinear decomposition scheme substantially improves data efficiency, and has superior transfer to out-of-distribution goals compared to prior methods. Empirical evidence is provided on the simulated Fetch robot task-suite and dexterous manipulation with a Shadow hand. 离策略多目标强化学习的主要框架涉及估计目标条件 Q 值函数。当学习实现多个目标时，数据效率与 Q 函数对新目标的泛化密切相关。事实上的范例是使用单片神经网络来近似 Q(s, a, g)。为了提高 Q 函数的泛化能力，我们提出了一种双线性分解，通过低秩近似以两个向量场之间的点积的形式表示 Q 值。第一个向量场 f(s, a) 捕获状态 s 下环境的局部动态；而第二个分量 φ(s, g) 捕获当前状态和目标之间的全局关系。我们表明，与之前的方法相比，我们的双线性分解方案大大提高了数据效率，并且具有向分布外目标的优异转移。提供了关于模拟 Fetch 机器人任务套件和 Shadow 手灵巧操作的经验证据。 本文提出一种双线性价值网络方法，通过分解Q函数为局部动态和全局目标关系的向量场点积，提升多目标强化学习的数据效率和泛化能力。 Zhang-Wei Hong,Ge Yang,Pulkit Agrawal cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Linear Temporal Logic Modulo Theories over Finite Traces (Extended Version)
title_zh: 有限迹上的线性时态逻辑模理论（扩展版）
comment: Extended version of a conference paper accepted at the 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-ECAI 2022)
comments: Extended version of a conference paper accepted at the 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-ECAI 2022)
abstract: This paper studies Linear Temporal Logic over Finite Traces (LTLf) where proposition letters are replaced with first-order formulas interpreted over arbitrary theories, in the spirit of Satisfiability Modulo Theories. The resulting logic, called LTLf Modulo Theories (LTLfMT), is semi-decidable. Nevertheless, its high expressiveness comes useful in a number of use cases, such as model-checking of data-aware processes and data-aware planning. Despite the general undecidability of these problems, being able to solve satisfiable instances is a compromise worth studying. After motivating and describing such use cases, we provide a sound and complete semi-decision procedure for LTLfMT based on the SMT encoding of a one-pass tree-shaped tableau system. The algorithm is implemented in the BLACK satisfiability checking tool, and an experimental evaluation shows the feasibility of the approach on novel benchmarks.
summary: This paper studies Linear Temporal Logic over Finite Traces (LTLf) where proposition letters are replaced with first-order formulas interpreted over arbitrary theories, in the spirit of Satisfiability Modulo Theories. The resulting logic, called LTLf Modulo Theories (LTLfMT), is semi-decidable. Nevertheless, its high expressiveness comes useful in a number of use cases, such as model-checking of data-aware processes and data-aware planning. Despite the general undecidability of these problems, being able to solve satisfiable instances is a compromise worth studying. After motivating and describing such use cases, we provide a sound and complete semi-decision procedure for LTLfMT based on the SMT encoding of a one-pass tree-shaped tableau system. The algorithm is implemented in the BLACK satisfiability checking tool, and an experimental evaluation shows the feasibility of the approach on novel benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 本文研究有限迹上的线性时态逻辑 (LTLf)，其中命题字母被替换为在任意理论上解释的一阶公式，本着可满足性模理论的精神。由此产生的逻辑称为 LTLf 模理论 (LTLfMT)，是半可判定的。尽管如此，它的高表达能力在许多用例中都很有用，例如数据感知过程的模型检查和数据感知规划。尽管这些问题通常具有不可判定性，但能够解决可满足的实例是值得研究的折衷方案。在激发和描述此类用例之后，我们基于一次性树形表格系统的 SMT 编码，为 LTLfMT 提供了一种健全且完整的半决策程序。该算法在 BLACK 可满足性检查工具中实现，实验评估表明该方法在新颖基准上的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在有限轨迹上扩展线性时序逻辑（LTLf）的方法，将命题字母替换为一阶公式，并结合任意理论进行解释，形成LTLf Modulo Theories（LTLfMT）逻辑。
AI.motivation: 现有数据感知流程验证和规划问题在一般情况下不可判定，但解决可满足实例具有实际意义，需探索高效的方法。
AI.method: 提出一种基于单次遍历树状表系统SMT编码的半判定算法，并实现于BLACK工具中。
AI.result: 实验评估表明该方法在新型基准测试中可行，验证了LTLfMT逻辑的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: LTLfMT逻辑通过结合SMT技术，为数据感知系统验证提供了半判定解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Zhongang Cai,Daxuan Ren,Ailing Zeng,Zhengyu Lin,Tao Yu,Wenjia Wang,Xiangyu Fan,Yang Gao,Yifan Yu,Liang Pan,Fangzhou Hong,Mingyuan Zhang,Chen Change Loy,Lei Yang,Ziwei Liu
title: HuMMan: Multi-Modal 4D Human Dataset for Versatile Sensing and Modeling
title_zh: HuMan：用于多功能传感和建模的多模态 4D 人体数据集
abstract: 4D human sensing and modeling are fundamental tasks in vision and graphics with numerous applications. With the advances of new sensors and algorithms, there is an increasing demand for more versatile datasets. In this work, we contribute HuMMan, a large-scale multi-modal 4D human dataset with 1000 human subjects, 400k sequences and 60M frames. HuMMan has several appealing properties: 1) multi-modal data and annotations including color images, point clouds, keypoints, SMPL parameters, and textured meshes; 2) popular mobile device is included in the sensor suite; 3) a set of 500 actions, designed to cover fundamental movements; 4) multiple tasks such as action recognition, pose estimation, parametric human recovery, and textured mesh reconstruction are supported and evaluated. Extensive experiments on HuMMan voice the need for further study on challenges such as fine-grained action recognition, dynamic human mesh reconstruction, point cloud-based parametric human recovery, and cross-device domain gaps.
summary: 4D human sensing and modeling are fundamental tasks in vision and graphics with numerous applications. With the advances of new sensors and algorithms, there is an increasing demand for more versatile datasets. In this work, we contribute HuMMan, a large-scale multi-modal 4D human dataset with 1000 human subjects, 400k sequences and 60M frames. HuMMan has several appealing properties: 1) multi-modal data and annotations including color images, point clouds, keypoints, SMPL parameters, and textured meshes; 2) popular mobile device is included in the sensor suite; 3) a set of 500 actions, designed to cover fundamental movements; 4) multiple tasks such as action recognition, pose estimation, parametric human recovery, and textured mesh reconstruction are supported and evaluated. Extensive experiments on HuMMan voice the need for further study on challenges such as fine-grained action recognition, dynamic human mesh reconstruction, point cloud-based parametric human recovery, and cross-device domain gaps.
abstract_zh: 4D 人体感知和建模是视觉和图形领域的基本任务，具有众多应用。随着新传感器和算法的进步，对更通用的数据集的需求不断增加。在这项工作中，我们贡献了 HuMMan，这是一个大规模多模态 4D 人体数据集，包含 1000 名人类受试者、40 万个序列和 60M 帧。 HuMMan 有几个吸引人的特性：1）多模态数据和注释，包括彩色图像、点云、关键点、SMPL 参数和纹理网格； 2) 流行的移动设备包含在传感器套件中； 3) 一组 500 个动作，旨在涵盖基本动作； 4）支持和评估动作识别、姿态估计、参数化人体恢复、纹理网格重建等多项任务。 HuMMan 上的大量实验表明需要进一步研究细粒度动作识别、动态人体网格重建、基于点云的参数化人体恢复和跨设备域间隙等挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HuMMan数据集，一个包含多模态4D人体数据的大规模数据集，用于支持多种人体感知与建模任务。
AI.motivation: 随着传感器和算法的进步，现有数据集在多样性、模态覆盖和任务适配性上存在不足，亟需更通用的4D人体数据集推动研究。
AI.method: 通过多模态传感器采集1000名受试者的40万序列数据，包含彩色图像、点云、关键点、SMPL参数等，并设计500种基础动作覆盖动态场景。
AI.result: 实验表明数据集在细粒度动作识别、动态网格重建等任务中存在挑战，揭示了跨设备域差异等研究方向的必要性。
AI.conclusion: HuMMan为多模态4D人体研究提供基准，推动了跨模态感知、动态建模及设备适配性等方向的进一步探索。

authors_text: Niklas Hanselmann,Katrin Renz,Kashyap Chitta,Apratim Bhattacharyya,Andreas Geiger
title: KING: Generating Safety-Critical Driving Scenarios for Robust Imitation via Kinematics Gradients
title_zh: KING：通过运动学梯度生成用于鲁棒模仿的安全关键驾驶场景
abstract: Simulators offer the possibility of safe, low-cost development of self-driving systems. However, current driving simulators exhibit naïve behavior models for background traffic. Hand-tuned scenarios are typically added during simulation to induce safety-critical situations. An alternative approach is to adversarially perturb the background traffic trajectories. In this paper, we study this approach to safety-critical driving scenario generation using the CARLA simulator. We use a kinematic bicycle model as a proxy to the simulator's true dynamics and observe that gradients through this proxy model are sufficient for optimizing the background traffic trajectories. Based on this finding, we propose KING, which generates safety-critical driving scenarios with a 20% higher success rate than black-box optimization. By solving the scenarios generated by KING using a privileged rule-based expert algorithm, we obtain training data for an imitation learning policy. After fine-tuning on this new data, we show that the policy becomes better at avoiding collisions. Importantly, our generated data leads to reduced collisions on both held-out scenarios generated via KING as well as traditional hand-crafted scenarios, demonstrating improved robustness.
summary: Simulators offer the possibility of safe, low-cost development of self-driving systems. However, current driving simulators exhibit naïve behavior models for background traffic. Hand-tuned scenarios are typically added during simulation to induce safety-critical situations. An alternative approach is to adversarially perturb the background traffic trajectories. In this paper, we study this approach to safety-critical driving scenario generation using the CARLA simulator. We use a kinematic bicycle model as a proxy to the simulator's true dynamics and observe that gradients through this proxy model are sufficient for optimizing the background traffic trajectories. Based on this finding, we propose KING, which generates safety-critical driving scenarios with a 20% higher success rate than black-box optimization. By solving the scenarios generated by KING using a privileged rule-based expert algorithm, we obtain training data for an imitation learning policy. After fine-tuning on this new data, we show that the policy becomes better at avoiding collisions. Importantly, our generated data leads to reduced collisions on both held-out scenarios generated via KING as well as traditional hand-crafted scenarios, demonstrating improved robustness.
abstract_zh: 模拟器提供了安全、低成本开发自动驾驶系统的可能性。然而，当前的驾驶模拟器对背景交通表现出幼稚的行为模型。通常在模拟过程中添加手动调整的场景以引发安全关键情况。另一种方法是对抗性地扰乱背景交通轨迹。在本文中，我们研究了使用 CARLA 模拟器生成安全关键驾驶场景的方法。我们使用运动学自行车模型作为模拟器真实动力学的代理，并观察到通过该代理模型的梯度足以优化背景交通轨迹。基于这一发现，我们提出了 KING，它生成安全关键的驾驶场景，成功率比黑盒优化高 20%。通过使用基于特权规则的专家算法解决 KING 生成的场景，我们获得了模仿学习策略的训练数据。对这些新数据进行微调后，我们表明该策略在避免碰撞方面变得更好。重要的是，我们生成的数据减少了通过 KING 生成的保留场景以及传统手工制作场景的碰撞，从而证明了鲁棒性的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KING方法，通过动力学梯度生成安全关键驾驶场景，以提升自动驾驶系统的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有驾驶模拟器的背景交通模型过于简单，难以有效生成安全关键场景，需依赖人工设计或黑盒优化方法。
AI.method: 利用动力学自行车模型作为代理，通过梯度优化背景交通轨迹生成安全关键场景，并结合特权专家算法生成模仿学习数据。
AI.result: KING方法生成场景的成功率比黑盒优化高20%，训练后的策略在测试场景中碰撞率显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 基于动力学梯度的场景生成方法能有效提升自动驾驶策略的鲁棒性和安全性能。

search_text: KING: Generating Safety-Critical Driving Scenarios for Robust Imitation via Kinematics Gradients KING：通过运动学梯度生成用于鲁棒模仿的安全关键驾驶场景 Simulators offer the possibility of safe, low-cost development of self-driving systems. However, current driving simulators exhibit naïve behavior models for background traffic. Hand-tuned scenarios are typically added during simulation to induce safety-critical situations. An alternative approach is to adversarially perturb the background traffic trajectories. In this paper, we study this approach to safety-critical driving scenario generation using the CARLA simulator. We use a kinematic bicycle model as a proxy to the simulator's true dynamics and observe that gradients through this proxy model are sufficient for optimizing the background traffic trajectories. Based on this finding, we propose KING, which generates safety-critical driving scenarios with a 20% higher success rate than black-box optimization. By solving the scenarios generated by KING using a privileged rule-based expert algorithm, we obtain training data for an imitation learning policy. After fine-tuning on this new data, we show that the policy becomes better at avoiding collisions. Importantly, our generated data leads to reduced collisions on both held-out scenarios generated via KING as well as traditional hand-crafted scenarios, demonstrating improved robustness. 模拟器提供了安全、低成本开发自动驾驶系统的可能性。然而，当前的驾驶模拟器对背景交通表现出幼稚的行为模型。通常在模拟过程中添加手动调整的场景以引发安全关键情况。另一种方法是对抗性地扰乱背景交通轨迹。在本文中，我们研究了使用 CARLA 模拟器生成安全关键驾驶场景的方法。我们使用运动学自行车模型作为模拟器真实动力学的代理，并观察到通过该代理模型的梯度足以优化背景交通轨迹。基于这一发现，我们提出了 KING，它生成安全关键的驾驶场景，成功率比黑盒优化高 20%。通过使用基于特权规则的专家算法解决 KING 生成的场景，我们获得了模仿学习策略的训练数据。对这些新数据进行微调后，我们表明该策略在避免碰撞方面变得更好。重要的是，我们生成的数据减少了通过 KING 生成的保留场景以及传统手工制作场景的碰撞，从而证明了鲁棒性的提高。 本文提出KING方法，通过动力学梯度生成安全关键驾驶场景，以提升自动驾驶系统的鲁棒性。 Niklas Hanselmann,Katrin Renz,Kashyap Chitta,Apratim Bhattacharyya,Andreas Geiger cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Unified Simulation, Perception, and Generation of Human Behavior
title_zh: 人类行为的统一模拟、感知和生成
abstract: Understanding and modeling human behavior is fundamental to almost any computer vision and robotics applications that involve humans. In this thesis, we take a holistic approach to human behavior modeling and tackle its three essential aspects -- simulation, perception, and generation. Throughout the thesis, we show how the three aspects are deeply connected and how utilizing and improving one aspect can greatly benefit the other aspects. We also discuss the lessons learned and our vision for what is next for human behavior modeling.
summary: Understanding and modeling human behavior is fundamental to almost any computer vision and robotics applications that involve humans. In this thesis, we take a holistic approach to human behavior modeling and tackle its three essential aspects -- simulation, perception, and generation. Throughout the thesis, we show how the three aspects are deeply connected and how utilizing and improving one aspect can greatly benefit the other aspects. We also discuss the lessons learned and our vision for what is next for human behavior modeling.
abstract_zh: 理解和建模人类行为是几乎所有涉及人类的计算机视觉和机器人应用的基础。在本论文中，我们采用整体方法来进行人类行为建模，并解决其三个基本方面——模拟、感知和生成。在整篇论文中，我们展示了这三个方面如何紧密相连，以及利用和改进一个方面如何能够极大地造福于其他方面。我们还讨论了经验教训以及我们对人类行为建模下一步的愿景。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在综合研究人类行为的模拟、感知与生成，并探讨三者间的内在联系。
AI.motivation: 人类行为建模是计算机视觉与机器人技术的核心，需通过统一方法提升各模块协同效率。
AI.method: 采用整体研究框架，分析模拟、感知与生成三模块的相互作用，并通过优化单一模块促进系统性提升。
AI.result: 揭示三者紧密关联性，验证模块间协同优化的有效性，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 人类行为建模需突破模块割裂，未来应深化跨模块交互机制与通用性研究。

title: Unaligned Supervision For Automatic Music Transcription in The Wild
title_zh: 对野外自动音乐转录的不一致监督
comment: 16 pages, project page available at https://benadar293.github.io
comments: 16 pages, project page available at https://benadar293.github.io
abstract: Multi-instrument Automatic Music Transcription (AMT), or the decoding of a musical recording into semantic musical content, is one of the holy grails of Music Information Retrieval. Current AMT approaches are restricted to piano and (some) guitar recordings, due to difficult data collection. In order to overcome data collection barriers, previous AMT approaches attempt to employ musical scores in the form of a digitized version of the same song or piece. The scores are typically aligned using audio features and strenuous human intervention to generate training labels. We introduce NoteEM, a method for simultaneously training a transcriber and aligning the scores to their corresponding performances, in a fully-automated process. Using this unaligned supervision scheme, complemented by pseudo-labels and pitch-shift augmentation, our method enables training on in-the-wild recordings with unprecedented accuracy and instrumental variety. Using only synthetic data and unaligned supervision, we report SOTA note-level accuracy of the MAPS dataset, and large favorable margins on cross-dataset evaluations. We also demonstrate robustness and ease of use; we report comparable results when training on a small, easily obtainable, self-collected dataset, and we propose alternative labeling to the MusicNet dataset, which we show to be more accurate. Our project page is available at https://benadar293.github.io
summary: Multi-instrument Automatic Music Transcription (AMT), or the decoding of a musical recording into semantic musical content, is one of the holy grails of Music Information Retrieval. Current AMT approaches are restricted to piano and (some) guitar recordings, due to difficult data collection. In order to overcome data collection barriers, previous AMT approaches attempt to employ musical scores in the form of a digitized version of the same song or piece. The scores are typically aligned using audio features and strenuous human intervention to generate training labels. We introduce NoteEM, a method for simultaneously training a transcriber and aligning the scores to their corresponding performances, in a fully-automated process. Using this unaligned supervision scheme, complemented by pseudo-labels and pitch-shift augmentation, our method enables training on in-the-wild recordings with unprecedented accuracy and instrumental variety. Using only synthetic data and unaligned supervision, we report SOTA note-level accuracy of the MAPS dataset, and large favorable margins on cross-dataset evaluations. We also demonstrate robustness and ease of use; we report comparable results when training on a small, easily obtainable, self-collected dataset, and we propose alternative labeling to the MusicNet dataset, which we show to be more accurate. Our project page is available at https://benadar293.github.io
abstract_zh: 多乐器自动音乐转录（AMT），或者将音乐录音解码为语义音乐内容，是音乐信息检索的圣杯之一。由于数据收集困难，当前的 AMT 方法仅限于钢琴和（某些）吉他录音。为了克服数据收集障碍，以前的 AMT 方法尝试采用同一歌曲或作品的数字化版本形式的乐谱。通常使用音频特征和剧烈的人工干预来对齐分数以生成训练标签。我们引入了 NoteEM，这是一种在全自动过程中同时训练转录员并将分数与其相应表现对齐的方法。使用这种未对齐的监督方案，辅以伪标签和变调增强，我们的方法能够以前所未有的准确性和乐器多样性对野外录音进行训练。仅使用合成数据和未对齐的监督，我们报告了 MAPS 数据集的 SOTA 音符级准确性，以及跨数据集评估的巨大优势。我们还展示了稳健性和易用性；当我们在一个小的、容易获得的、自我收集的数据集上进行训练时，我们报告了可比的结果，并且我们提出了 MusicNet 数据集的替代标签，我们证明它更准确。我们的项目页面位于 https://benadar293.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需对齐监督的自动音乐转录方法NoteEM，用于处理多乐器真实环境下的音乐录音。
AI.motivation: 现有自动音乐转录（AMT）方法受限于钢琴和吉他等少数乐器，因数据收集困难且依赖人工对齐乐谱生成标签，限制了模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出NoteEM方法，通过未对齐的监督方案结合伪标签和音高移位增强技术，实现转录器训练与乐谱对齐的自动化过程。
AI.result: 在MAPS数据集上达到SOTA的音符级准确率，跨数据集评估表现优异，并证明了在小规模自建数据集上的有效性及对MusicNet数据集标签方案的改进。
AI.conclusion: NoteEM方法通过无需人工对齐的监督机制，显著提升了多乐器音乐转录的准确性与适用性，为真实场景下的AMT研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Vineet Nair,Kritika Prakash,Michael Wilbur,Aparna Taneja,Corinne Namblard,Oyindamola Adeyemo,Abhishek Dubey,Abiodun Adereni,Milind Tambe,Ayan Mukhopadhyay
title: ADVISER: AI-Driven Vaccination Intervention Optimiser for Increasing Vaccine Uptake in Nigeria
title_zh: 顾问：人工智能驱动的疫苗干预优化器可提高尼日利亚的疫苗接种率
comment: Accepted for publication at International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence 2022, AI for Good Track (IJCAI-22)
comments: Accepted for publication at International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence 2022, AI for Good Track (IJCAI-22)
abstract: More than 5 million children under five years die from largely preventable or treatable medical conditions every year, with an overwhelmingly large proportion of deaths occurring in under-developed countries with low vaccination uptake. One of the United Nations' sustainable development goals (SDG 3) aims to end preventable deaths of newborns and children under five years of age. We focus on Nigeria, where the rate of infant mortality is appalling. We collaborate with HelpMum, a large non-profit organization in Nigeria to design and optimize the allocation of heterogeneous health interventions under uncertainty to increase vaccination uptake, the first such collaboration in Nigeria. Our framework, ADVISER: AI-Driven Vaccination Intervention Optimiser, is based on an integer linear program that seeks to maximize the cumulative probability of successful vaccination. Our optimization formulation is intractable in practice. We present a heuristic approach that enables us to solve the problem for real-world use-cases. We also present theoretical bounds for the heuristic method. Finally, we show that the proposed approach outperforms baseline methods in terms of vaccination uptake through experimental evaluation. HelpMum is currently planning a pilot program based on our approach to be deployed in the largest city of Nigeria, which would be the first deployment of an AI-driven vaccination uptake program in the country and hopefully, pave the way for other data-driven programs to improve health outcomes in Nigeria.
summary: More than 5 million children under five years die from largely preventable or treatable medical conditions every year, with an overwhelmingly large proportion of deaths occurring in under-developed countries with low vaccination uptake. One of the United Nations' sustainable development goals (SDG 3) aims to end preventable deaths of newborns and children under five years of age. We focus on Nigeria, where the rate of infant mortality is appalling. We collaborate with HelpMum, a large non-profit organization in Nigeria to design and optimize the allocation of heterogeneous health interventions under uncertainty to increase vaccination uptake, the first such collaboration in Nigeria. Our framework, ADVISER: AI-Driven Vaccination Intervention Optimiser, is based on an integer linear program that seeks to maximize the cumulative probability of successful vaccination. Our optimization formulation is intractable in practice. We present a heuristic approach that enables us to solve the problem for real-world use-cases. We also present theoretical bounds for the heuristic method. Finally, we show that the proposed approach outperforms baseline methods in terms of vaccination uptake through experimental evaluation. HelpMum is currently planning a pilot program based on our approach to be deployed in the largest city of Nigeria, which would be the first deployment of an AI-driven vaccination uptake program in the country and hopefully, pave the way for other data-driven programs to improve health outcomes in Nigeria.
abstract_zh: 每年有超过 500 万五岁以下儿童死于基本上可预防或可治疗的疾病，其中绝大多数死亡发生在疫苗接种率较低的欠发达国家。联合国可持续发展目标之一（SDG 3）旨在消除新生儿和五岁以下儿童可预防的死亡。我们关注尼日利亚，那里的婴儿死亡率令人震惊。我们与尼日利亚大型非营利组织 HelpMum 合作，在不确定的情况下设计和优化异质健康干预措施的分配，以提高疫苗接种率，这是尼日利亚的首次此类合作。我们的框架“顾问：人工智能驱动的疫苗接种干预优化器”基于整数线性程序，旨在最大化成功疫苗接种的累积概率。我们的优化公式在实践中很难处理。我们提出了一种启发式方法，使我们能够解决现实世界用例的问题。我们还提出了启发式方法的理论界限。最后，我们通过实验评估表明，所提出的方法在疫苗接种率方面优于基线方法。 HelpMum 目前正在计划在尼日利亚最大的城市部署基于我们方法的试点计划，这将是该国首次部署人工智能驱动的疫苗接种计划，并希望为其他数据驱动的计划铺平道路，以改善尼日利亚的健康状况。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ADVISER框架，通过AI驱动的优化方法提升尼日利亚疫苗接种率。
AI.motivation: 全球每年有超过500万五岁以下儿童死于可预防疾病，尼日利亚婴儿死亡率极高，亟需通过优化干预措施提高疫苗接种覆盖率以实现联合国可持续发展目标3。
AI.method: 基于整数线性规划构建最大化疫苗接种成功率的优化模型，因实际不可行性提出启发式算法并提供理论界分析。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法优于基线模型，非营利组织HelpMum计划在尼日利亚最大城市开展试点部署。
AI.conclusion: ADVISER为尼日利亚首个AI驱动的疫苗接种优化方案，有望为数据驱动的公共卫生干预提供范例。

search_text: ADVISER: AI-Driven Vaccination Intervention Optimiser for Increasing Vaccine Uptake in Nigeria 顾问：人工智能驱动的疫苗干预优化器可提高尼日利亚的疫苗接种率 More than 5 million children under five years die from largely preventable or treatable medical conditions every year, with an overwhelmingly large proportion of deaths occurring in under-developed countries with low vaccination uptake. One of the United Nations' sustainable development goals (SDG 3) aims to end preventable deaths of newborns and children under five years of age. We focus on Nigeria, where the rate of infant mortality is appalling. We collaborate with HelpMum, a large non-profit organization in Nigeria to design and optimize the allocation of heterogeneous health interventions under uncertainty to increase vaccination uptake, the first such collaboration in Nigeria. Our framework, ADVISER: AI-Driven Vaccination Intervention Optimiser, is based on an integer linear program that seeks to maximize the cumulative probability of successful vaccination. Our optimization formulation is intractable in practice. We present a heuristic approach that enables us to solve the problem for real-world use-cases. We also present theoretical bounds for the heuristic method. Finally, we show that the proposed approach outperforms baseline methods in terms of vaccination uptake through experimental evaluation. HelpMum is currently planning a pilot program based on our approach to be deployed in the largest city of Nigeria, which would be the first deployment of an AI-driven vaccination uptake program in the country and hopefully, pave the way for other data-driven programs to improve health outcomes in Nigeria. 每年有超过 500 万五岁以下儿童死于基本上可预防或可治疗的疾病，其中绝大多数死亡发生在疫苗接种率较低的欠发达国家。联合国可持续发展目标之一（SDG 3）旨在消除新生儿和五岁以下儿童可预防的死亡。我们关注尼日利亚，那里的婴儿死亡率令人震惊。我们与尼日利亚大型非营利组织 HelpMum 合作，在不确定的情况下设计和优化异质健康干预措施的分配，以提高疫苗接种率，这是尼日利亚的首次此类合作。我们的框架“顾问：人工智能驱动的疫苗接种干预优化器”基于整数线性程序，旨在最大化成功疫苗接种的累积概率。我们的优化公式在实践中很难处理。我们提出了一种启发式方法，使我们能够解决现实世界用例的问题。我们还提出了启发式方法的理论界限。最后，我们通过实验评估表明，所提出的方法在疫苗接种率方面优于基线方法。 HelpMum 目前正在计划在尼日利亚最大的城市部署基于我们方法的试点计划，这将是该国首次部署人工智能驱动的疫苗接种计划，并希望为其他数据驱动的计划铺平道路，以改善尼日利亚的健康状况。 本文提出ADVISER框架，通过AI驱动的优化方法提升尼日利亚疫苗接种率。 Vineet Nair,Kritika Prakash,Michael Wilbur,Aparna Taneja,Corinne Namblard,Oyindamola Adeyemo,Abhishek Dubey,Abiodun Adereni,Milind Tambe,Ayan Mukhopadhyay cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Zicong Fan,Omid Taheri,Dimitrios Tzionas,Muhammed Kocabas,Manuel Kaufmann,Michael J. Black,Otmar Hilliges
title: ARCTIC: A Dataset for Dexterous Bimanual Hand-Object Manipulation
title_zh: ARCTIC：灵巧双手物体操作数据集
abstract: Humans intuitively understand that inanimate objects do not move by themselves, but that state changes are typically caused by human manipulation (e.g., the opening of a book). This is not yet the case for machines. In part this is because there exist no datasets with ground-truth 3D annotations for the study of physically consistent and synchronised motion of hands and articulated objects. To this end, we introduce ARCTIC -- a dataset of two hands that dexterously manipulate objects, containing 2.1M video frames paired with accurate 3D hand and object meshes and detailed, dynamic contact information. It contains bi-manual articulation of objects such as scissors or laptops, where hand poses and object states evolve jointly in time. We propose two novel articulated hand-object interaction tasks: (1) Consistent motion reconstruction: Given a monocular video, the goal is to reconstruct two hands and articulated objects in 3D, so that their motions are spatio-temporally consistent. (2) Interaction field estimation: Dense relative hand-object distances must be estimated from images. We introduce two baselines ArcticNet and InterField, respectively and evaluate them qualitatively and quantitatively on ARCTIC. Our code and data are available at https://arctic.is.tue.mpg.de.
summary: Humans intuitively understand that inanimate objects do not move by themselves, but that state changes are typically caused by human manipulation (e.g., the opening of a book). This is not yet the case for machines. In part this is because there exist no datasets with ground-truth 3D annotations for the study of physically consistent and synchronised motion of hands and articulated objects. To this end, we introduce ARCTIC -- a dataset of two hands that dexterously manipulate objects, containing 2.1M video frames paired with accurate 3D hand and object meshes and detailed, dynamic contact information. It contains bi-manual articulation of objects such as scissors or laptops, where hand poses and object states evolve jointly in time. We propose two novel articulated hand-object interaction tasks: (1) Consistent motion reconstruction: Given a monocular video, the goal is to reconstruct two hands and articulated objects in 3D, so that their motions are spatio-temporally consistent. (2) Interaction field estimation: Dense relative hand-object distances must be estimated from images. We introduce two baselines ArcticNet and InterField, respectively and evaluate them qualitatively and quantitatively on ARCTIC. Our code and data are available at https://arctic.is.tue.mpg.de.
abstract_zh: 人类直观地理解无生命的物体不会自行移动，但状态变化通常是由人类操纵（例如打开一本书）引起的。对于机器来说，情况还不是这样。部分原因是不存在具有真实 3D 注释的数据集来研究手和铰接物体的物理一致和同步运动。为此，我们引入了 ARCTIC——一个由两只手灵巧地操纵物体的数据集，包含 210 万个视频帧，搭配精确的 3D 手和物体网格以及详细的动态联系信息。它包含剪刀或笔记本电脑等物体的双手关节，其中手部姿势和物体状态随时间共同演变。我们提出了两个新颖的关节式手-物体交互任务：（1）一致的运动重建：给定单目视频，目标是在 3D 中重建两只手和关节式物体，以便它们的运动在时空上一致。 (2)交互场估计：必须从图像中估计密集的相对手部物体距离。我们分别引入两个基线ArcticNet和InterField，并在ARCTIC上对它们进行定性和定量评估。我们的代码和数据可在 https://arctic.is.tue.mpg.de 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARCTIC数据集，用于研究双臂灵巧操作物体的物理一致性和同步运动，并提出两个新任务：一致运动重建和交互场估计。
AI.motivation: 现有机器缺乏对物体物理一致性和同步运动的感知能力，主要因缺少包含精确3D标注的手-物体交互数据集。
AI.method: 构建包含210万帧视频的ARCTIC数据集，配以3D手部和物体网格及动态接触信息，并提出ArcticNet和InterField两个基线模型分别解决运动重建和交互场估计任务。
AI.result: 在ARCTIC数据集上对两个基线模型进行了定性和定量评估，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ARCTIC数据集为研究协调的手-物体交互提供了新资源，推动了AI在灵巧操作任务中的发展。

authors_text: Linfeng Zhao,Lingzhi Kong,Robin Walters,Lawson L. S. Wong
title: Toward Compositional Generalization in Object-Oriented World Modeling
title_zh: 面向对象世界建模中的组合泛化
abstract: Compositional generalization is a critical ability in learning and decision-making. We focus on the setting of reinforcement learning in object-oriented environments to study compositional generalization in world modeling. We (1) formalize the compositional generalization problem with an algebraic approach and (2) study how a world model can achieve that. We introduce a conceptual environment, Object Library, and two instances, and deploy a principled pipeline to measure the generalization ability. Motivated by the formulation, we analyze several methods with exact or no compositional generalization ability using our framework, and design a differentiable approach, Homomorphic Object-oriented World Model (HOWM), that achieves soft but more efficient compositional generalization.
summary: Compositional generalization is a critical ability in learning and decision-making. We focus on the setting of reinforcement learning in object-oriented environments to study compositional generalization in world modeling. We (1) formalize the compositional generalization problem with an algebraic approach and (2) study how a world model can achieve that. We introduce a conceptual environment, Object Library, and two instances, and deploy a principled pipeline to measure the generalization ability. Motivated by the formulation, we analyze several methods with exact or no compositional generalization ability using our framework, and design a differentiable approach, Homomorphic Object-oriented World Model (HOWM), that achieves soft but more efficient compositional generalization.
abstract_zh: 组合概括是学习和决策的关键能力。我们专注于面向对象环境中的强化学习设置，以研究世界建模中的组合泛化。我们（1）用代数方法形式化组合泛化问题，以及（2）研究世界模型如何实现这一目标。我们引入一个概念环境、对象库和两个实例，并部署一个原则性的管道来衡量泛化能力。在公式的推动下，我们使用我们的框架分析了几种具有精确或没有组合泛化能力的方法，并设计了一种可微分的方法，同态面向对象的世界模型（HOWM），它实现了软但更有效的组合泛化。

AI.tldr: 研究如何在面向对象的强化学习环境中实现组合泛化，并提出一种新的世界模型HOWM。
AI.motivation: 组合泛化是强化学习中的关键挑战，现有方法难以有效实现，因此需要新的方法来解决。
AI.method: 通过代数方法形式化组合泛化问题，构建Object Library环境和实例，并设计可微的HOWM模型。
AI.result: 分析多种方法后发现，HOWM实现了软性但更高效的组合泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: HOWM模型有效推动了面向对象环境中世界模型的组合泛化研究，为未来工作提供新方向。

ai_content_json.method: 通过代数方法形式化组合泛化问题，构建Object Library环境和实例，并设计可微的HOWM模型。

search_text: Toward Compositional Generalization in Object-Oriented World Modeling 面向对象世界建模中的组合泛化 Compositional generalization is a critical ability in learning and decision-making. We focus on the setting of reinforcement learning in object-oriented environments to study compositional generalization in world modeling. We (1) formalize the compositional generalization problem with an algebraic approach and (2) study how a world model can achieve that. We introduce a conceptual environment, Object Library, and two instances, and deploy a principled pipeline to measure the generalization ability. Motivated by the formulation, we analyze several methods with exact or no compositional generalization ability using our framework, and design a differentiable approach, Homomorphic Object-oriented World Model (HOWM), that achieves soft but more efficient compositional generalization. 组合概括是学习和决策的关键能力。我们专注于面向对象环境中的强化学习设置，以研究世界建模中的组合泛化。我们（1）用代数方法形式化组合泛化问题，以及（2）研究世界模型如何实现这一目标。我们引入一个概念环境、对象库和两个实例，并部署一个原则性的管道来衡量泛化能力。在公式的推动下，我们使用我们的框架分析了几种具有精确或没有组合泛化能力的方法，并设计了一种可微分的方法，同态面向对象的世界模型（HOWM），它实现了软但更有效的组合泛化。 研究如何在面向对象的强化学习环境中实现组合泛化，并提出一种新的世界模型HOWM。 Linfeng Zhao,Lingzhi Kong,Robin Walters,Lawson L. S. Wong cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

title: Unsupervised Multi-Modal Medical Image Registration via Discriminator-Free Image-to-Image Translation
title_zh: 通过无判别器图像到图像转换的无监督多模态医学图像配准
abstract: In clinical practice, well-aligned multi-modal images, such as Magnetic Resonance (MR) and Computed Tomography (CT), together can provide complementary information for image-guided therapies. Multi-modal image registration is essential for the accurate alignment of these multi-modal images. However, it remains a very challenging task due to complicated and unknown spatial correspondence between different modalities. In this paper, we propose a novel translation-based unsupervised deformable image registration approach to convert the multi-modal registration problem to a mono-modal one. Specifically, our approach incorporates a discriminator-free translation network to facilitate the training of the registration network and a patchwise contrastive loss to encourage the translation network to preserve object shapes. Furthermore, we propose to replace an adversarial loss, that is widely used in previous multi-modal image registration methods, with a pixel loss in order to integrate the output of translation into the target modality. This leads to an unsupervised method requiring no ground-truth deformation or pairs of aligned images for training. We evaluate four variants of our approach on the public Learn2Reg 2021 datasets \cite{hering2021learn2reg}. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed architecture achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/heyblackC/DFMIR.
summary: In clinical practice, well-aligned multi-modal images, such as Magnetic Resonance (MR) and Computed Tomography (CT), together can provide complementary information for image-guided therapies. Multi-modal image registration is essential for the accurate alignment of these multi-modal images. However, it remains a very challenging task due to complicated and unknown spatial correspondence between different modalities. In this paper, we propose a novel translation-based unsupervised deformable image registration approach to convert the multi-modal registration problem to a mono-modal one. Specifically, our approach incorporates a discriminator-free translation network to facilitate the training of the registration network and a patchwise contrastive loss to encourage the translation network to preserve object shapes. Furthermore, we propose to replace an adversarial loss, that is widely used in previous multi-modal image registration methods, with a pixel loss in order to integrate the output of translation into the target modality. This leads to an unsupervised method requiring no ground-truth deformation or pairs of aligned images for training. We evaluate four variants of our approach on the public Learn2Reg 2021 datasets \cite{hering2021learn2reg}. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed architecture achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/heyblackC/DFMIR.
abstract_zh: 在临床实践中，对齐良好的多模态图像，例如磁共振 (MR) 和计算机断层扫描 (CT)，可以为图像引导治疗提供补充信息。多模态图像配准对于这些多模态图像的精确对准至关重要。然而，由于不同模态之间复杂且未知的空间对应关系，这仍然是一项非常具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于平移的无监督变形图像配准方法，将多模态配准问题转换为单模态配准问题。具体来说，我们的方法结合了一个无判别器的翻译网络，以促进注册网络的训练，以及一个补丁对比损失，以鼓励翻译网络保留对象形状。此外，我们建议用像素损失替换先前多模态图像配准方法中广泛使用的对抗性损失，以便将翻译输出集成到目标模态中。这导致了一种无监督方法，不需要地面实况变形或成对的对齐图像进行训练。我们在公共 Learn2Reg 2021 数据集 \cite{hering2021learn2reg} 上评估了我们方法的四种变体。实验结果表明，所提出的架构实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/heyblackC/DFMIR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需监督的多模态医学图像配准方法，通过无判别器的图像到图像转换实现模态间对齐。
AI.motivation: 多模态医学图像（如MRI和CT）的配准因模态间复杂的空间对应关系而极具挑战性，传统方法依赖对抗损失且需标注数据，限制了应用。
AI.method: 设计无判别器的翻译网络将多模态配准转化为单模态问题，结合块状对比损失保持形状一致性，并用像素损失替代对抗损失以整合目标模态输出。
AI.result: 在Learn2Reg 2021数据集上，四种方法变体均达到最先进性能，且无需真实变形场或对齐图像训练。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过创新的无监督框架有效解决了多模态医学图像配准难题，为临床应用提供了新思路。

title: GRIT: General Robust Image Task Benchmark
title_zh: GRIT：通用鲁棒图像任务基准
abstract: Computer vision models excel at making predictions when the test distribution closely resembles the training distribution. Such models have yet to match the ability of biological vision to learn from multiple sources and generalize to new data sources and tasks. To facilitate the development and evaluation of more general vision systems, we introduce the General Robust Image Task (GRIT) benchmark. GRIT evaluates the performance, robustness, and calibration of a vision system across a variety of image prediction tasks, concepts, and data sources. The seven tasks in GRIT are selected to cover a range of visual skills: object categorization, object localization, referring expression grounding, visual question answering, segmentation, human keypoint detection, and surface normal estimation. GRIT is carefully designed to enable the evaluation of robustness under image perturbations, image source distribution shift, and concept distribution shift. By providing a unified platform for thorough assessment of skills and concepts learned by a vision model, we hope GRIT catalyzes the development of performant and robust general purpose vision systems.
summary: Computer vision models excel at making predictions when the test distribution closely resembles the training distribution. Such models have yet to match the ability of biological vision to learn from multiple sources and generalize to new data sources and tasks. To facilitate the development and evaluation of more general vision systems, we introduce the General Robust Image Task (GRIT) benchmark. GRIT evaluates the performance, robustness, and calibration of a vision system across a variety of image prediction tasks, concepts, and data sources. The seven tasks in GRIT are selected to cover a range of visual skills: object categorization, object localization, referring expression grounding, visual question answering, segmentation, human keypoint detection, and surface normal estimation. GRIT is carefully designed to enable the evaluation of robustness under image perturbations, image source distribution shift, and concept distribution shift. By providing a unified platform for thorough assessment of skills and concepts learned by a vision model, we hope GRIT catalyzes the development of performant and robust general purpose vision systems.
abstract_zh: 当测试分布与训练分布非常相似时，计算机视觉模型擅长做出预测。此类模型尚未达到生物视觉从多个来源学习并推广到新数据源和任务的能力。为了促进更通用视觉系统的开发和评估，我们引入了通用鲁棒图像任务（GRIT）基准。 GRIT 跨各种图像预测任务、概念和数据源评估视觉系统的性能、鲁棒性和校准。 GRIT 中的七个任务被选择来涵盖一系列视觉技能：对象分类、对象定位、参考表达基础、视觉问答、分割、人体关键点检测和表面法线估计。 GRIT 经过精心设计，可以评估图像扰动、图像源分布偏移和概念分布偏移下的鲁棒性。通过提供一个统一的平台来全面评估视觉模型所学到的技能和概念，我们希望 GRIT 能够促进高性能和强大的通用视觉系统的开发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRIT基准，用于评估视觉系统在多种图像预测任务、概念和数据源下的性能、鲁棒性和校准能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉模型在测试分布与训练分布不匹配时表现不佳，缺乏统一平台评估多任务和多源数据的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计包含7个视觉任务的基准，涵盖分类、定位、分割等，并评估图像扰动、数据源偏移和概念偏移下的模型表现。
AI.result: GRIT为评估视觉模型的通用性和鲁棒性提供统一框架，促进更强大的通用视觉系统研发。
AI.conclusion: GRIT基准有助于推动开发能够处理多样化任务和分布偏移的鲁棒视觉模型。

authors_text: Soham De,Leonard Berrada,Jamie Hayes,Samuel L. Smith,Borja Balle
title: Unlocking High-Accuracy Differentially Private Image Classification through Scale
title_zh: 通过规模解锁高精度差分隐私图像分类
abstract: Differential Privacy (DP) provides a formal privacy guarantee preventing adversaries with access to a machine learning model from extracting information about individual training points. Differentially Private Stochastic Gradient Descent (DP-SGD), the most popular DP training method for deep learning, realizes this protection by injecting noise during training. However previous works have found that DP-SGD often leads to a significant degradation in performance on standard image classification benchmarks. Furthermore, some authors have postulated that DP-SGD inherently performs poorly on large models, since the norm of the noise required to preserve privacy is proportional to the model dimension. In contrast, we demonstrate that DP-SGD on over-parameterized models can perform significantly better than previously thought. Combining careful hyper-parameter tuning with simple techniques to ensure signal propagation and improve the convergence rate, we obtain a new SOTA without extra data on CIFAR-10 of 81.4% under (8, 10^{-5})-DP using a 40-layer Wide-ResNet, improving over the previous SOTA of 71.7%. When fine-tuning a pre-trained NFNet-F3, we achieve a remarkable 83.8% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet under (0.5, 8*10^{-7})-DP. Additionally, we also achieve 86.7% top-1 accuracy under (8, 8 \cdot 10^{-7})-DP, which is just 4.3% below the current non-private SOTA for this task. We believe our results are a significant step towards closing the accuracy gap between private and non-private image classification.
summary: Differential Privacy (DP) provides a formal privacy guarantee preventing adversaries with access to a machine learning model from extracting information about individual training points. Differentially Private Stochastic Gradient Descent (DP-SGD), the most popular DP training method for deep learning, realizes this protection by injecting noise during training. However previous works have found that DP-SGD often leads to a significant degradation in performance on standard image classification benchmarks. Furthermore, some authors have postulated that DP-SGD inherently performs poorly on large models, since the norm of the noise required to preserve privacy is proportional to the model dimension. In contrast, we demonstrate that DP-SGD on over-parameterized models can perform significantly better than previously thought. Combining careful hyper-parameter tuning with simple techniques to ensure signal propagation and improve the convergence rate, we obtain a new SOTA without extra data on CIFAR-10 of 81.4% under (8, 10^{-5})-DP using a 40-layer Wide-ResNet, improving over the previous SOTA of 71.7%. When fine-tuning a pre-trained NFNet-F3, we achieve a remarkable 83.8% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet under (0.5, 8*10^{-7})-DP. Additionally, we also achieve 86.7% top-1 accuracy under (8, 8 \cdot 10^{-7})-DP, which is just 4.3% below the current non-private SOTA for this task. We believe our results are a significant step towards closing the accuracy gap between private and non-private image classification.
abstract_zh: 差分隐私 (DP) 提供了正式的隐私保证，防止有权访问机器学习模型的对手提取有关各个训练点的信息。差分隐私随机梯度下降（DP-SGD）是深度学习中最流行的 DP 训练方法，它通过在训练期间注入噪声来实现这种保护。然而，之前的工作发现 DP-SGD 通常会导致标准图像分类基准的性能显着下降。此外，一些作者假设 DP-SGD 在大型模型上本质上表现不佳，因为保护隐私所需的噪声范数与模型维度成正比。相比之下，我们证明了 DP-SGD 在超参数化模型上的表现比之前想象的要好得多。将仔细的超参数调整与简单的技术相结合，以确保信号传播并提高收敛速度，我们使用 40 层 Wide-ResNet 在 (8, 10^{-5})-DP 下在 CIFAR-10 上获得了 81.4% 的新 SOTA，无需额外数据，比之前的 SOTA 提高了 71.7%。当微调预训练的 NFNet-F3 时，我们在 (0.5, 8*10^{-7})-DP 下在 ImageNet 上实现了 83.8% 的 top-1 准确率。此外，我们还在 (8, 8 \cdot 10^{-7})-DP 下实现了 86.7% 的 top-1 准确率，仅比该任务当前的非私有 SOTA 低 4.3%。我们相信我们的结果是缩小私有和非私有图像分类之间的准确性差距的重要一步。

AI.motivation: 差分隐私训练方法DP-SGD在图像分类任务中存在性能下降问题，尤其在大模型上因噪声规模与模型维度相关而表现不佳
AI.method: 结合精细的超参数调优与信号传播保障技术，使用40层Wide-ResNet和预训练NFNet-F3模型进行隐私训练
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上达到81.4%(8,1e-5)-DP精度，ImageNet上实现83.8%(0.5,8e-7)-DP精度，仅比非隐私SOTA低4.3%
AI.conclusion: 证明了通过模型规模扩展和训练优化可显著缩小隐私与非隐私图像分类的性能差距
