Finally, we show how the architecture can be used for specific laboratory experiments through case studies such as solubility screening and crystallisation. 自动化实验室实验有潜力推动新发现，同时提高可重复性并提高科学家在处理危险材料时的安全性。然而，许多自动化实验室工作流程尚未充分利用机器人和数字实验室设备的显着进步。因此，实验室中使用的大多数机器人系统都是专门针对单个实验进行编程的，通常依赖于专有架构或使用非常规硬件。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种专门为化学家设计的新型机器人系统架构来解决这个问题，该架构使科学家能够轻松地重新配置他们的设置以进行新的实验。具体来说，该系统的优势在于其能够将异构机器人平台与标准实验室设备结合起来，以创建不同的实验设置。最后，我们通过溶解度筛选和结晶等案例研究展示了如何将该架构用于特定的实验室实验。 本文提出一种名为ARChemist的自主机器人化学系统架构，旨在通过灵活整合异构机器人平台与标准实验室设备，实现化学实验的快速重新配置和自动化。 Hatem Fakhruldeen,Gabriella Pizzuto,Jakub Glowacki,Andrew Ian Cooper cs.RO

title: Learning First-Order Rules with Differentiable Logic Program Semantics
title_zh: 使用可微逻辑程序语义学习一阶规则
abstract: Learning first-order logic programs (LPs) from relational facts which yields intuitive insights into the data is a challenging topic in neuro-symbolic research. We introduce a novel differentiable inductive logic programming (ILP) model, called differentiable first-order rule learner (DFOL), which finds the correct LPs from relational facts by searching for the interpretable matrix representations of LPs. These interpretable matrices are deemed as trainable tensors in neural networks (NNs). The NNs are devised according to the differentiable semantics of LPs. Specifically, we first adopt a novel propositionalization method that transfers facts to NN-readable vector pairs representing interpretation pairs. We replace the immediate consequence operator with NN constraint functions consisting of algebraic operations and a sigmoid-like activation function. We map the symbolic forward-chained format of LPs into NN constraint functions consisting of operations between subsymbolic vector representations of atoms. By applying gradient descent, the trained well parameters of NNs can be decoded into precise symbolic LPs in forward-chained logic format. We demonstrate that DFOL can perform on several standard ILP datasets, knowledge bases, and probabilistic relation facts and outperform several well-known differentiable ILP models. Experimental results indicate that DFOL is a precise, robust, scalable, and computationally cheap differentiable ILP model.
summary: Learning first-order logic programs (LPs) from relational facts which yields intuitive insights into the data is a challenging topic in neuro-symbolic research. We introduce a novel differentiable inductive logic programming (ILP) model, called differentiable first-order rule learner (DFOL), which finds the correct LPs from relational facts by searching for the interpretable matrix representations of LPs. These interpretable matrices are deemed as trainable tensors in neural networks (NNs). The NNs are devised according to the differentiable semantics of LPs. Specifically, we first adopt a novel propositionalization method that transfers facts to NN-readable vector pairs representing interpretation pairs. We replace the immediate consequence operator with NN constraint functions consisting of algebraic operations and a sigmoid-like activation function. We map the symbolic forward-chained format of LPs into NN constraint functions consisting of operations between subsymbolic vector representations of atoms. By applying gradient descent, the trained well parameters of NNs can be decoded into precise symbolic LPs in forward-chained logic format. We demonstrate that DFOL can perform on several standard ILP datasets, knowledge bases, and probabilistic relation facts and outperform several well-known differentiable ILP models. Experimental results indicate that DFOL is a precise, robust, scalable, and computationally cheap differentiable ILP model.
abstract_zh: 从关系事实中学习一阶逻辑程序（LP），从而产生对数据的直观洞察，是神经符号研究中的一个具有挑战性的课题。我们引入了一种新颖的可微归纳逻辑编程（ILP）模型，称为可微一阶规则学习器（DFOL），它通过搜索 LP 的可解释矩阵表示来从关系事实中找到正确的 LP。这些可解释的矩阵被视为神经网络（NN）中的可训练张量。神经网络是根据线性规划的可微语义设计的。具体来说，我们首先采用一种新颖的命题化方法，将事实转移到代表解释对的神经网络可读向量对。我们用由代数运算和类 sigmoid 激活函数组成的 NN 约束函数替换直接结果运算符。我们将 LP 的符号前向链接格式映射到由原子的子符号向量表示之间的运算组成的 NN 约束函数。通过应用梯度下降，训练好的神经网络参数可以被解码为前向链式逻辑格式的精确符号 LP。我们证明 DFOL 可以在多个标准 ILP 数据集、知识库和概率关系事实上执行，并且优于多个众所周知的可微 ILP 模型。实验结果表明 DFOL 是一种精确、稳健、可扩展且计算成本低的可微 ILP 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可微分的归纳逻辑编程模型DFOL，通过将一阶逻辑程序转化为可训练张量，从关系事实中学习可解释的逻辑规则。
AI.motivation: 从关系事实中学习一阶逻辑程序（LP）是神经符号系统研究的难点，传统方法难以兼顾可解释性与计算效率，需探索新的可微分学习框架。
AI.method: 采用命题化方法将事实转换为向量对，用神经网络约束函数替代立即结果算子，通过梯度下降将张量参数解码为符号逻辑规则，实现符号与子符号表示的映射。
AI.result: DFOL在多个标准ILP数据集和知识库上表现优于现有模型，具有精确性高、鲁棒性强、可扩展且计算成本低的特点。
AI.conclusion: DFOL通过可微分语义建模成功解决了逻辑规则学习的挑战，为神经符号系统提供了高效且可解释的新方法。

title: Justice in Misinformation Detection Systems: An Analysis of Algorithms, Stakeholders, and Potential Harms
title_zh: 错误信息检测系统的正义：算法、利益相关者和潜在危害的分析
comment: Accepted at ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparenct (FAccT), 2022
comments: Accepted at ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparenct (FAccT), 2022
abstract: Faced with the scale and surge of misinformation on social media, many platforms and fact-checking organizations have turned to algorithms for automating key parts of misinformation detection pipelines. While offering a promising solution to the challenge of scale, the ethical and societal risks associated with algorithmic misinformation detection are not well-understood. In this paper, we employ and extend upon the notion of informational justice to develop a framework for explicating issues of justice relating to representation, participation, distribution of benefits and burdens, and credibility in the misinformation detection pipeline. Drawing on the framework: (1) we show how injustices materialize for stakeholders across three algorithmic stages in the pipeline; (2) we suggest empirical measures for assessing these injustices; and (3) we identify potential sources of these harms. This framework should help researchers, policymakers, and practitioners reason about potential harms or risks associated with these algorithms and provide conceptual guidance for the design of algorithmic fairness audits in this domain.
summary: Faced with the scale and surge of misinformation on social media, many platforms and fact-checking organizations have turned to algorithms for automating key parts of misinformation detection pipelines. While offering a promising solution to the challenge of scale, the ethical and societal risks associated with algorithmic misinformation detection are not well-understood. In this paper, we employ and extend upon the notion of informational justice to develop a framework for explicating issues of justice relating to representation, participation, distribution of benefits and burdens, and credibility in the misinformation detection pipeline. Drawing on the framework: (1) we show how injustices materialize for stakeholders across three algorithmic stages in the pipeline; (2) we suggest empirical measures for assessing these injustices; and (3) we identify potential sources of these harms. This framework should help researchers, policymakers, and practitioners reason about potential harms or risks associated with these algorithms and provide conceptual guidance for the design of algorithmic fairness audits in this domain.
abstract_zh: 面对社交媒体上错误信息的规模和激增，许多平台和事实核查组织已转向算法来自动化错误信息检测管道的关键部分。虽然为规模挑战提供了一个有希望的解决方案，但与算法错误信息检测相关的道德和社会风险尚不清楚。在本文中，我们采用并扩展了信息正义的概念，以开发一个框架来解释与代表性、参与、利益和负担分配以及错误信息检测管道中的可信度相关的正义问题。利用该框架：（1）我们展示了利益相关者如何在管道的三个算法阶段中实现不公正； (2) 我们建议评估这些不公正现象的实证措施； (3) 我们确定这些危害的潜在来源。该框架应帮助研究人员、政策制定者和从业者推理与这些算法相关的潜在危害或风险，并为该领域的算法公平性审计的设计提供概念指导。

AI.tldr: 本文通过扩展信息正义概念，构建了一个分析虚假信息检测算法中正义问题的框架，重点探讨了算法各阶段对利益相关者的不公现象及潜在危害。
AI.motivation: 社交平台和事实核查机构依赖算法应对虚假信息泛滥问题，但算法带来的伦理和社会风险尚未被充分理解，亟需系统性分析其正义性问题。
AI.method: 基于信息正义理论，从代表性、参与度、利益分配和可信度四个维度出发，结合算法流程的三个阶段（数据收集、模型训练、决策输出）进行框架构建与实证分析。
AI.result: 揭示了算法各阶段对不同利益相关者（如用户、事实核查者、平台）产生的具体不公表现，提出了可量化的评估指标，并识别了数据偏见、决策透明度缺失等危害根源。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为研究者、政策制定者和实践者提供了分析算法风险的理论工具，可指导设计针对虚假信息检测系统的算法公平性审计方案。

title: Tragedy Plus Time: Capturing Unintended Human Activities from Weakly-labeled Videos
title_zh: 悲剧加时间：从弱标签视频中捕获非预期的人类活动
abstract: In videos that contain actions performed unintentionally, agents do not achieve their desired goals. In such videos, it is challenging for computer vision systems to understand high-level concepts such as goal-directed behavior, an ability present in humans from a very early age. Inculcating this ability in artificially intelligent agents would make them better social learners by allowing them to evaluate human action under a teleological lens. To validate the ability of deep learning models to perform this task, we curate the W-Oops dataset, built upon the Oops dataset [15]. W-Oops consists of 2,100 unintentional human action videos, with 44 goal-directed and 30 unintentional video-level activity labels collected through human annotations. Due to the expensive segment annotation procedure, we propose a weakly supervised algorithm for localizing the goal-directed as well as unintentional temporal regions in the video leveraging solely video-level labels. In particular, we employ an attention mechanism-based strategy that predicts the temporal regions which contribute the most to a classification task. Meanwhile, our designed overlap regularization allows the model to focus on distinct portions of the video for inferring the goal-directed and unintentional activity while guaranteeing their temporal ordering. Extensive quantitative experiments verify the validity of our localization method. We further conduct a video captioning experiment which demonstrates that the proposed localization module does indeed assist teleological action understanding.
summary: In videos that contain actions performed unintentionally, agents do not achieve their desired goals. In such videos, it is challenging for computer vision systems to understand high-level concepts such as goal-directed behavior, an ability present in humans from a very early age. Inculcating this ability in artificially intelligent agents would make them better social learners by allowing them to evaluate human action under a teleological lens. To validate the ability of deep learning models to perform this task, we curate the W-Oops dataset, built upon the Oops dataset [15]. W-Oops consists of 2,100 unintentional human action videos, with 44 goal-directed and 30 unintentional video-level activity labels collected through human annotations. Due to the expensive segment annotation procedure, we propose a weakly supervised algorithm for localizing the goal-directed as well as unintentional temporal regions in the video leveraging solely video-level labels. In particular, we employ an attention mechanism-based strategy that predicts the temporal regions which contribute the most to a classification task. Meanwhile, our designed overlap regularization allows the model to focus on distinct portions of the video for inferring the goal-directed and unintentional activity while guaranteeing their temporal ordering. Extensive quantitative experiments verify the validity of our localization method. We further conduct a video captioning experiment which demonstrates that the proposed localization module does indeed assist teleological action understanding.
abstract_zh: 在包含无意执行的操作的视频中，代理无法实现其预期目标。在此类视频中，计算机视觉系统很难理解高级概念，例如目标导向行为，这是人类从很小的时候就存在的能力。在人工智能代理中灌输这种能力将使他们能够在目的论的视角下评估人类行为，从而使他们成为更好的社会学习者。为了验证深度学习模型执行此任务的能力，我们整理了基于 Oops 数据集构建的 W-Oops 数据集 [15]。 W-Oops 包含 2,100 个无意识的人类动作视频，其中有 44 个目标导向的和 30 个通过人工注释收集的无意识视频级活动标签。由于昂贵的片段注释过程，我们提出了一种弱监督算法，用于仅利用视频级标签来定位视频中的目标导向和无意的时间区域。特别是，我们采用基于注意力机制的策略来预测对分类任务贡献最大的时间区域。同时，我们设计的重叠正则化允许模型专注于视频的不同部分，以推断目标导向和无意的活动，同时保证它们的时间顺序。大量的定量实验验证了我们的定位方法的有效性。我们进一步进行了视频字幕实验，证明所提出的定位模块确实有助于目的动作理解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督方法，从弱标注视频中定位人类非故意行为与目标导向行为的时间区域。
AI.motivation: 人类能自然区分目标导向行为与非故意行为，而AI系统在此任务上表现不足，需提升其社会学习能力。
AI.method: 基于注意力机制预测关键时间区域，并设计重叠正则化约束保证时序关系，仅使用视频级标签进行弱监督学习。
AI.result: 定量实验验证定位方法有效性，视频字幕实验表明该模块确实提升目标导向行为理解能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效捕捉非故意行为时空特征，为AI理解人类行为提供新视角。

title: Generic Dijkstra
title_zh: 通用 Dijkstra
comment: An extended version for a journal submission
comments: An extended version for a journal submission
abstract: The recently-proposed generic Dijkstra algorithm finds shortest paths in networks with continuous and contiguous resources. While the algorithm was proposed in the context of optical networks (and is applicable to other networks with finite and discrete resources), we present the stated problem in a broader algorithmic setting of the greedy approach. The algorithm was published without a proof of correctness, and with a minor shortcoming. We provide that missing proof and offer a correction to the shortcoming. To prove the algorithm correct, we generalize the greedy approach and the Bellman principle of optimality to algebraic structures with a partial ordering. By analyzing the size of the search space in the worst-case, we argue the stated problem is tractable. Thus we definitely answer a long-standing fundamental question of whether we can efficiently find a shortest path in a network with discrete resources subject to the continuity and contiguity constraints: yes, we can.
summary: The recently-proposed generic Dijkstra algorithm finds shortest paths in networks with continuous and contiguous resources. While the algorithm was proposed in the context of optical networks (and is applicable to other networks with finite and discrete resources), we present the stated problem in a broader algorithmic setting of the greedy approach. The algorithm was published without a proof of correctness, and with a minor shortcoming. We provide that missing proof and offer a correction to the shortcoming. To prove the algorithm correct, we generalize the greedy approach and the Bellman principle of optimality to algebraic structures with a partial ordering. By analyzing the size of the search space in the worst-case, we argue the stated problem is tractable. Thus we definitely answer a long-standing fundamental question of whether we can efficiently find a shortest path in a network with discrete resources subject to the continuity and contiguity constraints: yes, we can.
abstract_zh: 最近提出的通用 Dijkstra 算法可以在具有连续和连续资源的网络中找到最短路径。虽然该算法是在光网络的背景下提出的（并且适用于具有有限和离散资源的其他网络），但我们在贪婪方法的更广泛的算法设置中提出了上述问题。该算法在没有正确性证明的情况下发布，并且有一个小缺点。我们提供缺失的证据并纠正缺陷。为了证明算法的正确性，我们将贪婪方法和贝尔曼最优原理推广到具有偏序的代数结构。通过分析最坏情况下搜索空间的大小，我们认为上述问题是可以解决的。因此，我们肯定回答了一个长期存在的基本问题，即我们是否可以在具有离散资源且受到连续性和邻接性约束的网络中有效地找到最短路径：是的，我们可以。

AI.tldr: 提出并修正通用Dijkstra算法，用于在具有连续和连续资源的网络中高效寻找最短路径，并证明其正确性。
AI.motivation: 原算法缺乏正确性证明且存在缺陷，需填补空白并验证在离散资源网络中满足连续性约束的最短路径问题是否可高效解决。
AI.method: 通过将贪心算法与Bellman最优性原理推广至带偏序的代数结构，并分析最坏情况下的搜索空间规模。
AI.result: 补充了正确性证明，修正了算法缺陷，论证了问题的可处理性，并确认可高效找到满足约束的最短路径。
AI.conclusion: 修正后的通用Dijkstra算法正确有效，能够在满足连续性和连续性约束的离散资源网络中高效求解最短路径问题。

authors_text: Andrew MacFarlane,Marisela Gutierrez-Lopez,Stephann Makri,Tim Atwell,Sondess Missaoui,Colin Porlezza,Glenda Cooper
title: DMINR: A Tool to Support Journalists Information Verification and Exploration
title_zh: DMINR：支持记者信息验证和探索的工具
abstract: Journalists are key information workers who have specific requirements from information systems to support the verification and exploration of information. We overview the DMINR tool that has been designed and developed to meet the needs of journalists through the examination of journalists information behaviour in a newsroom. We outline our co-design process as well as the design, implementation and deployment of the tool. We report a usability test on the tool and conclude with details of how to develop the tool further
summary: Journalists are key information workers who have specific requirements from information systems to support the verification and exploration of information. We overview the DMINR tool that has been designed and developed to meet the needs of journalists through the examination of journalists information behaviour in a newsroom. We outline our co-design process as well as the design, implementation and deployment of the tool. We report a usability test on the tool and conclude with details of how to develop the tool further
abstract_zh: 记者是关键的信息工作者，对信息系统有特定的要求来支持信息的验证和探索。我们概述了 DMINR 工具，该工具是为了通过检查新闻编辑室中记者的信息行为来满足记者的需求而设计和开发的。我们概述了我们的协同设计流程以及该工具的设计、实施和部署。我们报告了该工具的可用性测试，并详细介绍了如何进一步开发该工具

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了DMINR工具的设计与开发，旨在支持记者的信息验证与探索需求。
AI.motivation: 记者需要高效的信息系统来验证和探索信息，现有工具难以满足其特定需求，需开发专用工具提升工作效率与准确性。
AI.method: 通过研究新闻编辑室记者的信息行为，采用共设计方法完成工具设计、实现与部署，并进行可用性测试以验证效果。
AI.result: 工具的可用性测试结果验证了DMINR在支持记者信息验证与探索中的有效性，但需进一步优化功能与扩展应用场景。
AI.conclusion: DMINR为记者提供了实用的信息验证工具，后续研究应聚焦功能迭代与更广泛的实际应用测试。

ai_content.tldr: 本文介绍了DMINR工具的设计与开发，旨在支持记者的信息验证与探索需求。
ai_content.motivation: 记者需要高效的信息系统来验证和探索信息，现有工具难以满足其特定需求，需开发专用工具提升工作效率与准确性。
ai_content.method: 通过研究新闻编辑室记者的信息行为，采用共设计方法完成工具设计、实现与部署，并进行可用性测试以验证效果。

search_text: DMINR: A Tool to Support Journalists Information Verification and Exploration DMINR：支持记者信息验证和探索的工具 Journalists are key information workers who have specific requirements from information systems to support the verification and exploration of information. We overview the DMINR tool that has been designed and developed to meet the needs of journalists through the examination of journalists information behaviour in a newsroom. We outline our co-design process as well as the design, implementation and deployment of the tool. We report a usability test on the tool and conclude with details of how to develop the tool further 记者是关键的信息工作者，对信息系统有特定的要求来支持信息的验证和探索。我们概述了 DMINR 工具，该工具是为了通过检查新闻编辑室中记者的信息行为来满足记者的需求而设计和开发的。我们概述了我们的协同设计流程以及该工具的设计、实施和部署。我们报告了该工具的可用性测试，并详细介绍了如何进一步开发该工具 本文介绍了DMINR工具的设计与开发，旨在支持记者的信息验证与探索需求。 Andrew MacFarlane,Marisela Gutierrez-Lopez,Stephann Makri,Tim Atwell,Sondess Missaoui,Colin Porlezza,Glenda Cooper cs.HC

title: Exploiting Null Space in Aerial Manipulation through Model-In-The-Loop Motion Planning
title_zh: 通过模型在环运动规划在空中操纵中利用零空间
abstract: This paper presents a method for aerial manipulator end-effector trajectory tracking by encompassing dynamics of the Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) and null space of the manipulator attached to it in the motion planning procedure. The proposed method runs in phases. Trajectory planning starts by not accounting for roll and pitch angles of the underactuated UAV system. Next, we propose simulating the dynamics on such a trajectory and obtaining UAV attitude through the model. The full aerial manipulator state obtained in such a manner is further utilized to account for discrepancies in planned and simulated end-effector states. Finally, the end-effector pose is corrected through the null space of the manipulator to match the desired end-effector pose obtained in trajectory planning. Furthermore, we have applied the TOPP-RA approach on the UAV by invoking the differential flatness principle. Finally, we conducted experimental tests to verify effectiveness of the planning framework.
summary: This paper presents a method for aerial manipulator end-effector trajectory tracking by encompassing dynamics of the Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) and null space of the manipulator attached to it in the motion planning procedure. The proposed method runs in phases. Trajectory planning starts by not accounting for roll and pitch angles of the underactuated UAV system. Next, we propose simulating the dynamics on such a trajectory and obtaining UAV attitude through the model. The full aerial manipulator state obtained in such a manner is further utilized to account for discrepancies in planned and simulated end-effector states. Finally, the end-effector pose is corrected through the null space of the manipulator to match the desired end-effector pose obtained in trajectory planning. Furthermore, we have applied the TOPP-RA approach on the UAV by invoking the differential flatness principle. Finally, we conducted experimental tests to verify effectiveness of the planning framework.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种通过在运动规划过程中包含无人机（UAV）的动力学和附着在其上的机械手的零空间来进行空中机械手末端执行器轨迹跟踪的方法。所提出的方法分阶段运行。轨迹规划首先不考虑欠驱动无人机系统的横滚角和俯仰角。接下来，我们建议模拟该轨迹的动力学并通过模型获得无人机姿态。以这种方式获得的完整空中操纵器状态被进一步利用来解决计划的和模拟的末端执行器状态的差异。最后，通过机械臂的零空间校正末端执行器位姿，以匹配轨迹规划中获得的所需末端执行器位姿。此外，我们通过调用微分平坦度原理将 TOPP-RA 方法应用于无人机。最后，我们进行了实验测试来验证规划框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合无人机动力学与机械臂零空间的运动规划方法，以提高空中机械臂末端执行器的轨迹跟踪精度。
AI.motivation: 传统空中机械臂控制方法未充分考虑无人机动力学特性与机械臂零空间的协同作用，导致轨迹跟踪精度不足。
AI.method: 分阶段规划：1) 忽略无人机滚转/俯仰角进行初步轨迹规划；2) 模拟动力学获取无人机姿态；3) 利用零空间校正末端执行器位姿；4) 应用TOPP-RA与微分平坦性原理优化轨迹。
AI.result: 实验验证了该框架能有效提升轨迹跟踪精度，减少末端执行器与规划轨迹的偏差。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合无人机动力学模型与机械臂零空间，提出的方法显著提升了空中机械臂操作的精度，为复杂环境下的自主操作提供了新思路。

title: Algorithmic QUBO Formulations for k-SAT and Hamiltonian Cycles
title_zh: k-SAT 和哈密顿循环的算法 QUBO 公式
abstract: Quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO) can be seen as a generic language for optimization problems. QUBOs attract particular attention since they can be solved with quantum hardware, like quantum annealers or quantum gate computers running QAOA. In this paper, we present two novel QUBO formulations for $k$-SAT and Hamiltonian Cycles that scale significantly better than existing approaches. For $k$-SAT we reduce the growth of the QUBO matrix from $O(k)$ to $O(log(k))$. For Hamiltonian Cycles the matrix no longer grows quadratically in the number of nodes, as currently, but linearly in the number of edges and logarithmically in the number of nodes. We present these two formulations not as mathematical expressions, as most QUBO formulations are, but as meta-algorithms that facilitate the design of more complex QUBO formulations and allow easy reuse in larger and more complex QUBO formulations.
summary: Quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO) can be seen as a generic language for optimization problems. QUBOs attract particular attention since they can be solved with quantum hardware, like quantum annealers or quantum gate computers running QAOA. In this paper, we present two novel QUBO formulations for $k$-SAT and Hamiltonian Cycles that scale significantly better than existing approaches. For $k$-SAT we reduce the growth of the QUBO matrix from $O(k)$ to $O(log(k))$. For Hamiltonian Cycles the matrix no longer grows quadratically in the number of nodes, as currently, but linearly in the number of edges and logarithmically in the number of nodes. We present these two formulations not as mathematical expressions, as most QUBO formulations are, but as meta-algorithms that facilitate the design of more complex QUBO formulations and allow easy reuse in larger and more complex QUBO formulations.
abstract_zh: 二次无约束二元优化（QUBO）可以被视为优化问题的通用语言。 QUBO 引起了特别关注，因为它们可以用量子硬件来解决，例如量子退火器或运行 QAOA 的量子门计算机。在本文中，我们提出了 $k$-SAT 和哈密顿循环的两种新颖的 QUBO 公式，其扩展性明显优于现有方法。对于 $k$-SAT，我们将 QUBO 矩阵的增长从 $O(k)$ 减少到 $O(log(k))$。对于哈密顿循环，矩阵不再像目前那样以节点数二次方增长，而是以边数线性增长、以节点数对数增长。我们不像大多数 QUBO 公式那样将这两个公式作为数学表达式来呈现，而是作为元算法来促进更复杂的 QUBO 公式的设计，并允许在更大、更复杂的 QUBO 公式中轻松重用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新型QUBO公式，用于解决k-SAT和哈密顿环问题，显著提升现有方法的可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 传统QUBO公式在处理k-SAT和哈密顿环问题时存在矩阵规模增长过快的问题，限制了其在量子计算中的应用效率。
AI.method: 设计两种元算法框架，将QUBO公式表示为可复用的结构，降低矩阵规模增长速率并支持复杂问题扩展。
AI.result: k-SAT的QUBO矩阵规模从O(k)降至O(log k)，哈密顿环的矩阵规模从节点数的二次方降至边数的线性与节点数的对数乘积。
AI.conclusion: 新公式通过优化规模增长特性提升了量子计算适用性，同时为复杂QUBO问题设计提供了可复用的元算法基础。

authors_text: Chris Munley,Wenchao Ma,Johannes E. Fröch,Quentin A. A. Tanguy,Elyas Bayati,Karl F. Böhringer,Zin Lin,Raphaël Pestourie,Steven G. Johnson,Arka Majumdar
title: Inverse-Designed Meta-Optics with Spectral-Spatial Engineered Response to Mimic Color Perception
title_zh: 逆向设计的元光学器件具有对模拟颜色感知的光谱空间工程响应
abstract: Meta-optics have rapidly become a major research field within the optics and photonics community, strongly driven by the seemingly limitless opportunities made possible by controlling optical wavefronts through interaction with arrays of sub-wavelength scatterers. As more and more modalities are explored, the design strategies to achieve desired functionalities become increasingly demanding, necessitating more advanced design techniques. Herein, the inverse-design approach is utilized to create a set of single-layer meta-optics that simultaneously focus light and shape the spectra of focused light without using any filters. Thus, both spatial and spectral properties of the meta-optics are optimized, resulting in spectra that mimic the color matching functions of the CIE 1931 XYZ color space, which links the distributions of wavelengths in light and the color perception of a human eye. Experimental demonstrations of these meta-optics show qualitative agreement with the theoretical predictions and help elucidate the focusing mechanism of these devices.
summary: Meta-optics have rapidly become a major research field within the optics and photonics community, strongly driven by the seemingly limitless opportunities made possible by controlling optical wavefronts through interaction with arrays of sub-wavelength scatterers. As more and more modalities are explored, the design strategies to achieve desired functionalities become increasingly demanding, necessitating more advanced design techniques. Herein, the inverse-design approach is utilized to create a set of single-layer meta-optics that simultaneously focus light and shape the spectra of focused light without using any filters. Thus, both spatial and spectral properties of the meta-optics are optimized, resulting in spectra that mimic the color matching functions of the CIE 1931 XYZ color space, which links the distributions of wavelengths in light and the color perception of a human eye. Experimental demonstrations of these meta-optics show qualitative agreement with the theoretical predictions and help elucidate the focusing mechanism of these devices.
abstract_zh: 元光学已迅速成为光学和光子学界的一个主要研究领域，这受到通过与亚波长散射体阵列相互作用控制光波前而带来的看似无限的机会的强烈推动。随着越来越多的模式被探索，实现所需功能的设计策略变得越来越要求，​​需要更先进的设计技术。在此，利用逆向设计方法创建一组单层超光学器件，无需使用任何滤光片即可同时聚焦光并塑造聚焦光的光谱。因此，元光学的空间和光谱特性都得到了优化，产生了模仿 CIE 1931 XYZ 颜色空间的颜色匹配功能的光谱，该颜色空间将光的波长分布和人眼的颜色感知联系起来。这些元光学的实验演示与理论预测定性一致，有助于阐明这些设备的聚焦机制。

AI.tldr: 本文通过逆向设计方法开发单层超构光学器件，同时控制光的空间聚焦与光谱特性以模拟人眼颜色感知。
AI.motivation: 传统光学设计难以同时精确调控光的空间分布与光谱特性，而无需滤光片的高效颜色感知光学器件具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 采用逆向设计优化超构光学器件的亚波长散射结构，使其光谱响应匹配CIE 1931 XYZ色匹配函数并实现空间聚焦。
AI.result: 实验验证了器件的光谱-空间协同调控能力，结果与理论预测一致，并揭示了其聚焦机制。
AI.conclusion: 逆向设计成功实现了超构光学器件的色觉模拟功能，为下一代光学显示与成像技术提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ruipeng Jia,Xingxing Zhang,Yanan Cao,Shi Wang,Zheng Lin,Furu Wei
title: Neural Label Search for Zero-Shot Multi-Lingual Extractive Summarization
title_zh: 用于零样本多语言提取摘要的神经标签搜索
abstract: In zero-shot multilingual extractive text summarization, a model is typically trained on English summarization dataset and then applied on summarization datasets of other languages. Given English gold summaries and documents, sentence-level labels for extractive summarization are usually generated using heuristics. However, these monolingual labels created on English datasets may not be optimal on datasets of other languages, for that there is the syntactic or semantic discrepancy between different languages. In this way, it is possible to translate the English dataset to other languages and obtain different sets of labels again using heuristics. To fully leverage the information of these different sets of labels, we propose NLSSum (Neural Label Search for Summarization), which jointly learns hierarchical weights for these different sets of labels together with our summarization model. We conduct multilingual zero-shot summarization experiments on MLSUM and WikiLingua datasets, and we achieve state-of-the-art results using both human and automatic evaluations across these two datasets.
summary: In zero-shot multilingual extractive text summarization, a model is typically trained on English summarization dataset and then applied on summarization datasets of other languages. Given English gold summaries and documents, sentence-level labels for extractive summarization are usually generated using heuristics. However, these monolingual labels created on English datasets may not be optimal on datasets of other languages, for that there is the syntactic or semantic discrepancy between different languages. In this way, it is possible to translate the English dataset to other languages and obtain different sets of labels again using heuristics. To fully leverage the information of these different sets of labels, we propose NLSSum (Neural Label Search for Summarization), which jointly learns hierarchical weights for these different sets of labels together with our summarization model. We conduct multilingual zero-shot summarization experiments on MLSUM and WikiLingua datasets, and we achieve state-of-the-art results using both human and automatic evaluations across these two datasets.
abstract_zh: 在零样本多语言提取文本摘要中，模型通常在英语摘要数据集上进行训练，然后应用于其他语言的摘要数据集。给定英语黄金摘要和文档，通常使用启发式方法生成用于提取摘要的句子级标签。然而，这些在英语数据集上创建的单语标签在其他语言的数据集上可能不是最佳的，因为不同语言之间存在句法或语义差异。通过这种方式，可以将英语数据集翻译成其他语言，并使用启发式方法再次获得不同的标签集。为了充分利用这些不同标签集的信息，我们提出了 NLSSum（神经标签搜索摘要），它与我们的摘要模型一起联合学习这些不同标签集的层次权重。我们在 MLSUM 和 WikiLingua 数据集上进行多语言零样本摘要实验，并使用这两个数据集的人工和自动评估获得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NLSSum方法，通过神经标签搜索解决零样本多语言抽取式摘要中标签不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在跨语言场景下依赖英语数据集生成的启发式标签，但不同语言间存在语法或语义差异导致标签不优。
AI.method: 设计NLSSum模型，联合学习多语言标签集的层次权重并与摘要模型共同训练。
AI.result: 在MLSUM和WikiLingua数据集上达到最先进水平，通过人类评估和自动指标验证效果。
AI.conclusion: 神经标签搜索能有效整合多语言标签信息，提升零样本多语言摘要性能。

However, these monolingual labels created on English datasets may not be optimal on datasets of other languages, for that there is the syntactic or semantic discrepancy between different languages. authors_text: Kangning Cui,Ruoning Li,Sam L. Polk,James M. Murphy,Robert J. Plemmons,Raymond H. Chan
title: Unsupervised Spatial-spectral Hyperspectral Image Reconstruction and Clustering with Diffusion Geometry
title_zh: 无监督空间光谱高光谱图像重建和扩散几何聚类
abstract: Hyperspectral images, which store a hundred or more spectral bands of reflectance, have become an important data source in natural and social sciences. Hyperspectral images are often generated in large quantities at a relatively coarse spatial resolution. As such, unsupervised machine learning algorithms incorporating known structure in hyperspectral imagery are needed to analyze these images automatically. This work introduces the Spatial-Spectral Image Reconstruction and Clustering with Diffusion Geometry (DSIRC) algorithm for partitioning highly mixed hyperspectral images. DSIRC reduces measurement noise through a shape-adaptive reconstruction procedure. In particular, for each pixel, DSIRC locates spectrally correlated pixels within a data-adaptive spatial neighborhood and reconstructs that pixel's spectral signature using those of its neighbors. DSIRC then locates high-density, high-purity pixels far in diffusion distance (a data-dependent distance metric) from other high-density, high-purity pixels and treats these as cluster exemplars, giving each a unique label. Non-modal pixels are assigned the label of their diffusion distance-nearest neighbor of higher density and purity that is already labeled. Strong numerical results indicate that incorporating spatial information through image reconstruction substantially improves the performance of pixel-wise clustering.
summary: Hyperspectral images, which store a hundred or more spectral bands of reflectance, have become an important data source in natural and social sciences. Hyperspectral images are often generated in large quantities at a relatively coarse spatial resolution. As such, unsupervised machine learning algorithms incorporating known structure in hyperspectral imagery are needed to analyze these images automatically. This work introduces the Spatial-Spectral Image Reconstruction and Clustering with Diffusion Geometry (DSIRC) algorithm for partitioning highly mixed hyperspectral images. DSIRC reduces measurement noise through a shape-adaptive reconstruction procedure. In particular, for each pixel, DSIRC locates spectrally correlated pixels within a data-adaptive spatial neighborhood and reconstructs that pixel's spectral signature using those of its neighbors. DSIRC then locates high-density, high-purity pixels far in diffusion distance (a data-dependent distance metric) from other high-density, high-purity pixels and treats these as cluster exemplars, giving each a unique label. Non-modal pixels are assigned the label of their diffusion distance-nearest neighbor of higher density and purity that is already labeled. Strong numerical results indicate that incorporating spatial information through image reconstruction substantially improves the performance of pixel-wise clustering.
abstract_zh: 高光谱图像存储了一百个或更多反射光谱带，已成为自然科学和社会科学的重要数据源。高光谱图像通常以相对粗糙的空间分辨率大量生成。因此，需要结合高光谱图像中已知结构的无监督机器学习算法来自动分析这些图像。这项工作介绍了用于分割高度混合的高光谱图像的空间光谱图像重建和扩散几何聚类（DSIRC）算法。 DSIRC 通过形状自适应重建过程降低测量噪声。特别是，对于每个像素，DSIRC 在数据自适应空间邻域内定位光谱相关像素，并使用其邻居的光谱特征重建该像素的光谱特征。然后，DSIRC 定位距其他高密度、高纯度像素较远的扩散距离（数据相关距离度量）的高密度、高纯度像素，并将这些像素视为聚类样本，为每个样本赋予唯一的标签。非模态像素被分配其扩散距离的标签——已标记的更高密度和纯度的最近邻。强有力的数值结果表明，通过图像重建合并空间信息大大提高了像素级聚类的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散几何的无监督高光谱图像重建与聚类算法DSIRC，用于处理高度混合的高光谱图像。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像具有大量光谱波段但空间分辨率较低，需要结合图像结构的无监督算法进行自动分析。
AI.method: DSIRC通过形状自适应重建降低噪声，利用数据自适应空间邻域内的光谱相关像素重建单个像素的光谱特征，并通过扩散距离识别高密度高纯度像素作为聚类中心，再基于扩散距离最近邻分配标签。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，通过图像重建引入空间信息显著提升了像素级聚类性能。
AI.conclusion: DSIRC通过空间-光谱重建与扩散几何有效改进了高光谱图像的无监督聚类效果，为相关分析提供了新方法。

motivation: 高光谱图像具有大量光谱波段但空间分辨率较低，需要结合图像结构的无监督算法进行自动分析。
method: DSIRC通过形状自适应重建降低噪声，利用数据自适应空间邻域内的光谱相关像素重建单个像素的光谱特征，并通过扩散距离识别高密度高纯度像素作为聚类中心，再基于扩散距离最近邻分配标签。
result: 数值实验表明，通过图像重建引入空间信息显著提升了像素级聚类性能。
conclusion: DSIRC通过空间-光谱重建与扩散几何有效改进了高光谱图像的无监督聚类效果，为相关分析提供了新方法。
search_text: Unsupervised Spatial-spectral Hyperspectral Image Reconstruction and Clustering with Diffusion Geometry 无监督空间光谱高光谱图像重建和扩散几何聚类 Hyperspectral images, which store a hundred or more spectral bands of reflectance, have become an important data source in natural and social sciences. Hyperspectral images are often generated in large quantities at a relatively coarse spatial resolution. As such, unsupervised machine learning algorithms incorporating known structure in hyperspectral imagery are needed to analyze these images automatically. This work introduces the Spatial-Spectral Image Reconstruction and Clustering with Diffusion Geometry (DSIRC) algorithm for partitioning highly mixed hyperspectral images. DSIRC reduces measurement noise through a shape-adaptive reconstruction procedure. In particular, for each pixel, DSIRC locates spectrally correlated pixels within a data-adaptive spatial neighborhood and reconstructs that pixel's spectral signature using those of its neighbors. DSIRC then locates high-density, high-purity pixels far in diffusion distance (a data-dependent distance metric) from other high-density, high-purity pixels and treats these as cluster exemplars, giving each a unique label. Non-modal pixels are assigned the label of their diffusion distance-nearest neighbor of higher density and purity that is already labeled. Strong numerical results indicate that incorporating spatial information through image reconstruction substantially improves the performance of pixel-wise clustering. 高光谱图像存储了一百个或更多反射光谱带，已成为自然科学和社会科学的重要数据源。高光谱图像通常以相对粗糙的空间分辨率大量生成。因此，需要结合高光谱图像中已知结构的无监督机器学习算法来自动分析这些图像。这项工作介绍了用于分割高度混合的高光谱图像的空间光谱图像重建和扩散几何聚类（DSIRC）算法。 DSIRC 通过形状自适应重建过程降低测量噪声。特别是，对于每个像素，DSIRC 在数据自适应空间邻域内定位光谱相关像素，并使用其邻居的光谱特征重建该像素的光谱特征。然后，DSIRC 定位距其他高密度、高纯度像素较远的扩散距离（数据相关距离度量）的高密度、高纯度像素，并将这些像素视为聚类样本，为每个样本赋予唯一的标签。非模态像素被分配其扩散距离的标签——已标记的更高密度和纯度的最近邻。强有力的数值结果表明，通过图像重建合并空间信息大大提高了像素级聚类的性能。 本文提出了一种基于扩散几何的无监督高光谱图像重建与聚类算法DSIRC，用于处理高度混合的高光谱图像。 Kangning Cui,Ruoning Li,Sam L. Polk,James M. Murphy,Robert J. Plemmons,Raymond H. Chan cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.AP

title: A Spiral into the Mind: Gaze Spiral Visualization for Mobile Eye Tracking
title_zh: 心灵的螺旋：移动眼动追踪的凝视螺旋可视化
comment: To be published in ACM Symposium of Eye Tracking Research & Applications (ETRA), 2022
comments: To be published in ACM Symposium of Eye Tracking Research & Applications (ETRA), 2022
abstract: Comparing mobile eye tracking data from multiple participants without information about areas of interest (AOIs) is challenging because of individual timing and coordinate systems. We present a technique, the gaze spiral, that visualizes individual recordings based on image content of the stimulus. The spiral layout of the slitscan visualization is used to create a compact representation of scanpaths. The visualization provides an overview of multiple recordings even for long time spans and helps identify and annotate recurring patterns within recordings. The gaze spirals can also serve as glyphs that can be projected to 2D space based on established scanpath metrics in order to interpret the metrics and identify groups of similar viewing behavior. We present examples based on two egocentric datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for annotation and comparison tasks. Our examples show that the technique has the potential to let users compare even long-term recordings of pervasive scenarios without manual annotation.
summary: Comparing mobile eye tracking data from multiple participants without information about areas of interest (AOIs) is challenging because of individual timing and coordinate systems. We present a technique, the gaze spiral, that visualizes individual recordings based on image content of the stimulus. The spiral layout of the slitscan visualization is used to create a compact representation of scanpaths. The visualization provides an overview of multiple recordings even for long time spans and helps identify and annotate recurring patterns within recordings. The gaze spirals can also serve as glyphs that can be projected to 2D space based on established scanpath metrics in order to interpret the metrics and identify groups of similar viewing behavior. We present examples based on two egocentric datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for annotation and comparison tasks. Our examples show that the technique has the potential to let users compare even long-term recordings of pervasive scenarios without manual annotation.
abstract_zh: 由于各个时间和坐标系统的不同，在没有感兴趣区域 (AOI) 信息的情况下比较多个参与者的移动眼动追踪数据具有挑战性。我们提出了一种技术，即凝视螺旋，它可以根据刺激的图像内容可视化个人记录。狭缝扫描可视化的螺旋布局用于创建扫描路径的紧凑表示。可视化提供了多个录音的概述，甚至是长时间跨度的录音，并有助于识别和注释录音中重复出现的模式。凝视螺旋还可以用作字形，可以根据已建立的扫描路径度量投影到 2D 空间，以便解释度量并识别相似观看行为的组。我们提供基于两个以自我为中心的数据集的示例，以证明我们的注释和比较任务方法的有效性。我们的示例表明，该技术有潜力让用户无需手动注释即可比较普遍场景的长期记录。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'凝视螺旋'的可视化技术，用于处理移动眼动追踪数据，以解决多参与者数据比较和标注的难题。
AI.motivation: 在没有兴趣区域（AOIs）信息的情况下，比较多个参与者的移动眼动数据因个体时间差异和坐标系统不同而困难。
AI.method: 通过螺旋布局的条形扫描可视化（slitscan visualization）生成基于刺激图像内容的个体记录紧凑表示，并将凝视螺旋作为基于扫描路径指标的二维投影符号。
AI.result: 基于两个自拍视角数据集的示例表明，该方法能有效支持注释和比较任务，使用户无需手动标注即可比较长期场景记录。
AI.conclusion: 凝视螺旋技术为多参与者眼动数据的可视化分析提供了新方法，有助于发现重复模式并识别相似观看行为群体。

authors_text: Abhishek Sharma,Marcus Tze-Kiat Ng,Juan Manuel Parrilla Gutierrez,Yibin Jiang,Leroy Cronin
title: A Probabilistic Chemical Programmable Computer
title_zh: 概率化学可编程计算机
comment: 20 page manuscript, 6 figures, 112 page supplementary volume
comments: 20 page manuscript, 6 figures, 112 page supplementary volume
abstract: The exponential growth of the power of modern digital computers is based upon the miniaturisation of vast nanoscale arrays of electronic switches, but this will be eventually constrained by fabrication limits and power dissipation. Chemical processes have the potential to scale beyond these limits performing computations through chemical reactions, yet the lack of well-defined programmability limits their scalability and performance. We present a hybrid digitally programmable chemical array as a probabilistic computational machine that uses chemical oscillators partitioned in interconnected cells as a computational substrate. This hybrid architecture performs efficient computation by distributing between chemical and digital domains together with error correction. The efficiency is gained by combining digital with probabilistic chemical logic based on nearest neighbour interactions and hysteresis effects. We demonstrated the implementation of one- and two- dimensional Chemical Cellular Automata and solutions to combinatorial optimization problems.
summary: The exponential growth of the power of modern digital computers is based upon the miniaturisation of vast nanoscale arrays of electronic switches, but this will be eventually constrained by fabrication limits and power dissipation. Chemical processes have the potential to scale beyond these limits performing computations through chemical reactions, yet the lack of well-defined programmability limits their scalability and performance. We present a hybrid digitally programmable chemical array as a probabilistic computational machine that uses chemical oscillators partitioned in interconnected cells as a computational substrate. This hybrid architecture performs efficient computation by distributing between chemical and digital domains together with error correction. The efficiency is gained by combining digital with probabilistic chemical logic based on nearest neighbour interactions and hysteresis effects. We demonstrated the implementation of one- and two- dimensional Chemical Cellular Automata and solutions to combinatorial optimization problems.
abstract_zh: 现代数字计算机能力的指数级增长是基于电子开关的巨大纳米级阵列的小型化，但这最终将受到制造限制和功耗的限制。化学过程有可能超越这些通过化学反应执行计算的限制，但缺乏明确定义的可编程性限制了它们的可扩展性和性能。我们提出了一种混合数字可编程化学阵列作为概率计算机器，它使用划分在互连单元中的化学振荡器作为计算基底。这种混合架构通过在化学域和数字域之间分配以及纠错来执行高效计算。通过将数字与基于最近邻相互作用和滞后效应的概率化学逻辑相结合，可以提高效率。我们演示了一维和二维化学元胞自动机的实现以及组合优化问题的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合数字可编程化学阵列，通过化学振荡器与数字域结合实现概率计算。
AI.motivation: 传统数字计算机受限于微型化与功耗，而化学计算缺乏明确可编程性，需探索新型计算架构突破限制。
AI.method: 采用分区互联的化学振荡器作为计算基质，结合数字域实现误差校正，利用邻近相互作用与滞后效应构建概率逻辑。
AI.result: 成功实现一维/二维化学细胞自动机，并应用于组合优化问题求解。
AI.conclusion: 该混合架构通过化学与数字协同计算，在效率与可扩展性上展现潜力，为未来计算模式提供新方向。

authors_text: Can Ufuk Ertenli,Ramazan Gokberk Cinbis,Emre Akbas
title: Representation Recycling for Streaming Video Analysis
title_zh: 流视频分析的表示回收
comment: v3: ECCV2022 paper. This version: extended version under review at TPAMI
comments: v3: ECCV2022 paper. This version: extended version under review at TPAMI
abstract: We present StreamDEQ, a method that aims to infer frame-wise representations on videos with minimal per-frame computation. Conventional deep networks do feature extraction from scratch at each frame in the absence of ad-hoc solutions. We instead aim to build streaming recognition models that can natively exploit temporal smoothness between consecutive video frames. We observe that the recently emerging implicit layer models provide a convenient foundation to construct such models, as they define representations as the fixed-points of shallow networks, which need to be estimated using iterative methods. Our main insight is to distribute the inference iterations over the temporal axis by using the most recent representation as a starting point at each frame. This scheme effectively recycles the recent inference computations and greatly reduces the needed processing time. Through extensive experimental analysis, we show that StreamDEQ is able to recover near-optimal representations in a few frames' time and maintain an up-to-date representation throughout the video duration. Our experiments on video semantic segmentation, video object detection, and human pose estimation in videos show that StreamDEQ achieves on-par accuracy with the baseline while being more than 2-4x faster.
summary: We present StreamDEQ, a method that aims to infer frame-wise representations on videos with minimal per-frame computation. Conventional deep networks do feature extraction from scratch at each frame in the absence of ad-hoc solutions. We instead aim to build streaming recognition models that can natively exploit temporal smoothness between consecutive video frames. We observe that the recently emerging implicit layer models provide a convenient foundation to construct such models, as they define representations as the fixed-points of shallow networks, which need to be estimated using iterative methods. Our main insight is to distribute the inference iterations over the temporal axis by using the most recent representation as a starting point at each frame. This scheme effectively recycles the recent inference computations and greatly reduces the needed processing time. Through extensive experimental analysis, we show that StreamDEQ is able to recover near-optimal representations in a few frames' time and maintain an up-to-date representation throughout the video duration. Our experiments on video semantic segmentation, video object detection, and human pose estimation in videos show that StreamDEQ achieves on-par accuracy with the baseline while being more than 2-4x faster.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 StreamDEQ，一种旨在以最少的每帧计算推断视频上的逐帧表示的方法。在缺乏临时解决方案的情况下，传统的深度网络在每一帧上从头开始进行特征提取。相反，我们的目标是构建可以本地利用连续视频帧之间的时间平滑性的流识别模型。我们观察到，最近出现的隐式层模型为构建此类模型提供了便利的基础，因为它们将表示定义为浅层网络的不动点，需要使用迭代方法进行估计。我们的主要见解是通过使用最新的表示作为每帧的起点，在时间轴上分布推理迭代。该方案有效地回收了最近的推理计算，并大大减少了所需的处理时间。通过广泛的实验分析，我们表明 StreamDEQ 能够在几帧时间内恢复接近最佳的表示，并在整个视频持续时间内保持最新的表示。我们对视频语义分割、视频对象检测和视频中人体姿势估计的实验表明，StreamDEQ 实现了与基线相当的准确度，同时速度提高了 2-4 倍以上。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为StreamDEQ的流式视频分析方法，通过重用先前计算减少每帧的计算量，实现高效视频表示学习。
AI.motivation: 传统深度网络在处理视频时每帧独立计算，导致高计算开销。利用视频帧间的时间平滑性，可减少冗余计算，提高效率。
AI.method: 基于隐式层模型，将推理迭代分布在时间轴上，利用前一帧的表示作为当前帧的初始估计，实现计算重用。
AI.result: 在视频语义分割、目标检测和姿态估计任务中，StreamDEQ的准确率与基线相当，但处理速度提升2-4倍。
AI.conclusion: StreamDEQ通过时间轴上的计算重用，有效降低了视频分析的计算成本，同时保持了模型性能，适用于实时视频处理场景。

search_text: Representation Recycling for Streaming Video Analysis 流视频分析的表示回收 We present StreamDEQ, a method that aims to infer frame-wise representations on videos with minimal per-frame computation. Conventional deep networks do feature extraction from scratch at each frame in the absence of ad-hoc solutions. We instead aim to build streaming recognition models that can natively exploit temporal smoothness between consecutive video frames. We observe that the recently emerging implicit layer models provide a convenient foundation to construct such models, as they define representations as the fixed-points of shallow networks, which need to be estimated using iterative methods. Our main insight is to distribute the inference iterations over the temporal axis by using the most recent representation as a starting point at each frame. This scheme effectively recycles the recent inference computations and greatly reduces the needed processing time. Through extensive experimental analysis, we show that StreamDEQ is able to recover near-optimal representations in a few frames' time and maintain an up-to-date representation throughout the video duration. Our experiments on video semantic segmentation, video object detection, and human pose estimation in videos show that StreamDEQ achieves on-par accuracy with the baseline while being more than 2-4x faster. 我们提出了 StreamDEQ，一种旨在以最少的每帧计算推断视频上的逐帧表示的方法。在缺乏临时解决方案的情况下，传统的深度网络在每一帧上从头开始进行特征提取。相反，我们的目标是构建可以本地利用连续视频帧之间的时间平滑性的流识别模型。我们观察到，最近出现的隐式层模型为构建此类模型提供了便利的基础，因为它们将表示定义为浅层网络的不动点，需要使用迭代方法进行估计。我们的主要见解是通过使用最新的表示作为每帧的起点，在时间轴上分布推理迭代。该方案有效地回收了最近的推理计算，并大大减少了所需的处理时间。通过广泛的实验分析，我们表明 StreamDEQ 能够在几帧时间内恢复接近最佳的表示，并在整个视频持续时间内保持最新的表示。我们对视频语义分割、视频对象检测和视频中人体姿势估计的实验表明，StreamDEQ 实现了与基线相当的准确度，同时速度提高了 2-4 倍以上。 提出一种名为StreamDEQ的流式视频分析方法，通过重用先前计算减少每帧的计算量，实现高效视频表示学习。 Can Ufuk Ertenli,Ramazan Gokberk Cinbis,Emre Akbas cs.CV

authors_text: Lianqing Zheng,Zhixiong Ma,Xichan Zhu,Bin Tan,Sen Li,Kai Long,Weiqi Sun,Sihan Chen,Lu Zhang,Mengyue Wan,Libo Huang,Jie Bai
title: TJ4DRadSet: A 4D Radar Dataset for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: TJ4DRadSet：用于自动驾驶的 4D 雷达数据集
comment: 2022 IEEE International Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference (ITSC 2022)
comments: 2022 IEEE International Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference (ITSC 2022)
abstract: The next-generation high-resolution automotive radar (4D radar) can provide additional elevation measurement and denser point clouds, which has great potential for 3D sensing in autonomous driving. In this paper, we introduce a dataset named TJ4DRadSet with 4D radar points for autonomous driving research. The dataset was collected in various driving scenarios, with a total of 7757 synchronized frames in 44 consecutive sequences, which are well annotated with 3D bounding boxes and track ids. We provide a 4D radar-based 3D object detection baseline for our dataset to demonstrate the effectiveness of deep learning methods for 4D radar point clouds. The dataset can be accessed via the following link: https://github.com/TJRadarLab/TJ4DRadSet.
summary: The next-generation high-resolution automotive radar (4D radar) can provide additional elevation measurement and denser point clouds, which has great potential for 3D sensing in autonomous driving. In this paper, we introduce a dataset named TJ4DRadSet with 4D radar points for autonomous driving research. The dataset was collected in various driving scenarios, with a total of 7757 synchronized frames in 44 consecutive sequences, which are well annotated with 3D bounding boxes and track ids. We provide a 4D radar-based 3D object detection baseline for our dataset to demonstrate the effectiveness of deep learning methods for 4D radar point clouds. The dataset can be accessed via the following link: https://github.com/TJRadarLab/TJ4DRadSet.
abstract_zh: 下一代高分辨率汽车雷达（4D雷达）可以提供额外的高程测量和更密集的点云，这在自动驾驶中的3D传感具有巨大潜力。在本文中，我们介绍了一个名为 TJ4DRadSet 的数据集，其中包含 4D 雷达点，用于自动驾驶研究。该数据集是在各种驾驶场景下收集的，44 个连续序列中总共有 7757 个同步帧，并用 3D 边界框和轨迹 ID 进行了很好的注释。我们为数据集提供基于 4D 雷达的 3D 对象检测基线，以证明 4D 雷达点云深度学习方法的有效性。可以通过以下链接访问该数据集：https://github.com/TJRadarLab/TJ4DRadSet。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个用于自动驾驶的4D雷达点云数据集TJ4DRadSet，并提供了基于该数据集的3D目标检测基线方法。
AI.motivation: 传统雷达缺乏高度信息，而4D雷达能提供更密集的点云和高度测量，有助于提升自动驾驶系统的3D感知能力，但缺乏相应的高质量数据集。
AI.method: 通过多场景采集获得7757帧同步4D雷达点云数据，包含44个连续序列，标注3D边界框和跟踪ID，并构建基于深度学习的3D目标检测基线模型。
AI.result: 公开了包含丰富标注信息的4D雷达数据集，并验证了深度学习方法在4D雷达点云目标检测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TJ4DRadSet为自动驾驶领域提供了重要的4D雷达数据支持，可促进基于4D雷达的感知算法研究与应用。

authors_text: Michaela Benk,Suzanne Tolmeijer,Florian von Wangenheim,Andrea Ferrario
title: The Value of Measuring Trust in AI - A Socio-Technical System Perspective
title_zh: 衡量人工智能信任的价值——社会技术系统视角
comment: Accepted at CHI 2022 - Workshop on Trust and Reliance in AI-Human Teams (TRAIT), 2022, New Orleans, LA
comments: Accepted at CHI 2022 - Workshop on Trust and Reliance in AI-Human Teams (TRAIT), 2022, New Orleans, LA
abstract: Building trust in AI-based systems is deemed critical for their adoption and appropriate use. Recent research has thus attempted to evaluate how various attributes of these systems affect user trust. However, limitations regarding the definition and measurement of trust in AI have hampered progress in the field, leading to results that are inconsistent or difficult to compare. In this work, we provide an overview of the main limitations in defining and measuring trust in AI. We focus on the attempt of giving trust in AI a numerical value and its utility in informing the design of real-world human-AI interactions. Taking a socio-technical system perspective on AI, we explore two distinct approaches to tackle these challenges. We provide actionable recommendations on how these approaches can be implemented in practice and inform the design of human-AI interactions. We thereby aim to provide a starting point for researchers and designers to re-evaluate the current focus on trust in AI, improving the alignment between what empirical research paradigms may offer and the expectations of real-world human-AI interactions.
summary: Building trust in AI-based systems is deemed critical for their adoption and appropriate use. Recent research has thus attempted to evaluate how various attributes of these systems affect user trust. However, limitations regarding the definition and measurement of trust in AI have hampered progress in the field, leading to results that are inconsistent or difficult to compare. In this work, we provide an overview of the main limitations in defining and measuring trust in AI. We focus on the attempt of giving trust in AI a numerical value and its utility in informing the design of real-world human-AI interactions. Taking a socio-technical system perspective on AI, we explore two distinct approaches to tackle these challenges. We provide actionable recommendations on how these approaches can be implemented in practice and inform the design of human-AI interactions. We thereby aim to provide a starting point for researchers and designers to re-evaluate the current focus on trust in AI, improving the alignment between what empirical research paradigms may offer and the expectations of real-world human-AI interactions.
abstract_zh: 建立对基于人工智能的系统的信任对于其采用和适当使用至关重要。因此，最近的研究试图评估这些系统的各种属性如何影响用户信任。然而，人工智能信任的定义和衡量方面的局限性阻碍了该领域的进展，导致结果不一致或难以比较。在这项工作中，我们概述了定义和衡量人工智能信任的主要局限性。我们专注于尝试赋予人工智能信任一个数值，及其在现实世界中人类与人工智能交互设计中的效用。从社会技术系统的角度来看人工智能，我们探索了两种不同的方法来应对这些挑战。我们就如何在实践中实施这些方法提供可行的建议，并为人类与人工智能交互的设计提供信息。因此，我们的目标是为研究人员和设计师提供一个起点，以重新评估当前对人工智能信任的关注，改善实证研究范式可能提供的内容与现实世界中人类与人工智能交互的期望之间的一致性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨AI信任测量的局限性，并提出两种方法以改进现实世界中人机交互的设计。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在定义和测量AI信任方面存在局限性，导致结果不一致，需重新评估以提升人机交互设计的有效性。
AI.method: 通过社会技术系统视角，分析两种方法以解决AI信任测量中的挑战，并提供实施建议。
AI.result: 提出了可操作的实施建议，帮助改进人机交互设计，促进实证研究与实际应用的对齐。
AI.conclusion: 为研究人员和设计者提供起点，推动更有效的人机交互设计，提升AI系统的信任度。

search_text: The Value of Measuring Trust in AI - A Socio-Technical System Perspective 衡量人工智能信任的价值——社会技术系统视角 Building trust in AI-based systems is deemed critical for their adoption and appropriate use. Recent research has thus attempted to evaluate how various attributes of these systems affect user trust. However, limitations regarding the definition and measurement of trust in AI have hampered progress in the field, leading to results that are inconsistent or difficult to compare. In this work, we provide an overview of the main limitations in defining and measuring trust in AI. We focus on the attempt of giving trust in AI a numerical value and its utility in informing the design of real-world human-AI interactions. Taking a socio-technical system perspective on AI, we explore two distinct approaches to tackle these challenges. We provide actionable recommendations on how these approaches can be implemented in practice and inform the design of human-AI interactions. We thereby aim to provide a starting point for researchers and designers to re-evaluate the current focus on trust in AI, improving the alignment between what empirical research paradigms may offer and the expectations of real-world human-AI interactions. 建立对基于人工智能的系统的信任对于其采用和适当使用至关重要。因此，最近的研究试图评估这些系统的各种属性如何影响用户信任。然而，人工智能信任的定义和衡量方面的局限性阻碍了该领域的进展，导致结果不一致或难以比较。在这项工作中，我们概述了定义和衡量人工智能信任的主要局限性。我们专注于尝试赋予人工智能信任一个数值，及其在现实世界中人类与人工智能交互设计中的效用。从社会技术系统的角度来看人工智能，我们探索了两种不同的方法来应对这些挑战。我们就如何在实践中实施这些方法提供可行的建议，并为人类与人工智能交互的设计提供信息。因此，我们的目标是为研究人员和设计师提供一个起点，以重新评估当前对人工智能信任的关注，改善实证研究范式可能提供的内容与现实世界中人类与人工智能交互的期望之间的一致性。 本文旨在探讨AI信任测量的局限性，并提出两种方法以改进现实世界中人机交互的设计。 Michaela Benk,Suzanne Tolmeijer,Florian von Wangenheim,Andrea Ferrario cs.HC

title: Attention Based Neural Networks for Wireless Channel Estimation
title_zh: 用于无线信道估计的基于注意力的神经网络
abstract: In this paper, we deploy the self-attention mechanism to achieve improved channel estimation for orthogonal frequency-division multiplexing waveforms in the downlink. Specifically, we propose a new hybrid encoder-decoder structure (called HA02) for the first time which exploits the attention mechanism to focus on the most important input information. In particular, we implement a transformer encoder block as the encoder to achieve the sparsity in the input features and a residual neural network as the decoder respectively, inspired by the success of the attention mechanism. Using 3GPP channel models, our simulations show superior estimation performance compared with other candidate neural network methods for channel estimation.
summary: In this paper, we deploy the self-attention mechanism to achieve improved channel estimation for orthogonal frequency-division multiplexing waveforms in the downlink. Specifically, we propose a new hybrid encoder-decoder structure (called HA02) for the first time which exploits the attention mechanism to focus on the most important input information. In particular, we implement a transformer encoder block as the encoder to achieve the sparsity in the input features and a residual neural network as the decoder respectively, inspired by the success of the attention mechanism. Using 3GPP channel models, our simulations show superior estimation performance compared with other candidate neural network methods for channel estimation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们部署自注意力机制来改进下行链路中正交频分复用波形的信道估计。具体来说，我们首次提出了一种新的混合编码器-解码器结构（称为HA02），它利用注意力机制来关注最重要的输入信息。特别是，受到注意力机制成功的启发，我们分别实现了一个 Transformer 编码器块作为编码器，以实现输入特征的稀疏性，并分别实现了一个残差神经网络作为解码器。使用 3GPP 信道模型，我们的模拟显示出与其他候选神经网络信道估计方法相比具有优越的估计性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于自注意力机制的神经网络结构HA02，用于改进正交频分复用（OFDM）波形的下行链路无线信道估计。
AI.motivation: 传统信道估计方法在复杂信道环境下性能受限，而注意力机制能有效捕捉输入特征中的关键信息，从而提升估计精度。
AI.method: 设计混合编码器-解码器结构HA02，采用Transformer编码器块实现输入特征稀疏化，结合残差神经网络作为解码器，通过自注意力机制聚焦重要信息。
AI.result: 基于3GPP信道模型的仿真结果表明，HA02在信道估计性能上优于其他候选神经网络方法。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制有效提升了OFDM系统信道估计性能，验证了其在无线通信中的应用潜力。

title: Derivation of Learning Rules for Coupled Principal Component Analysis in a Lagrange-Newton Framework
title_zh: 拉格朗日-牛顿框架中耦合主成分分析学习规则的推导
abstract: We describe a Lagrange-Newton framework for the derivation of learning rules with desirable convergence properties and apply it to the case of principal component analysis (PCA). In this framework, a Newton descent is applied to an extended variable vector which also includes Lagrange multipliers introduced with constraints. The Newton descent guarantees equal convergence speed from all directions, but is also required to produce stable fixed points in the system with the extended state vector. The framework produces "coupled" PCA learning rules which simultaneously estimate an eigenvector and the corresponding eigenvalue in cross-coupled differential equations. We demonstrate the feasibility of this approach for two PCA learning rules, one for the estimation of the principal, the other for the estimate of an arbitrary eigenvector-eigenvalue pair (eigenpair).
summary: We describe a Lagrange-Newton framework for the derivation of learning rules with desirable convergence properties and apply it to the case of principal component analysis (PCA). In this framework, a Newton descent is applied to an extended variable vector which also includes Lagrange multipliers introduced with constraints. The Newton descent guarantees equal convergence speed from all directions, but is also required to produce stable fixed points in the system with the extended state vector. The framework produces "coupled" PCA learning rules which simultaneously estimate an eigenvector and the corresponding eigenvalue in cross-coupled differential equations. We demonstrate the feasibility of this approach for two PCA learning rules, one for the estimation of the principal, the other for the estimate of an arbitrary eigenvector-eigenvalue pair (eigenpair).
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一个拉格朗日-牛顿框架，用于推导具有理想收敛特性的学习规则，并将其应用于主成分分析（PCA）的情况。在此框架中，牛顿下降法应用于扩展变量向量，其中还包括引入约束的拉格朗日乘子。牛顿下降保证了各个方向的收敛速度相等，但也需要在具有扩展状态向量的系统中产生稳定的不动点。该框架产生“耦合”PCA 学习规则，同时估计交叉耦合微分方程中的特征向量和相应的特征值。我们证明了这种方法对于两种 PCA 学习规则的可行性，一种用于估计主成分，另一种用于估计任意特征向量-特征值对（特征对）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种拉格朗日-牛顿框架，用于推导具有稳定收敛特性的耦合主成分分析（PCA）学习规则，同时估计特征向量与特征值。
AI.motivation: 传统PCA学习规则可能存在收敛速度不一致或稳定性不足的问题，需设计一种能保证全局收敛且稳定的学习框架。
AI.method: 通过扩展状态向量（包含拉格朗日乘数）应用牛顿下降法，在约束条件下推导出耦合微分方程，同步估计特征向量与特征值。
AI.result: 验证了该框架在两种PCA学习规则中的有效性：一种用于主成分估计，另一种用于任意特征向量-特征值对的估计。
AI.conclusion: 拉格朗日-牛顿框架能够生成稳定且收敛性良好的耦合PCA学习规则，为特征分析提供了新方法。

title: Weighted Packet Selection for Rechargeable Links: Complexity and Approximation
title_zh: 可充电链路的加权数据包选择：复杂性和近似
abstract: We consider a natural problem dealing with weighted packet selection across a rechargeable link, which e.g., finds applications in cryptocurrency networks. The capacity of a link $(u,v)$ is determined by how much players $u$ and $v$ allocate for this link. Specifically, the input is a finite ordered sequence of packets that arrive in both directions along a link. Given $(u, v)$ and a packet of weight $x$ going from $u$ to $v$, player $u$ can either accept or reject the packet. If player $u$ accepts the packet, their capacity on link $(u,v)$ decreases by $x$. Correspondingly, player $v$ capacity on $(u,v)$ increases by $x$. If a player rejects the packet, this will entail a cost linear in the weight of the packet. A link is "rechargeable" in the sense that the total capacity of the link has to remain constant, but the allocation of capacity at the ends of the link can depend arbitrarily on players' decisions. The goal is to minimise the sum of the capacity injected into the link and the cost of rejecting packets. We show the problem is NP-hard, but can be approximated efficiently with a ratio of $(1+ \varepsilon)\cdot (1+\sqrt{3})$ for some arbitrary $\varepsilon >0$.
summary: We consider a natural problem dealing with weighted packet selection across a rechargeable link, which e.g., finds applications in cryptocurrency networks. The capacity of a link $(u,v)$ is determined by how much players $u$ and $v$ allocate for this link. Specifically, the input is a finite ordered sequence of packets that arrive in both directions along a link. Given $(u, v)$ and a packet of weight $x$ going from $u$ to $v$, player $u$ can either accept or reject the packet. If player $u$ accepts the packet, their capacity on link $(u,v)$ decreases by $x$. Correspondingly, player $v$ capacity on $(u,v)$ increases by $x$. If a player rejects the packet, this will entail a cost linear in the weight of the packet. A link is "rechargeable" in the sense that the total capacity of the link has to remain constant, but the allocation of capacity at the ends of the link can depend arbitrarily on players' decisions. The goal is to minimise the sum of the capacity injected into the link and the cost of rejecting packets. We show the problem is NP-hard, but can be approximated efficiently with a ratio of $(1+ \varepsilon)\cdot (1+\sqrt{3})$ for some arbitrary $\varepsilon >0$.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑处理可充电链路上的加权数据包选择的自然问题，例如在加密货币网络中找到应用程序。链接 $(u,v)$ 的容量由玩家 $u$ 和 $v$ 分配给该链接的数量决定。具体来说，输入是沿链路双向到达的数据包的有限有序序列。给定 $(u, v)$ 和从 $u$ 到 $v$ 的重量为 $x$ 的数据包，玩家 $u$ 可以接受或拒绝该数据包。如果玩家 $u$ 接受数据包，他们在链路 $(u,v)$ 上的容量就会减少 $x$。相应地，玩家 $v$ 在 $(u,v)$ 上的能力增加 $x$。如果玩家拒绝该数据包，这将导致与该数据包的重量成线性关系的成本。链接是“可充电的”，因为链接的总容量必须保持不变，但链接末端的容量分配可以任意取决于玩家的决定。目标是最小化注入链路的容量和拒绝数据包的成本之和。我们证明这个问题是 NP 困难的，但对于任意 $\varepsilon >0$，可以用 $(1+ \varepsilon)\cdot (1+\sqrt{3})$ 的比率有效地近似。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了可充电链路上加权数据包选择问题，旨在最小化链路容量注入和丢包成本的总和。
AI.motivation: 在区块链等网络中，链路容量分配需动态调整以平衡节点资源，同时需权衡数据包接受与丢弃的成本。
AI.method: 通过证明问题的NP难性，设计了一种基于任意小ε的近似算法，其近似比为(1+ε)(1+√3)。
AI.result: 该问题被证明为NP难，但可通过近似算法以(1+ε)(1+√3)的比率高效求解。
AI.conclusion: 尽管问题复杂度高，但提出的近似算法为实际网络中的资源分配提供了可行解决方案。

ai_content_json.method: 通过证明问题的NP难性，设计了一种基于任意小ε的近似算法，其近似比为(1+ε)(1+√3)。
ai_content_json.result: 该问题被证明为NP难，但可通过近似算法以(1+ε)(1+√3)的比率高效求解。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 尽管问题复杂度高，但提出的近似算法为实际网络中的资源分配提供了可行解决方案。

search_text: Weighted Packet Selection for Rechargeable Links: Complexity and Approximation 可充电链路的加权数据包选择：复杂性和近似 We consider a natural problem dealing with weighted packet selection across a rechargeable link, which e.g., finds applications in cryptocurrency networks. The capacity of a link $(u,v)$ is determined by how much players $u$ and $v$ allocate for this link. Specifically, the input is a finite ordered sequence of packets that arrive in both directions along a link. Given $(u, v)$ and a packet of weight $x$ going from $u$ to $v$, player $u$ can either accept or reject the packet. If player $u$ accepts the packet, their capacity on link $(u,v)$ decreases by $x$. Correspondingly, player $v$ capacity on $(u,v)$ increases by $x$. If a player rejects the packet, this will entail a cost linear in the weight of the packet. A link is "rechargeable" in the sense that the total capacity of the link has to remain constant, but the allocation of capacity at the ends of the link can depend arbitrarily on players' decisions. The goal is to minimise the sum of the capacity injected into the link and the cost of rejecting packets. We show the problem is NP-hard, but can be approximated efficiently with a ratio of $(1+ \varepsilon)\cdot (1+\sqrt{3})$ for some arbitrary $\varepsilon >0$. 我们考虑处理可充电链路上的加权数据包选择的自然问题，例如在加密货币网络中找到应用程序。链接 $(u,v)$ 的容量由玩家 $u$ 和 $v$ 分配给该链接的数量决定。具体来说，输入是沿链路双向到达的数据包的有限有序序列。给定 $(u, v)$ 和从 $u$ 到 $v$ 的重量为 $x$ 的数据包，玩家 $u$ 可以接受或拒绝该数据包。如果玩家 $u$ 接受数据包，他们在链路 $(u,v)$ 上的容量就会减少 $x$。相应地，玩家 $v$ 在 $(u,v)$ 上的能力增加 $x$。如果玩家拒绝该数据包，这将导致与该数据包的重量成线性关系的成本。链接是“可充电的”，因为链接的总容量必须保持不变，但链接末端的容量分配可以任意取决于玩家的决定。目标是最小化注入链路的容量和拒绝数据包的成本之和。我们证明这个问题是 NP 困难的，但对于任意 $\varepsilon >0$，可以用 $(1+ \varepsilon)\cdot (1+\sqrt{3})$ 的比率有效地近似。 本文研究了可充电链路上加权数据包选择问题，旨在最小化链路容量注入和丢包成本的总和。 Stefan Schmid,Jakub Svoboda,Michelle Yeo cs.DS,cs.CC

authors_text: Mingtao Feng,Kendong Liu,Liang Zhang,Hongshan Yu,Yaonan Wang,Ajmal Mian
title: Learning from Pixel-Level Noisy Label : A New Perspective for Light Field Saliency Detection
title_zh: 从像素级噪声标签学习：光场显着性检测的新视角
abstract: Saliency detection with light field images is becoming attractive given the abundant cues available, however, this comes at the expense of large-scale pixel level annotated data which is expensive to generate. In this paper, we propose to learn light field saliency from pixel-level noisy labels obtained from unsupervised hand crafted featured based saliency methods. Given this goal, a natural question is: can we efficiently incorporate the relationships among light field cues while identifying clean labels in a unified framework? We address this question by formulating the learning as a joint optimization of intra light field features fusion stream and inter scenes correlation stream to generate the predictions. Specially, we first introduce a pixel forgetting guided fusion module to mutually enhance the light field features and exploit pixel consistency across iterations to identify noisy pixels. Next, we introduce a cross scene noise penalty loss for better reflecting latent structures of training data and enabling the learning to be invariant to noise. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our framework showing that it learns saliency prediction comparable to state-of-the-art fully supervised light field saliency methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/OLobbCode/NoiseLF.
summary: Saliency detection with light field images is becoming attractive given the abundant cues available, however, this comes at the expense of large-scale pixel level annotated data which is expensive to generate. In this paper, we propose to learn light field saliency from pixel-level noisy labels obtained from unsupervised hand crafted featured based saliency methods. Given this goal, a natural question is: can we efficiently incorporate the relationships among light field cues while identifying clean labels in a unified framework? We address this question by formulating the learning as a joint optimization of intra light field features fusion stream and inter scenes correlation stream to generate the predictions. Specially, we first introduce a pixel forgetting guided fusion module to mutually enhance the light field features and exploit pixel consistency across iterations to identify noisy pixels. Next, we introduce a cross scene noise penalty loss for better reflecting latent structures of training data and enabling the learning to be invariant to noise. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our framework showing that it learns saliency prediction comparable to state-of-the-art fully supervised light field saliency methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/OLobbCode/NoiseLF.
abstract_zh: 鉴于可用的丰富线索，利用光场图像进行显着性检测变得越来越有吸引力，然而，这是以大规模像素级注释数据为代价的，而大规模像素级注释数据的生成成本昂贵。在本文中，我们建议从无监督手工制作的基于特征的显着性方法获得的像素级噪声标签中学习光场显着性。考虑到这一目标，一个自然的问题是：我们能否有效地整合光场线索之间的关系，同时在统一的框架中识别清洁标签？我们通过将学习公式化为光场内特征融合流和场景间相关流的联合优化来生成预测来解决这个问题。特别地，我们首先引入像素遗忘引导融合模块来相互增强光场特征并利用迭代间的像素一致性来识别噪声像素。接下来，我们引入跨场景噪声惩罚损失，以更好地反映训练数据的潜在结构并使学习对噪声不变。对多个基准数据集的广泛实验证明了我们的框架的优越性，表明它学习的显着性预测可与最先进的完全监督光场显着性方法相媲美。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/OLobbCode/NoiseLF 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从像素级噪声标签中学习光场显著性检测的新方法，无需依赖大规模人工标注数据。
AI.motivation: 光场图像显著性检测虽具有丰富线索，但大规模像素级标注数据生成成本高昂，现有方法依赖昂贵的监督数据。
AI.method: 构建联合优化框架，包含光场特征融合流和场景间关联流：1）引入像素遗忘引导的融合模块增强特征并识别噪声像素；2）设计跨场景噪声惩罚损失以提升数据结构鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验表明，该框架性能优于现有全监督光场显著性方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用噪声标签和跨场景关联，本文方法在无监督条件下实现了与全监督方法相当的光场显著性检测效果。

title: Deep Orientation-Aware Functional Maps: Tackling Symmetry Issues in Shape Matching
title_zh: 深度方向感知功能图：解决形状匹配中的对称问题
comment: To appear in: IEEE, Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition, 2022 // Main Manuscript: 8 pages (without references), 3 figures, 3 tables // Supplementary: 4 pages, 4 figures, 1 table //
comments: To appear in: IEEE, Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition, 2022 // Main Manuscript: 8 pages (without references), 3 figures, 3 tables // Supplementary: 4 pages, 4 figures, 1 table //
abstract: State-of-the-art fully intrinsic networks for non-rigid shape matching often struggle to disambiguate the symmetries of the shapes leading to unstable correspondence predictions. Meanwhile, recent advances in the functional map framework allow to enforce orientation preservation using a functional representation for tangent vector field transfer, through so-called complex functional maps. Using this representation, we propose a new deep learning approach to learn orientation-aware features in a fully unsupervised setting. Our architecture is built on top of DiffusionNet, making it robust to discretization changes. Additionally, we introduce a vector field-based loss, which promotes orientation preservation without using (often unstable) extrinsic descriptors.
summary: State-of-the-art fully intrinsic networks for non-rigid shape matching often struggle to disambiguate the symmetries of the shapes leading to unstable correspondence predictions. Meanwhile, recent advances in the functional map framework allow to enforce orientation preservation using a functional representation for tangent vector field transfer, through so-called complex functional maps. Using this representation, we propose a new deep learning approach to learn orientation-aware features in a fully unsupervised setting. Our architecture is built on top of DiffusionNet, making it robust to discretization changes. Additionally, we introduce a vector field-based loss, which promotes orientation preservation without using (often unstable) extrinsic descriptors.
abstract_zh: 用于非刚性形状匹配的最先进的完全内在网络通常难以消除形状对称性的歧义，从而导致不稳定的对应预测。同时，功能图框架的最新进展允许通过所谓的复杂功能图，使用切向量场传递的功能表示来强制方向保留。使用这种表示，我们提出了一种新的深度学习方法，在完全无监督的环境中学习方向感知特征。我们的架构建立在 DiffusionNet 之上，使其能够适应离散化变化。此外，我们引入了基于向量场的损失，它可以在不使用（通常不稳定）外部描述符的情况下促进方向保持。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的无监督方法，通过方向感知的功能映射解决形状匹配中的对称性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有非刚性形状匹配方法在处理对称性时存在预测不稳定问题，而传统功能映射框架可通过复数表示保持方向，但需结合深度学习提升效果。
AI.method: 基于DiffusionNet架构构建模型，利用复数功能映射学习方向感知特征，并引入向量场损失函数以保持方向性，无需依赖外在描述符。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在基准数据集上显著提升了对称形状的匹配稳定性，优于现有无监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合深度学习与功能映射框架，提出的新方法有效解决了形状匹配中的对称性难题，为无监督形状分析提供了新思路。

title: Analysis of MC Systems Employing Receivers Covered by Heterogeneous Receptors

abstract: This paper investigates the channel impulse response (CIR), i.e., the molecule hitting rate, of a molecular communication (MC) system employing an absorbing receiver (RX) covered by multiple non overlapping receptors. In this system, receptors are heterogeneous, i.e., they may have different sizes and arbitrary locations. Furthermore, we consider two types of transmitter (TX), namely a point TX and a membrane fusion (MF)-based spherical TX. We assume the point TX or the center of the MF-based TX has a fixed distance to the center of the RX. Given this fixed distance, the TX can be at different locations and the CIR of the RX depends on the exact location of the TX. By averaging over all possible TX locations, we analyze the expected molecule hitting rate at the RX as a function of the sizes and locations of the receptors, where we assume molecule degradation may occur during the propagation of the signaling molecules. Notably, our analysis is valid for different numbers, a wide range of sizes, and arbitrary locations of the receptors, and its accuracy is confirmed via particle-based simulations. Exploiting our numerical results, we show that the expected number of absorbed molecules at the RX increases with the number of receptors, when the total area on the RX surface covered by receptors is fixed. Based on the derived analytical expressions, we compare different geometric receptor distributions by examining the expected number of absorbed molecules at the RX. We show that evenly distributed receptors result in a larger number of absorbed molecules than other distributions. We further compare three models that combine different types of TXs and RXs.

In this system, receptors are heterogeneous, i.e., they may have different sizes and arbitrary locations. We assume the point TX or the center of the MF-based TX has a fixed distance to the center of the RX. Given this fixed distance, the TX can be at different locations and the CIR of the RX depends on the exact location of the TX. By averaging over all possible TX locations, we analyze the expected molecule hitting rate at the RX as a function of the sizes and locations of the receptors, where we assume molecule degradation may occur during the propagation of the signaling molecules. Notably, our analysis is valid for different numbers, a wide range of sizes, and arbitrary locations of the receptors, and its accuracy is confirmed via particle-based simulations. Exploiting our numerical results, we show that the expected number of absorbed molecules at the RX increases with the number of receptors, when the total area on the RX surface covered by receptors is fixed. Based on the derived analytical expressions, we compare different geometric receptor distributions by examining the expected number of absorbed molecules at the RX. We show that evenly distributed receptors result in a larger number of absorbed molecules than other distributions. We further compare three models that combine different types of TXs and RXs.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了分子通信（MC）系统的通道脉冲响应（CIR），即分子命中率，该系统采用由多个非重叠受体覆盖的吸收接收器（RX）。在这个系统中，受体是异质的，即它们可能具有不同的大小和任意位置。此外，我们考虑两种类型的发射器 (TX)，即点 TX 和基于膜融合 (MF) 的球形 TX。我们假设点 TX 或基于 MF 的 TX 的中心到 RX 的中心有固定的距离。给定这个固定距离，TX 可以位于不同的位置，并且 RX 的 CIR 取决于 TX 的确切位置。通过对所有可能的 TX 位置进行平均，我们分析了 RX 处的预期分子命中率作为受体大小和位置的函数，其中我们假设在信号分子传播期间可能发生分子降解。值得注意的是，我们的分析对于不同数量、各种尺寸和任意位置的受体都是有效的，并且其准确性通过基于粒子的模拟得到了证实。利用我们的数值结果，我们表明，当受体覆盖的 RX 表面总面积固定时，RX 处吸收分子的预期数量随着受体数量的增加而增加。基于导出的解析表达式，我们通过检查 RX 处吸收分子的预期数量来比较不同的几何受体分布。我们发现，均匀分布的受体比其他分布的受体吸收的分子数量更多。我们进一步比较了结合不同类型 TX 和 RX 的三种模型。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了采用多异质受体覆盖接收器的分子通信系统的信道脉冲响应（CIR），分析了不同发射器类型和受体配置对分子吸收效率的影响。
AI.motivation: 分子通信系统在生物医学领域有广泛应用，但现有研究对异质受体配置和多种发射器模型的分析不足，需优化系统设计以提高通信效率。
AI.method: 通过建立数学模型和粒子模拟，分析吸收接收器上异质受体的大小、位置对分子到达率的影响，比较点发射器与膜融合发射器的性能，并验证不同受体分布的吸收效率。
AI.result: 当受体总覆盖面积固定时，受体数量增加可提升分子吸收量；均匀分布的受体比其他分布更优；不同发射器-接收器组合模型的性能存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 异质受体配置和均匀分布能有效提升分子通信效率，所提分析模型可为生物医学通信系统设计提供理论依据。

authors_text: Sijia Li,Gaopeng Gou,Chang Liu,Chengshang Hou,Zhenzhen Li,Gang Xiong
title: TTAGN: Temporal Transaction Aggregation Graph Network for Ethereum Phishing Scams Detection
title_zh: TTAGN：用于以太坊网络钓鱼诈骗检测的时间交易聚合图网络
abstract: In recent years, phishing scams have become the most serious type of crime involved in Ethereum, the second-largest blockchain platform. The existing phishing scams detection technology on Ethereum mostly uses traditional machine learning or network representation learning to mine the key information from the transaction network to identify phishing addresses. However, these methods adopt the last transaction record or even completely ignore these records, and only manual-designed features are taken for the node representation. In this paper, we propose a Temporal Transaction Aggregation Graph Network (TTAGN) to enhance phishing scams detection performance on Ethereum. Specifically, in the temporal edges representation module, we model the temporal relationship of historical transaction records between nodes to construct the edge representation of the Ethereum transaction network. Moreover, the edge representations around the node are aggregated to fuse topological interactive relationships into its representation, also named as trading features, in the edge2node module. We further combine trading features with common statistical and structural features obtained by graph neural networks to identify phishing addresses. Evaluated on real-world Ethereum phishing scams datasets, our TTAGN (92.8% AUC, and 81.6% F1score) outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, and the effectiveness of temporal edges representation and edge2node module is also demonstrated.
summary: In recent years, phishing scams have become the most serious type of crime involved in Ethereum, the second-largest blockchain platform. The existing phishing scams detection technology on Ethereum mostly uses traditional machine learning or network representation learning to mine the key information from the transaction network to identify phishing addresses. However, these methods adopt the last transaction record or even completely ignore these records, and only manual-designed features are taken for the node representation. In this paper, we propose a Temporal Transaction Aggregation Graph Network (TTAGN) to enhance phishing scams detection performance on Ethereum. Specifically, in the temporal edges representation module, we model the temporal relationship of historical transaction records between nodes to construct the edge representation of the Ethereum transaction network. Moreover, the edge representations around the node are aggregated to fuse topological interactive relationships into its representation, also named as trading features, in the edge2node module. We further combine trading features with common statistical and structural features obtained by graph neural networks to identify phishing addresses. Evaluated on real-world Ethereum phishing scams datasets, our TTAGN (92.8% AUC, and 81.6% F1score) outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, and the effectiveness of temporal edges representation and edge2node module is also demonstrated.
abstract_zh: 近年来，网络钓鱼诈骗已成为第二大区块链平台以太坊涉及的最严重的犯罪类型。以太坊上现有的钓鱼诈骗检测技术大多采用传统的机器学习或网络表示学习从交易网络中挖掘关键信息来识别钓鱼地址。然而，这些方法采用最后的交易记录，甚至完全忽略这些记录，仅采用人工设计的特征来表示节点。在本文中，我们提出了一种临时交易聚合图网络（TTAGN）来增强以太坊上的网络钓鱼诈骗检测性能。具体来说，在时间边表示模块中，我们对节点之间历史交易记录的时间关系进行建模，以构建以太坊交易网络的边表示。此外，在edge2node模块中，节点周围的边表示被聚合，以将拓扑交互关系融合到其表示中，也称为交易特征。我们进一步将交易特征与图神经网络获得的常见统计和结构特征相结合来识别网络钓鱼地址。在现实世界的以太坊网络钓鱼诈骗数据集上进行评估，我们的 TTAGN（92.8% AUC 和 81.6% F1score）优于最先进的方法，并且还证明了时间边缘表示和 Edge2node 模块的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间交易聚合图网络（TTAGN）的方法，用于提高以太坊钓鱼诈骗地址的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有以太坊钓鱼诈骗检测方法依赖传统机器学习或网络表示学习，仅使用手动设计特征或忽略交易记录的时间信息，导致检测效果有限。
AI.method: 通过时间边表示模块建模历史交易的时间关系构建边表示，并在edge2node模块聚合节点周围边表示以融合拓扑交互关系，最终结合交易特征与图神经网络提取的统计特征进行检测。
AI.result: 在真实以太坊钓鱼数据集上，TTAGN达到92.8%的AUC和81.6%的F1分数，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 时间边表示和edge2node模块有效捕捉了交易动态特性与拓扑关系，显著提升了钓鱼地址检测性能。
