authors_text: Efthymios Georgiou,Kosmas Kritsis,Georgios Paraskevopoulos,Athanasios Katsamanis,Vassilis Katsouros,Alexandros Potamianos
title: Regotron: Regularizing the Tacotron2 architecture via monotonic alignment loss
title_zh: Regotron：通过单调对齐损失规范 Tacotron2 架构
abstract: Recent deep learning Text-to-Speech (TTS) systems have achieved impressive performance by generating speech close to human parity. However, they suffer from training stability issues as well as incorrect alignment of the intermediate acoustic representation with the input text sequence. In this work, we introduce Regotron, a regularized version of Tacotron2 which aims to alleviate the training issues and at the same time produce monotonic alignments. Our method augments the vanilla Tacotron2 objective function with an additional term, which penalizes non-monotonic alignments in the location-sensitive attention mechanism. By properly adjusting this regularization term we show that the loss curves become smoother, and at the same time Regotron consistently produces monotonic alignments in unseen examples even at an early stage (13\% of the total number of epochs) of its training process, whereas the fully converged Tacotron2 fails to do so. Moreover, our proposed regularization method has no additional computational overhead, while reducing common TTS mistakes and achieving slighlty improved speech naturalness according to subjective mean opinion scores (MOS) collected from 50 evaluators.
summary: Recent deep learning Text-to-Speech (TTS) systems have achieved impressive performance by generating speech close to human parity. However, they suffer from training stability issues as well as incorrect alignment of the intermediate acoustic representation with the input text sequence. In this work, we introduce Regotron, a regularized version of Tacotron2 which aims to alleviate the training issues and at the same time produce monotonic alignments. Our method augments the vanilla Tacotron2 objective function with an additional term, which penalizes non-monotonic alignments in the location-sensitive attention mechanism. By properly adjusting this regularization term we show that the loss curves become smoother, and at the same time Regotron consistently produces monotonic alignments in unseen examples even at an early stage (13\% of the total number of epochs) of its training process, whereas the fully converged Tacotron2 fails to do so. Moreover, our proposed regularization method has no additional computational overhead, while reducing common TTS mistakes and achieving slighlty improved speech naturalness according to subjective mean opinion scores (MOS) collected from 50 evaluators.
abstract_zh: 最近的深度学习文本转语音 (TTS) 系统通过生成接近人类的语音而取得了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，它们面临训练稳定性问题以及中间声学表示与输入文本序列的不正确对齐。在这项工作中，我们引入了 Regotron，它是 Tacotron2 的正则化版本，旨在缓解训练问题，同时产生单调对齐。我们的方法通过附加项增强了普通 Tacotron2 目标函数，该附加项惩罚了位置敏感注意机制中的非单调对齐。通过适当调整这个正则化项，我们发现损失曲线变得更加平滑，同时 Regotron 即使在训练过程的早期阶段（占总周期数的 13%）也能够在未见过的示例中一致地产生单调对齐，而完全收敛的 Tacotron2 却无法做到这一点。此外，我们提出的正则化方法没有额外的计算开销，同时根据从 50 名评估者收集的主观平均意见分数 (MOS) 减少了常见的 TTS 错误并略微提高了语音自然度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Regotron，通过单调对齐损失正则化Tacotron2架构，解决文本到语音合成中的训练不稳定性和对齐错误问题。
AI.motivation: 现有TTS模型存在训练过程不稳定及中间声学表示与文本序列对齐不准确的问题，影响生成语音质量。
AI.method: 在Tacotron2目标函数中增加单调对齐惩罚项，通过调整正则化参数优化训练过程，无需额外计算开销。
AI.result: Regotron训练损失曲线更平滑，早期阶段（13%训练周期）即可生成单调对齐，且主观测试显示语音自然度提升。
AI.conclusion: 单调对齐正则化有效提升模型稳定性与对齐准确性，在保持计算效率的同时改善语音合成质量。

authors_text: Heinrich Dinkel,Zhiyong Yan,Yongqing Wang,Junbo Zhang,Yujun Wang
title: Pseudo strong labels for large scale weakly supervised audio tagging
title_zh: 用于大规模弱监督音频标记的伪强标签
abstract: Large-scale audio tagging datasets inevitably contain imperfect labels, such as clip-wise annotated (temporally weak) tags with no exact on- and offsets, due to a high manual labeling cost. This work proposes pseudo strong labels (PSL), a simple label augmentation framework that enhances the supervision quality for large-scale weakly supervised audio tagging. A machine annotator is first trained on a large weakly supervised dataset, which then provides finer supervision for a student model. Using PSL we achieve an mAP of 35.95 balanced train subset of Audioset using a MobileNetV2 back-end, significantly outperforming approaches without PSL. An analysis is provided which reveals that PSL mitigates missing labels. Lastly, we show that models trained with PSL are also superior at generalizing to the Freesound datasets (FSD) than their weakly trained counterparts.
summary: Large-scale audio tagging datasets inevitably contain imperfect labels, such as clip-wise annotated (temporally weak) tags with no exact on- and offsets, due to a high manual labeling cost. This work proposes pseudo strong labels (PSL), a simple label augmentation framework that enhances the supervision quality for large-scale weakly supervised audio tagging. A machine annotator is first trained on a large weakly supervised dataset, which then provides finer supervision for a student model. Using PSL we achieve an mAP of 35.95 balanced train subset of Audioset using a MobileNetV2 back-end, significantly outperforming approaches without PSL. An analysis is provided which reveals that PSL mitigates missing labels. Lastly, we show that models trained with PSL are also superior at generalizing to the Freesound datasets (FSD) than their weakly trained counterparts.
abstract_zh: 由于手动标记成本较高，大规模音频标记数据集不可避免地包含不完美的标签，例如没有精确开启和偏移的剪辑注释（时间较弱）标签。这项工作提出了伪强标签（PSL），这是一种简单的标签增强框架，可以提高大规模弱监督音频标记的监督质量。机器注释器首先在大型弱监督数据集上进行训练，然后为学生模型提供更精细的监督。使用 PSL，我们使用 MobileNetV2 后端实现了 Audioset 平衡训练子集的 mAP 为 35.95，明显优于没有 PSL 的方法。提供的分析表明 PSL 可以减少标签丢失的情况。最后，我们表明，使用 PSL 训练的模型在泛化到 Freesound 数据集 (FSD) 方面也优于训练较弱的模型。

AI.tldr: 提出伪强标签（PSL）框架以提高大规模弱监督音频标签的监督质量
AI.motivation: 大规模音频数据集存在标签不完美和缺失问题，传统弱监督方法效果有限，需提升标注质量
AI.method: 使用机器标注器在弱监督数据上预训练，生成更精确的伪标签作为学生模型的监督信号
AI.result: 在Audioset数据集上达到35.95 mAP，优于无PSL方法，并在Freesound上表现更好
AI.conclusion: PSL有效缓解标签缺失问题，提升模型性能和跨数据集泛化能力

authors_text: Mira Kim,Jaehoon Ko,Kyusun Cho,Junmyeong Choi,Daewon Choi,Seungryong Kim
title: AE-NeRF: Auto-Encoding Neural Radiance Fields for 3D-Aware Object Manipulation
title_zh: AE-NeRF：自动编码神经辐射场以进行 3D 感知对象操作
abstract: We propose a novel framework for 3D-aware object manipulation, called Auto-Encoding Neural Radiance Fields (AE-NeRF). Our model, which is formulated in an auto-encoder architecture, extracts disentangled 3D attributes such as 3D shape, appearance, and camera pose from an image, and a high-quality image is rendered from the attributes through disentangled generative Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF). To improve the disentanglement ability, we present two losses, global-local attribute consistency loss defined between input and output, and swapped-attribute classification loss. Since training such auto-encoding networks from scratch without ground-truth shape and appearance information is non-trivial, we present a stage-wise training scheme, which dramatically helps to boost the performance. We conduct experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model over the latest methods and provide extensive ablation studies.
summary: We propose a novel framework for 3D-aware object manipulation, called Auto-Encoding Neural Radiance Fields (AE-NeRF). Our model, which is formulated in an auto-encoder architecture, extracts disentangled 3D attributes such as 3D shape, appearance, and camera pose from an image, and a high-quality image is rendered from the attributes through disentangled generative Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF). To improve the disentanglement ability, we present two losses, global-local attribute consistency loss defined between input and output, and swapped-attribute classification loss. Since training such auto-encoding networks from scratch without ground-truth shape and appearance information is non-trivial, we present a stage-wise training scheme, which dramatically helps to boost the performance. We conduct experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model over the latest methods and provide extensive ablation studies.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于 3D 感知对象操作的新颖框架，称为自动编码神经辐射场 (AE-NeRF)。我们的模型采用自动编码器架构，从图像中提取解缠结的 3D 属性，例如 3D 形状、外观和相机姿势，并通过解缠结的生成神经辐射场 (NeRF) 从这些属性渲染高质量图像。为了提高解缠结能力，我们提出了两种损失，输入和输出之间定义的全局局部属性一致性损失和交换属性分类损失。由于在没有地面实况形状和外观信息的情况下从头开始训练这种自动编码网络并非易事，因此我们提出了一种分阶段的训练方案，这极大地有助于提高性能。我们进行实验来证明所提出的模型相对于最新方法的有效性，并提供广泛的消融研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AE-NeRF的自编码神经辐射场框架，用于实现基于图像的3D物体感知操作。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以从单张图像中分离3D形状、外观等属性并进行可控操作，且缺乏对无监督训练的有效方案。
AI.method: 设计自编码器架构提取解耦的3D属性，引入全局-局部属性一致性损失和交换属性分类损失，并采用分阶段训练策略解决无监督训练难题。
AI.result: 实验表明AE-NeRF在最新方法中表现更优，消融研究验证了关键模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过属性解耦损失和分阶段训练，AE-NeRF实现了高效的3D感知物体操作，为无监督3D重建提供了新思路。

search_text: AE-NeRF: Auto-Encoding Neural Radiance Fields for 3D-Aware Object Manipulation AE-NeRF：自动编码神经辐射场以进行 3D 感知对象操作 We propose a novel framework for 3D-aware object manipulation, called Auto-Encoding Neural Radiance Fields (AE-NeRF). Our model, which is formulated in an auto-encoder architecture, extracts disentangled 3D attributes such as 3D shape, appearance, and camera pose from an image, and a high-quality image is rendered from the attributes through disentangled generative Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF). To improve the disentanglement ability, we present two losses, global-local attribute consistency loss defined between input and output, and swapped-attribute classification loss. Since training such auto-encoding networks from scratch without ground-truth shape and appearance information is non-trivial, we present a stage-wise training scheme, which dramatically helps to boost the performance. We conduct experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model over the latest methods and provide extensive ablation studies. 我们提出了一种用于 3D 感知对象操作的新颖框架，称为自动编码神经辐射场 (AE-NeRF)。我们的模型采用自动编码器架构，从图像中提取解缠结的 3D 属性，例如 3D 形状、外观和相机姿势，并通过解缠结的生成神经辐射场 (NeRF) 从这些属性渲染高质量图像。为了提高解缠结能力，我们提出了两种损失，输入和输出之间定义的全局局部属性一致性损失和交换属性分类损失。由于在没有地面实况形状和外观信息的情况下从头开始训练这种自动编码网络并非易事，因此我们提出了一种分阶段的训练方案，这极大地有助于提高性能。我们进行实验来证明所提出的模型相对于最新方法的有效性，并提供广泛的消融研究。 本文提出一种名为AE-NeRF的自编码神经辐射场框架，用于实现基于图像的3D物体感知操作。 Mira Kim,Jaehoon Ko,Kyusun Cho,Junmyeong Choi,Daewon Choi,Seungryong Kim cs.CV

title: From prediction markets to interpretable collective intelligence
title_zh: 从预测市场到可解释的集体智慧
abstract: We outline how to create a mechanism that provides an optimal way to elicit, from an arbitrary group of experts, the probability of the truth of an arbitrary logical proposition together with collective information that has an explicit form and interprets this probability. Namely, we provide strong arguments for the possibility of the development of a self-resolving prediction market with play money that incentivizes direct information exchange between experts. Such a system could, in particular, motivate simultaneously many experts to collectively solve scientific or medical problems in a very efficient manner. We also note that in our considerations, experts are not assumed to be Bayesian.
summary: We outline how to create a mechanism that provides an optimal way to elicit, from an arbitrary group of experts, the probability of the truth of an arbitrary logical proposition together with collective information that has an explicit form and interprets this probability. Namely, we provide strong arguments for the possibility of the development of a self-resolving prediction market with play money that incentivizes direct information exchange between experts. Such a system could, in particular, motivate simultaneously many experts to collectively solve scientific or medical problems in a very efficient manner. We also note that in our considerations, experts are not assumed to be Bayesian.
abstract_zh: 我们概述了如何创建一种机制，提供一种最佳方式，从任意专家组中得出任意逻辑命题的真实概率以及具有明确形式并解释该概率的集体信息。也就是说，我们为开发自我解决的预测市场的可能性提供了强有力的论据，其中的游戏货币可以激励专家之间的直接信息交换。特别是，这样的系统可以同时激励许多专家以非常有效的方式集体解决科学或医学问题。我们还注意到，在我们的考虑中，专家不被假定为贝叶斯主义者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种机制，通过虚拟货币激励专家群体直接交换信息，以高效解决科学或医学问题，并生成可解释的集体智能结果。
AI.motivation: 现有预测市场依赖贝叶斯假设且难以实现高效集体决策，需设计无需贝叶斯假设的机制以促进专家间直接信息共享。
AI.method: 构建自解决预测市场机制，利用虚拟货币激励专家提供逻辑命题概率及集体信息，无需假设专家为贝叶斯决策者。
AI.result: 论证了该机制可同时激励多专家高效协作解决复杂问题，并生成可解释的集体智能结果。
AI.conclusion: 该机制为发展可解释集体智能系统提供了可行路径，未来可应用于科学、医疗等需要专家协作的领域。

authors_text: Xiang Wang,Shiwei Zhang,Zhiwu Qing,Mingqian Tang,Zhengrong Zuo,Changxin Gao,Rong Jin,Nong Sang
title: Hybrid Relation Guided Set Matching for Few-shot Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于少镜头动作识别的混合关系引导集匹配
abstract: Current few-shot action recognition methods reach impressive performance by learning discriminative features for each video via episodic training and designing various temporal alignment strategies. Nevertheless, they are limited in that (a) learning individual features without considering the entire task may lose the most relevant information in the current episode, and (b) these alignment strategies may fail in misaligned instances. To overcome the two limitations, we propose a novel Hybrid Relation guided Set Matching (HyRSM) approach that incorporates two key components: hybrid relation module and set matching metric. The purpose of the hybrid relation module is to learn task-specific embeddings by fully exploiting associated relations within and cross videos in an episode. Built upon the task-specific features, we reformulate distance measure between query and support videos as a set matching problem and further design a bidirectional Mean Hausdorff Metric to improve the resilience to misaligned instances. By this means, the proposed HyRSM can be highly informative and flexible to predict query categories under the few-shot settings. We evaluate HyRSM on six challenging benchmarks, and the experimental results show its superiority over the state-of-the-art methods by a convincing margin. Project page: https://hyrsm-cvpr2022.github.io/.
summary: Current few-shot action recognition methods reach impressive performance by learning discriminative features for each video via episodic training and designing various temporal alignment strategies. Nevertheless, they are limited in that (a) learning individual features without considering the entire task may lose the most relevant information in the current episode, and (b) these alignment strategies may fail in misaligned instances. To overcome the two limitations, we propose a novel Hybrid Relation guided Set Matching (HyRSM) approach that incorporates two key components: hybrid relation module and set matching metric. The purpose of the hybrid relation module is to learn task-specific embeddings by fully exploiting associated relations within and cross videos in an episode. Built upon the task-specific features, we reformulate distance measure between query and support videos as a set matching problem and further design a bidirectional Mean Hausdorff Metric to improve the resilience to misaligned instances. By this means, the proposed HyRSM can be highly informative and flexible to predict query categories under the few-shot settings. We evaluate HyRSM on six challenging benchmarks, and the experimental results show its superiority over the state-of-the-art methods by a convincing margin. Project page: https://hyrsm-cvpr2022.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 目前的少镜头动作识别方法通过情景训练学习每个视频的判别特征并设计各种时间对齐策略，从而达到了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，它们的局限性在于（a）在不考虑整个任务的情况下学习单个特征可能会丢失当前事件中最相关的信息，并且（b）这些对齐策略可能会在未对齐的情况下失败。为了克服这两个限制，我们提出了一种新颖的混合关系引导集合匹配（HyRSM）方法，该方法包含两个关键组件：混合关系模块和集合匹配度量。混合关系模块的目的是通过充分利用剧集中视频内和视频之间的关联关系来学习特定于任务的嵌入。基于特定于任务的特征，我们将查询和支持视频之间的距离度量重新表述为集合匹配问题，并进一步设计双向平均豪斯多夫度量以提高对未对齐实例的恢复能力。通过这种方式，所提出的 HyRSM 可以提供丰富的信息并灵活地预测少样本设置下的查询类别。我们在六个具有挑战性的基准上评估 HyRSM，实验结果表明它比最先进的方法具有令人信服的优势。项目页面：https://hyrsm-cvpr2022.github.io/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合关系引导的集合匹配方法（HyRSM），用于解决少样本动作识别中的特征学习和时间对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本动作识别方法在学习个体视频特征时可能忽略任务整体信息，且时间对齐策略在错位实例中效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计混合关系模块挖掘任务内视频间关联关系，并通过双向平均豪斯多夫度量将查询与支持视频的距离计算转化为集合匹配问题。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上实验表明，HyRSM相比现有最先进方法具有显著性能优势。
AI.conclusion: HyRSM通过任务感知的特征学习和鲁棒的集合匹配机制，有效解决了少样本动作识别中的关键挑战。

authors_text: Yiyang Shen,Yongzhen Wang,Mingqiang Wei,Honghua Chen,Haoran Xie,Gary Cheng,Fu Lee Wang
title: Semi-MoreGAN: A New Semi-supervised Generative Adversarial Network for Mixture of Rain Removal
title_zh: Semi-MoreGAN：一种用于混合除雨的新型半监督生成对抗网络
abstract: Rain is one of the most common weather which can completely degrade the image quality and interfere with the performance of many computer vision tasks, especially under heavy rain conditions. We observe that: (i) rain is a mixture of rain streaks and rainy haze; (ii) the scene depth determines the intensity of rain streaks and the transformation into the rainy haze; (iii) most existing deraining methods are only trained on synthetic rainy images, and hence generalize poorly to the real-world scenes. Motivated by these observations, we propose a new SEMI-supervised Mixture Of rain REmoval Generative Adversarial Network (Semi-MoreGAN), which consists of four key modules: (I) a novel attentional depth prediction network to provide precise depth estimation; (ii) a context feature prediction network composed of several well-designed detailed residual blocks to produce detailed image context features; (iii) a pyramid depth-guided non-local network to effectively integrate the image context with the depth information, and produce the final rain-free images; and (iv) a comprehensive semi-supervised loss function to make the model not limited to synthetic datasets but generalize smoothly to real-world heavy rainy scenes. Extensive experiments show clear improvements of our approach over twenty representative state-of-the-arts on both synthetic and real-world rainy images.
summary: Rain is one of the most common weather which can completely degrade the image quality and interfere with the performance of many computer vision tasks, especially under heavy rain conditions. We observe that: (i) rain is a mixture of rain streaks and rainy haze; (ii) the scene depth determines the intensity of rain streaks and the transformation into the rainy haze; (iii) most existing deraining methods are only trained on synthetic rainy images, and hence generalize poorly to the real-world scenes. Motivated by these observations, we propose a new SEMI-supervised Mixture Of rain REmoval Generative Adversarial Network (Semi-MoreGAN), which consists of four key modules: (I) a novel attentional depth prediction network to provide precise depth estimation; (ii) a context feature prediction network composed of several well-designed detailed residual blocks to produce detailed image context features; (iii) a pyramid depth-guided non-local network to effectively integrate the image context with the depth information, and produce the final rain-free images; and (iv) a comprehensive semi-supervised loss function to make the model not limited to synthetic datasets but generalize smoothly to real-world heavy rainy scenes. Extensive experiments show clear improvements of our approach over twenty representative state-of-the-arts on both synthetic and real-world rainy images.
abstract_zh: 雨是最常见的天气之一，它会完全降低图像质量并干扰许多计算机视觉任务的性能，尤其是在大雨条件下。我们观察到： (i) 雨是雨条纹和雨霾的混合体； (ii) 场景深度决定雨纹的强度以及雨霾的转变； (iii)大多数现有的除雨方法仅针对合成的雨天图像进行训练，因此对现实世界场景的推广效果较差。受这些观察的启发，我们提出了一种新的半监督混合除雨生成对抗网络（Semi-MoreGAN），它由四个关键模块组成：（I）一个新颖的注意力深度预测网络，提供精确的深度估计； (ii) 上下文特征预测网络，由几个精心设计的详细残差块组成，以产生详细的图像上下文特征； （iii）金字塔深度引导的非局部网络，有效地将图像上下文与深度信息结合起来，并产生最终的无雨图像； (iv) 全面的半监督损失函数，使模型不仅限于合成数据集，而是平滑地推广到现实世界的大雨场景。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在合成和现实世界的雨天图像上的二十多个代表性的最新技术中得到了明显的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督生成对抗网络Semi-MoreGAN，用于混合雨去除任务，通过结合深度估计和上下文特征预测提升真实场景下的去雨效果。
AI.motivation: 现有去雨方法多依赖合成数据训练，难以泛化到真实场景；雨的混合特性（雨条纹与雨雾）及场景深度对雨强度的影响未被充分建模。
AI.method: 设计包含四模块的Semi-MoreGAN：1) 注意力深度预测网络；2) 基于残差块的上下文特征预测网络；3) 深度引导的金字塔非局部网络；4) 综合半监督损失函数。
AI.result: 在合成与真实雨图像数据集上，该方法较20种先进算法取得显著性能提升，尤其在真实场景中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度与上下文特征的联合建模及半监督学习策略，Semi-MoreGAN有效解决了真实复杂雨场景下的图像去雨问题。

authors_text: Kibo Ote,Fumio Hashimoto,Yuya Onishi,Takashi Isobe,Yasuomi Ouchi
title: List-Mode PET Image Reconstruction Using Deep Image Prior
title_zh: 使用深度图像先验的列表模式 PET 图像重建
abstract: List-mode positron emission tomography (PET) image reconstruction is an important tool for PET scanners with many lines-of-response and additional information such as time-of-flight and depth-of-interaction. Deep learning is one possible solution to enhance the quality of PET image reconstruction. However, the application of deep learning techniques to list-mode PET image reconstruction has not been progressed because list data is a sequence of bit codes and unsuitable for processing by convolutional neural networks (CNN). In this study, we propose a novel list-mode PET image reconstruction method using an unsupervised CNN called deep image prior (DIP) which is the first trial to integrate list-mode PET image reconstruction and CNN. The proposed list-mode DIP reconstruction (LM-DIPRecon) method alternatively iterates the regularized list-mode dynamic row action maximum likelihood algorithm (LM-DRAMA) and magnetic resonance imaging conditioned DIP (MR-DIP) using an alternating direction method of multipliers. We evaluated LM-DIPRecon using both simulation and clinical data, and it achieved sharper images and better tradeoff curves between contrast and noise than the LM-DRAMA, MR-DIP and sinogram-based DIPRecon methods. These results indicated that the LM-DIPRecon is useful for quantitative PET imaging with limited events while keeping accurate raw data information. In addition, as list data has finer temporal information than dynamic sinograms, list-mode deep image prior reconstruction is expected to be useful for 4D PET imaging and motion correction.
summary: List-mode positron emission tomography (PET) image reconstruction is an important tool for PET scanners with many lines-of-response and additional information such as time-of-flight and depth-of-interaction. Deep learning is one possible solution to enhance the quality of PET image reconstruction. However, the application of deep learning techniques to list-mode PET image reconstruction has not been progressed because list data is a sequence of bit codes and unsuitable for processing by convolutional neural networks (CNN). In this study, we propose a novel list-mode PET image reconstruction method using an unsupervised CNN called deep image prior (DIP) which is the first trial to integrate list-mode PET image reconstruction and CNN. The proposed list-mode DIP reconstruction (LM-DIPRecon) method alternatively iterates the regularized list-mode dynamic row action maximum likelihood algorithm (LM-DRAMA) and magnetic resonance imaging conditioned DIP (MR-DIP) using an alternating direction method of multipliers. We evaluated LM-DIPRecon using both simulation and clinical data, and it achieved sharper images and better tradeoff curves between contrast and noise than the LM-DRAMA, MR-DIP and sinogram-based DIPRecon methods. These results indicated that the LM-DIPRecon is useful for quantitative PET imaging with limited events while keeping accurate raw data information. In addition, as list data has finer temporal information than dynamic sinograms, list-mode deep image prior reconstruction is expected to be useful for 4D PET imaging and motion correction.
abstract_zh: 列表模式正电子发射断层扫描 (PET) 图像重建是 PET 扫描仪的重要工具，具有许多响应线以及飞行时间和交互深度等附加信息。深度学习是提高 PET 图像重建质量的一种可能的解决方案。然而，深度学习技术在列表模式PET图像重建中的应用尚未取得进展，因为列表数据是位代码序列，不适合卷积神经网络（CNN）处理。在本研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的列表模式 PET 图像重建方法，使用无监督 CNN，称为深度图像先验（DIP），这是将列表模式 PET 图像重建和 CNN 相结合的首次尝试。所提出的列表模式 DIP 重建 (LM-DIPRecon) 方法使用乘法器交替方向方法交替迭代正则化列表模式动态行动作最大似然算法 (LM-DRAMA) 和磁共振成像条件 DIP (MR-DIP)。我们使用模拟和临床数据评估 LM-DIPRecon，与 LM-DRAMA、MR-DIP 和基于正弦图的 DIPRecon 方法相比，它实现了更清晰的图像以及对比度和噪声之间更好的权衡曲线。这些结果表明 LM-DIPRecon 对于有限事件的定量 PET 成像非常有用，同时保持准确的原始数据信息。此外，由于列表数据比动态正弦图具有更精细的时间信息，因此列表模式深度图像先验重建预计可用于 4D PET 成像和运动校正。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度图像先验（DIP）的列表模式PET图像重建方法LM-DIPRecon，通过结合无监督卷积神经网络提升图像质量。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法难以处理列表模式PET的位码序列数据，而现有重建算法在对比度与噪声平衡上存在不足，需探索新方法以保持原始数据信息并提高定量成像精度。
AI.method: 采用交替方向乘子法迭代正则化LM-DRAMA算法与MRI条件DIP网络（MR-DIP），通过无监督CNN学习先验图像特征实现重建优化。
AI.result: 实验表明LM-DIPRecon在仿真与临床数据中均获得更锐利图像，对比度-噪声曲线优于LM-DRAMA、MR-DIP及基于正弦图的DIPRecon方法。
AI.conclusion: LM-DIPRecon有效融合列表模式数据与深度学习优势，适用于低事件量定量PET成像，并有望拓展至4D PET运动校正领域。

title: Self-supervised Contrastive Learning for Audio-Visual Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于视听动作识别的自监督对比学习
abstract: The underlying correlation between audio and visual modalities can be utilized to learn supervised information for unlabeled videos. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end self-supervised framework named Audio-Visual Contrastive Learning (AVCL), to learn discriminative audio-visual representations for action recognition. Specifically, we design an attention based multi-modal fusion module (AMFM) to fuse audio and visual modalities. To align heterogeneous audio-visual modalities, we construct a novel co-correlation guided representation alignment module (CGRA). To learn supervised information from unlabeled videos, we propose a novel self-supervised contrastive learning module (SelfCL). Furthermore, we build a new audio-visual action recognition dataset named Kinetics-Sounds100. Experimental results on Kinetics-Sounds32 and Kinetics-Sounds100 datasets demonstrate the superiority of our AVCL over the state-of-the-art methods on large-scale action recognition benchmark.
summary: The underlying correlation between audio and visual modalities can be utilized to learn supervised information for unlabeled videos. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end self-supervised framework named Audio-Visual Contrastive Learning (AVCL), to learn discriminative audio-visual representations for action recognition. Specifically, we design an attention based multi-modal fusion module (AMFM) to fuse audio and visual modalities. To align heterogeneous audio-visual modalities, we construct a novel co-correlation guided representation alignment module (CGRA). To learn supervised information from unlabeled videos, we propose a novel self-supervised contrastive learning module (SelfCL). Furthermore, we build a new audio-visual action recognition dataset named Kinetics-Sounds100. Experimental results on Kinetics-Sounds32 and Kinetics-Sounds100 datasets demonstrate the superiority of our AVCL over the state-of-the-art methods on large-scale action recognition benchmark.
abstract_zh: 音频和视觉模态之间的潜在相关性可用于学习未标记视频的监督信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为视听对比学习（AVCL）的端到端自监督框架，用于学习动作识别的辨别性视听表示。具体来说，我们设计了一个基于注意力的多模态融合模块（AMFM）来融合音频和视觉模态。为了对齐异构视听模态，我们构建了一种新颖的共相关引导表示对齐模块（CGRA）。为了从未标记的视频中学习监督信息，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督对比学习模块（SelfCL）。此外，我们构建了一个新的视听动作识别数据集，名为 Kinetics-Sounds100。 Kinetics-Sounds32 和 Kinetics-Sounds100 数据集上的实验结果证明了我们的 AVCL 相对于大规模动作识别基准上最先进的方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自监督对比学习框架用于视听动作识别，以提升未标记视频中动作识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖大量标注数据，但获取困难。利用未标记视频中音频与视觉的关联，可学习有效特征。
AI.method: 设计基于注意力的多模态融合模块（AMFM）、共相关引导的表示对齐模块（CGRA）和自监督对比学习模块（SelfCL），并构建Kinetics-Sounds100数据集。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-Sounds32和Kinetics-Sounds100数据集上，AVCL方法优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效融合视听信息，自监督学习模块提升模型性能，新数据集为未来研究提供支持。

search_text: Self-supervised Contrastive Learning for Audio-Visual Action Recognition 用于视听动作识别的自监督对比学习 The underlying correlation between audio and visual modalities can be utilized to learn supervised information for unlabeled videos. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end self-supervised framework named Audio-Visual Contrastive Learning (AVCL), to learn discriminative audio-visual representations for action recognition. Specifically, we design an attention based multi-modal fusion module (AMFM) to fuse audio and visual modalities. To align heterogeneous audio-visual modalities, we construct a novel co-correlation guided representation alignment module (CGRA). To learn supervised information from unlabeled videos, we propose a novel self-supervised contrastive learning module (SelfCL). Furthermore, we build a new audio-visual action recognition dataset named Kinetics-Sounds100. Experimental results on Kinetics-Sounds32 and Kinetics-Sounds100 datasets demonstrate the superiority of our AVCL over the state-of-the-art methods on large-scale action recognition benchmark. 音频和视觉模态之间的潜在相关性可用于学习未标记视频的监督信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为视听对比学习（AVCL）的端到端自监督框架，用于学习动作识别的辨别性视听表示。具体来说，我们设计了一个基于注意力的多模态融合模块（AMFM）来融合音频和视觉模态。为了对齐异构视听模态，我们构建了一种新颖的共相关引导表示对齐模块（CGRA）。为了从未标记的视频中学习监督信息，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督对比学习模块（SelfCL）。此外，我们构建了一个新的视听动作识别数据集，名为 Kinetics-Sounds100。 Kinetics-Sounds32 和 Kinetics-Sounds100 数据集上的实验结果证明了我们的 AVCL 相对于大规模动作识别基准上最先进的方法的优越性。 提出一种自监督对比学习框架用于视听动作识别，以提升未标记视频中动作识别的性能。 Yang Liu,Ying Tan,Haoyuan Lan cs.CV

authors_text: Gour Sundar Mitra Thakur,Rupak Bhattacharyya,Seema Sarkar
title: Fuzzy Expert System for Stock Portfolio Selection: An Application to Bombay Stock Exchange
title_zh: 股票投资组合选择的模糊专家系统：在孟买证券交易所的应用
abstract: Selection of proper stocks, before allocating investment ratios, is always a crucial task for the investors. Presence of many influencing factors in stock performance have motivated researchers to adopt various Artificial Intelligence (AI) techniques to make this challenging task easier. In this paper a novel fuzzy expert system model is proposed to evaluate and rank the stocks under Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE). Dempster-Shafer (DS) evidence theory is used for the first time to automatically generate the consequents of the fuzzy rule base to reduce the effort in knowledge base development of the expert system. Later a portfolio optimization model is constructed where the objective function is considered as the ratio of the difference of fuzzy portfolio return and the risk free return to the weighted mean semi-variance of the assets that has been used. The model is solved by applying Ant Colony Optimization (ACO) algorithm by giving preference to the top ranked stocks. The performance of the model proved to be satisfactory for short-term investment period when compared with the recent performance of the stocks.
summary: Selection of proper stocks, before allocating investment ratios, is always a crucial task for the investors. Presence of many influencing factors in stock performance have motivated researchers to adopt various Artificial Intelligence (AI) techniques to make this challenging task easier. In this paper a novel fuzzy expert system model is proposed to evaluate and rank the stocks under Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE). Dempster-Shafer (DS) evidence theory is used for the first time to automatically generate the consequents of the fuzzy rule base to reduce the effort in knowledge base development of the expert system. Later a portfolio optimization model is constructed where the objective function is considered as the ratio of the difference of fuzzy portfolio return and the risk free return to the weighted mean semi-variance of the assets that has been used. The model is solved by applying Ant Colony Optimization (ACO) algorithm by giving preference to the top ranked stocks. The performance of the model proved to be satisfactory for short-term investment period when compared with the recent performance of the stocks.
abstract_zh: 在分配投资比例之前选择合适的股票始终是投资者的首要任务。股票表现存在许多影响因素，促使研究人员采用各种人工智能（AI）技术来简化这项具有挑战性的任务。本文提出了一种新颖的模糊专家系统模型来对孟买证券交易所（BSE）的股票进行评估和排名。首次采用Dempster-Shafer（DS）证据理论自动生成模糊规则库的结果，减少专家系统知识库开发的工作量。随后构建了投资组合优化模型，其中目标函数被认为是模糊投资组合收益和无风险收益之差与已使用资产的加权平均半方差的比率。该模型通过应用蚁群优化（ACO）算法并优先考虑排名靠前的股票来求解。与股票近期表现相比，该模型的短期投资表现令人满意。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模糊专家系统和 Dempster-Shafer 理论的股票组合选择模型，并结合蚁群优化算法进行优化，应用于孟买证券交易所。
AI.motivation: 股票选择受多重因素影响，传统方法难以处理不确定性，需借助人工智能技术提升决策效率与准确性。
AI.method: 采用模糊专家系统结合 Dempster-Shafer 证据理论自动生成模糊规则，通过蚁群优化算法求解以半方差为风险指标的组合优化模型。
AI.result: 模型在短期投资周期内表现优于近期股票实际表现，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 融合模糊逻辑与群体智能算法的混合模型为股票组合优化提供了可行方案，尤其适用于短期投资决策。

title: Reducing Predictive Feature Suppression in Resource-Constrained Contrastive Image-Caption Retrieval
title_zh: 减少资源受限的对比图像字幕检索中的预测特征抑制
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=T1XtOqrVKn Code: https://github.com/MauritsBleeker/reducing-predictive-feature-suppression. Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oxa5AbGrKCY
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=T1XtOqrVKn Code: https://github.com/MauritsBleeker/reducing-predictive-feature-suppression. Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oxa5AbGrKCY
abstract: To train image-caption retrieval (ICR) methods, contrastive loss functions are a common choice for optimization functions. Unfortunately, contrastive ICR methods are vulnerable to predictive feature suppression. Predictive features are features that correctly indicate the similarity between a query and a candidate item. However, in the presence of multiple predictive features during training, encoder models tend to suppress redundant predictive features, since these features are not needed to learn to discriminate between positive and negative pairs. While some predictive features are redundant during training, these features might be relevant during evaluation. We introduce an approach to reduce predictive feature suppression for resource-constrained ICR methods: latent target decoding (LTD). We add an additional decoder to the contrastive ICR framework, to reconstruct the input caption in a latent space of a general-purpose sentence encoder, which prevents the image and caption encoder from suppressing predictive features. We implement the LTD objective as an optimization constraint, to ensure that the reconstruction loss is below a bound value while primarily optimizing for the contrastive loss. Importantly, LTD does not depend on additional training data or expensive (hard) negative mining strategies. Our experiments show that, unlike reconstructing the input caption in the input space, LTD reduces predictive feature suppression, measured by obtaining higher recall@k, r-precision, and nDCG scores than a contrastive ICR baseline. Moreover, we show that LTD should be implemented as an optimization constraint instead of a dual optimization objective. Finally, we show that LTD can be used with different contrastive learning losses and a wide variety of resource-constrained ICR methods.
summary: To train image-caption retrieval (ICR) methods, contrastive loss functions are a common choice for optimization functions. Unfortunately, contrastive ICR methods are vulnerable to predictive feature suppression. Predictive features are features that correctly indicate the similarity between a query and a candidate item. However, in the presence of multiple predictive features during training, encoder models tend to suppress redundant predictive features, since these features are not needed to learn to discriminate between positive and negative pairs. While some predictive features are redundant during training, these features might be relevant during evaluation. We introduce an approach to reduce predictive feature suppression for resource-constrained ICR methods: latent target decoding (LTD). We add an additional decoder to the contrastive ICR framework, to reconstruct the input caption in a latent space of a general-purpose sentence encoder, which prevents the image and caption encoder from suppressing predictive features. We implement the LTD objective as an optimization constraint, to ensure that the reconstruction loss is below a bound value while primarily optimizing for the contrastive loss. Importantly, LTD does not depend on additional training data or expensive (hard) negative mining strategies. Our experiments show that, unlike reconstructing the input caption in the input space, LTD reduces predictive feature suppression, measured by obtaining higher recall@k, r-precision, and nDCG scores than a contrastive ICR baseline. Moreover, we show that LTD should be implemented as an optimization constraint instead of a dual optimization objective. Finally, we show that LTD can be used with different contrastive learning losses and a wide variety of resource-constrained ICR methods.
abstract_zh: 为了训练图像标题检索（ICR）方法，对比损失函数是优化函数的常见选择。不幸的是，对比 ICR 方法很容易受到预测特征抑制的影响。预测特征是正确指示查询和候选项目之间相似性的特征。然而，在训练期间存在多个预测特征的情况下，编码器模型倾向于抑制冗余预测特征，因为不需要这些特征来学习区分正负对。虽然某些预测特征在训练期间是多余的，但这些特征在评估期间可能是相关的。我们引入了一种减少资源受限 ICR 方法的预测特征抑制的方法：潜在目标解码（LTD）。我们在对比 ICR 框架中添加了一个额外的解码器，以在通用句子编码器的潜在空间中重建输入标题，从而防止图像和标题编码器抑制预测特征。我们将 LTD 目标实现为优化约束，以确保重建损失低于界限值，同时主要优化对比损失。重要的是，LTD 不依赖于额外的训练数据或昂贵的（困难的）负面挖掘策略。我们的实验表明，与在输入空间中重建输入标题不同，LTD 减少了预测特征抑制，这是通过获得比对比 ICR 基线更高的召回@k、r 精度和 nDCG 分数来衡量的。此外，我们表明 LTD 应该作为优化约束而不是双重优化目标来实现。最后，我们证明 LTD 可以与不同的对比学习损失和各种资源受限的 ICR 方法一起使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为潜在目标解码（LTD）的方法，用于减少资源受限的对比图像-标题检索中的预测特征抑制问题。
AI.motivation: 对比图像-标题检索方法在训练时会抑制冗余的预测特征，而这些特征在评估时可能至关重要，导致检索性能下降。
AI.method: 通过向对比框架添加解码器，在通用句子编码器的潜在空间中重建输入标题，将LTD作为优化约束条件，防止特征抑制。
AI.result: 实验表明，LTD在recall@k、r-precision和nDCG指标上优于基线方法，且应作为约束而非双重目标实现。
AI.conclusion: LTD能有效减少预测特征抑制，适用于多种对比学习损失和资源受限的ICR方法，无需额外数据或复杂策略。

motivation: 对比图像-标题检索方法在训练时会抑制冗余的预测特征，而这些特征在评估时可能至关重要，导致检索性能下降。

search_text: Reducing Predictive Feature Suppression in Resource-Constrained Contrastive Image-Caption Retrieval 减少资源受限的对比图像字幕检索中的预测特征抑制 To train image-caption retrieval (ICR) methods, contrastive loss functions are a common choice for optimization functions. Unfortunately, contrastive ICR methods are vulnerable to predictive feature suppression. Predictive features are features that correctly indicate the similarity between a query and a candidate item. However, in the presence of multiple predictive features during training, encoder models tend to suppress redundant predictive features, since these features are not needed to learn to discriminate between positive and negative pairs. While some predictive features are redundant during training, these features might be relevant during evaluation. We introduce an approach to reduce predictive feature suppression for resource-constrained ICR methods: latent target decoding (LTD). We add an additional decoder to the contrastive ICR framework, to reconstruct the input caption in a latent space of a general-purpose sentence encoder, which prevents the image and caption encoder from suppressing predictive features. We implement the LTD objective as an optimization constraint, to ensure that the reconstruction loss is below a bound value while primarily optimizing for the contrastive loss. Importantly, LTD does not depend on additional training data or expensive (hard) negative mining strategies. Our experiments show that, unlike reconstructing the input caption in the input space, LTD reduces predictive feature suppression, measured by obtaining higher recall@k, r-precision, and nDCG scores than a contrastive ICR baseline. Moreover, we show that LTD should be implemented as an optimization constraint instead of a dual optimization objective. Finally, we show that LTD can be used with different contrastive learning losses and a wide variety of resource-constrained ICR methods. 为了训练图像标题检索（ICR）方法，对比损失函数是优化函数的常见选择。不幸的是，对比 ICR 方法很容易受到预测特征抑制的影响。预测特征是正确指示查询和候选项目之间相似性的特征。然而，在训练期间存在多个预测特征的情况下，编码器模型倾向于抑制冗余预测特征，因为不需要这些特征来学习区分正负对。虽然某些预测特征在训练期间是多余的，但这些特征在评估期间可能是相关的。我们引入了一种减少资源受限 ICR 方法的预测特征抑制的方法：潜在目标解码（LTD）。我们在对比 ICR 框架中添加了一个额外的解码器，以在通用句子编码器的潜在空间中重建输入标题，从而防止图像和标题编码器抑制预测特征。我们将 LTD 目标实现为优化约束，以确保重建损失低于界限值，同时主要优化对比损失。重要的是，LTD 不依赖于额外的训练数据或昂贵的（困难的）负面挖掘策略。我们的实验表明，与在输入空间中重建输入标题不同，LTD 减少了预测特征抑制，这是通过获得比对比 ICR 基线更高的召回@k、r 精度和 nDCG 分数来衡量的。此外，我们表明 LTD 应该作为优化约束而不是双重优化目标来实现。最后，我们证明 LTD 可以与不同的对比学习损失和各种资源受限的 ICR 方法一起使用。 本文提出一种名为潜在目标解码（LTD）的方法，用于减少资源受限的对比图像-标题检索中的预测特征抑制问题。 Maurits Bleeker,Andrew Yates,Maarten de Rijke cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Learning General Inventory Management Policy for Large Supply Chain Network
title_zh: 学习大型供应链网络的通用库存管理策略
abstract: Inventory management in warehouses directly affects profits made by manufacturers. Particularly, large manufacturers produce a very large variety of products that are handled by a significantly large number of retailers. In such a case, the computational complexity of classical inventory management algorithms is inordinately large. In recent years, learning-based approaches have become popular for addressing such problems. However, previous studies have not been managed systems where both the number of products and retailers are large. This study proposes a reinforcement learning-based warehouse inventory management algorithm that can be used for supply chain systems where both the number of products and retailers are large. To solve the computational problem of handling large systems, we provide a means of approximate simulation of the system in the training phase. Our experiments on both real and artificial data demonstrate that our algorithm with approximated simulation can successfully handle large supply chain networks.
summary: Inventory management in warehouses directly affects profits made by manufacturers. Particularly, large manufacturers produce a very large variety of products that are handled by a significantly large number of retailers. In such a case, the computational complexity of classical inventory management algorithms is inordinately large. In recent years, learning-based approaches have become popular for addressing such problems. However, previous studies have not been managed systems where both the number of products and retailers are large. This study proposes a reinforcement learning-based warehouse inventory management algorithm that can be used for supply chain systems where both the number of products and retailers are large. To solve the computational problem of handling large systems, we provide a means of approximate simulation of the system in the training phase. Our experiments on both real and artificial data demonstrate that our algorithm with approximated simulation can successfully handle large supply chain networks.
abstract_zh: 仓库的库存管理直接影响制造商的利润。特别是，大型制造商生产种类繁多的产品，并由大量零售商经营。在这种情况下，经典库存管理算法的计算复杂度非常大。近年来，基于学习的方法已成为解决此类问题的流行方法。然而，以前的研究并没有针对产品数量和零售商数量都很大的管理系统。本研究提出了一种基于强化学习的仓库库存管理算法，可用于产品数量和零售商数量都很大的供应链系统。为了解决处理大型系统的计算问题，我们提供了一种在训练阶段对系统进行近似模拟的方法。我们对真实数据和人工数据的实验表明，我们的近似模拟算法可以成功处理大型供应链网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的库存管理算法，用于解决大规模供应链网络中产品与零售商数量庞大的库存管理问题。
AI.motivation: 传统库存管理算法在处理大规模供应链网络时计算复杂度过高，现有研究未能有效应对产品和零售商数量均庞大的场景。
AI.method: 设计强化学习框架并引入近似模拟系统，在训练阶段降低大规模系统的计算负担。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在真实和人工数据集上均能有效处理大规模供应链网络的库存管理问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过近似模拟与强化学习结合，提出的算法为大规模供应链库存管理提供了可行的通用解决方案。

title: Morphing Attack Potential
title_zh: 变形攻击潜力
comment: This paper is a preprint of a paper accepted by IEEE International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics (IWBF 2022). When the final version is published, the copy of record will be available at the IEEE Xplore in proceedings IEEE International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics (IWBF), Salzburg, Austria, April 2022
comments: This paper is a preprint of a paper accepted by IEEE International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics (IWBF 2022). When the final version is published, the copy of record will be available at the IEEE Xplore in proceedings IEEE International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics (IWBF), Salzburg, Austria, April 2022
abstract: In security systems the risk assessment in the sense of common criteria testing is a very relevant topic; this requires quantifying the attack potential in terms of the expertise of the attacker, his knowledge about the target and access to equipment. Contrary to those attacks, the recently revealed morphing attacks against Face Recognition Systems (FRSs) can not be assessed by any of the above criteria. But not all morphing techniques pose the same risk for an operational face recognition system. This paper introduces with the Morphing Attack Potential (MAP) a consistent methodology, that can quantify the risk, which a certain morphing attack creates.
summary: In security systems the risk assessment in the sense of common criteria testing is a very relevant topic; this requires quantifying the attack potential in terms of the expertise of the attacker, his knowledge about the target and access to equipment. Contrary to those attacks, the recently revealed morphing attacks against Face Recognition Systems (FRSs) can not be assessed by any of the above criteria. But not all morphing techniques pose the same risk for an operational face recognition system. This paper introduces with the Morphing Attack Potential (MAP) a consistent methodology, that can quantify the risk, which a certain morphing attack creates.
abstract_zh: 在安全系统中，通用标准测试意义上的风险评估是一个非常相关的主题；这需要根据攻击者的专业知识、对目标的了解以及对设备的访问来量化攻击潜力。与这些攻击相反，最近披露的针对人脸识别系统（FRS）的变形攻击不能用上述任何标准进行评估。但并非所有变形技术都会给可操作的人脸识别系统带来同样的风险。本文通过变形攻击潜力 (MAP) 介绍了一种一致的方法，可以量化特定变形攻击所产生的风险。

AI.tldr: 提出一种量化形态攻击风险的方法（MAP）
AI.motivation: 现有风险评估标准无法有效评估形态攻击，需新方法量化其风险
AI.method: 引入Morphing Attack Potential（MAP）方法，量化形态攻击对系统的影响
AI.result: 该方法能有效区分不同形态攻击的风险等级
AI.conclusion: MAP方法为形态攻击风险评估提供了有效框架

authors_text: Francis Seits,Indrajit Kurmi,Rakesh John Amala Arokia Nathan,Rudolf Ortner,Oliver Bimber
title: On the Role of Field of View for Occlusion Removal with Airborne Optical Sectioning
title_zh: 关于机载光学切片视场去除遮挡的作用
abstract: Occlusion caused by vegetation is an essential problem for remote sensing applications in areas, such as search and rescue, wildfire detection, wildlife observation, surveillance, border control, and others. Airborne Optical Sectioning (AOS) is an optical, wavelength-independent synthetic aperture imaging technique that supports computational occlusion removal in real-time. It can be applied with manned or unmanned aircrafts, such as drones. In this article, we demonstrate a relationship between forest density and field of view (FOV) of applied imaging systems. This finding was made with the help of a simulated procedural forest model which offers the consideration of more realistic occlusion properties than our previous statistical model. While AOS has been explored with automatic and autonomous research prototypes in the past, we present a free AOS integration for DJI systems. It enables bluelight organizations and others to use and explore AOS with compatible, manually operated, off-the-shelf drones. The (digitally cropped) default FOV for this implementation was chosen based on our new finding.
summary: Occlusion caused by vegetation is an essential problem for remote sensing applications in areas, such as search and rescue, wildfire detection, wildlife observation, surveillance, border control, and others. Airborne Optical Sectioning (AOS) is an optical, wavelength-independent synthetic aperture imaging technique that supports computational occlusion removal in real-time. It can be applied with manned or unmanned aircrafts, such as drones. In this article, we demonstrate a relationship between forest density and field of view (FOV) of applied imaging systems. This finding was made with the help of a simulated procedural forest model which offers the consideration of more realistic occlusion properties than our previous statistical model. While AOS has been explored with automatic and autonomous research prototypes in the past, we present a free AOS integration for DJI systems. It enables bluelight organizations and others to use and explore AOS with compatible, manually operated, off-the-shelf drones. The (digitally cropped) default FOV for this implementation was chosen based on our new finding.
abstract_zh: 植被造成的遮挡是搜救、野火探测、野生动物观察、监视、边境管制等领域遥感应用的一个重要问题。机载光学切片 (AOS) 是一种与波长无关的光学合成孔径成像技术，支持实时计算遮挡去除。它可以应用于有人或无人驾驶飞机，例如无人机。在本文中，我们展示了森林密度与应用成像系统的视场 (FOV) 之间的关系。这一发现是在模拟程序森林模型的帮助下得出的，该模型比我们之前的统计模型考虑了更现实的遮挡属性。虽然过去已经通过自动和自主研究原型探索了 AOS，但我们为 DJI 系统提供了免费的 AOS 集成。它使蓝光组织和其他组织能够通过兼容的、手动操作的现成无人机来使用和探索 AOS。此实现的（数字裁剪的）默认 FOV 是根据我们的新发现选择的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了视场角（FOV）在机载光学分层（AOS）技术中对植被遮挡去除的影响，并开发了适用于DJI无人机的AOS集成方案。
AI.motivation: 植被遮挡影响遥感应用效果，传统方法不足，需优化AOS的FOV以适应不同环境，并推广其在无人机上的应用。
AI.method: 基于模拟程序化森林模型分析FOV与森林密度关系，并为DJI无人机开发AOS集成，采用默认裁剪FOV进行测试。
AI.result: 确定了FOV与森林密度的关联，开发出适用于DJI无人机的AOS集成，提升了实际应用的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化FOV参数提升AOS在复杂植被环境下的性能，并为无人机应用提供了可行的解决方案。

search_text: On the Role of Field of View for Occlusion Removal with Airborne Optical Sectioning 关于机载光学切片视场去除遮挡的作用 Occlusion caused by vegetation is an essential problem for remote sensing applications in areas, such as search and rescue, wildfire detection, wildlife observation, surveillance, border control, and others. Airborne Optical Sectioning (AOS) is an optical, wavelength-independent synthetic aperture imaging technique that supports computational occlusion removal in real-time. It can be applied with manned or unmanned aircrafts, such as drones. In this article, we demonstrate a relationship between forest density and field of view (FOV) of applied imaging systems. This finding was made with the help of a simulated procedural forest model which offers the consideration of more realistic occlusion properties than our previous statistical model. While AOS has been explored with automatic and autonomous research prototypes in the past, we present a free AOS integration for DJI systems. It enables bluelight organizations and others to use and explore AOS with compatible, manually operated, off-the-shelf drones. The (digitally cropped) default FOV for this implementation was chosen based on our new finding. 植被造成的遮挡是搜救、野火探测、野生动物观察、监视、边境管制等领域遥感应用的一个重要问题。机载光学切片 (AOS) 是一种与波长无关的光学合成孔径成像技术，支持实时计算遮挡去除。它可以应用于有人或无人驾驶飞机，例如无人机。在本文中，我们展示了森林密度与应用成像系统的视场 (FOV) 之间的关系。这一发现是在模拟程序森林模型的帮助下得出的，该模型比我们之前的统计模型考虑了更现实的遮挡属性。虽然过去已经通过自动和自主研究原型探索了 AOS，但我们为 DJI 系统提供了免费的 AOS 集成。它使蓝光组织和其他组织能够通过兼容的、手动操作的现成无人机来使用和探索 AOS。此实现的（数字裁剪的）默认 FOV 是根据我们的新发现选择的。 本文研究了视场角（FOV）在机载光学分层（AOS）技术中对植被遮挡去除的影响，并开发了适用于DJI无人机的AOS集成方案。 Francis Seits,Indrajit Kurmi,Rakesh John Amala Arokia Nathan,Rudolf Ortner,Oliver Bimber cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Semantic Information Recovery in Wireless Networks
title_zh: 无线网络中的语义信息恢复
comment: Submitted for peer review. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2305.03571
comments: Submitted for peer review. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2305.03571
abstract: Motivated by the recent success of Machine Learning (ML) tools in wireless communications, the idea of semantic communication by Weaver from 1949 has gained attention. It breaks with Shannon's classic design paradigm by aiming to transmit the meaning of a message, i.e., semantics, rather than its exact version and thus allows for savings in information rate. In this work, we extend the fundamental approach from Basu et al. for modeling semantics to the complete communications Markov chain. Thus, we model semantics by means of hidden random variables and define the semantic communication task as the data-reduced and reliable transmission of messages over a communication channel such that semantics is best preserved. We cast this task as an end-to-end Information Bottleneck problem, allowing for compression while preserving relevant information most. As a solution approach, we propose the ML-based semantic communication system SINFONY and use it for a distributed multipoint scenario: SINFONY communicates the meaning behind multiple messages that are observed at different senders to a single receiver for semantic recovery. We analyze SINFONY by processing images as message examples. Numerical results reveal a tremendous rate-normalized SNR shift up to 20 dB compared to classically designed communication systems.
summary: Motivated by the recent success of Machine Learning (ML) tools in wireless communications, the idea of semantic communication by Weaver from 1949 has gained attention. It breaks with Shannon's classic design paradigm by aiming to transmit the meaning of a message, i.e., semantics, rather than its exact version and thus allows for savings in information rate. In this work, we extend the fundamental approach from Basu et al. for modeling semantics to the complete communications Markov chain. Thus, we model semantics by means of hidden random variables and define the semantic communication task as the data-reduced and reliable transmission of messages over a communication channel such that semantics is best preserved. We cast this task as an end-to-end Information Bottleneck problem, allowing for compression while preserving relevant information most. As a solution approach, we propose the ML-based semantic communication system SINFONY and use it for a distributed multipoint scenario: SINFONY communicates the meaning behind multiple messages that are observed at different senders to a single receiver for semantic recovery. We analyze SINFONY by processing images as message examples. Numerical results reveal a tremendous rate-normalized SNR shift up to 20 dB compared to classically designed communication systems.
abstract_zh: 受机器学习 (ML) 工具最近在无线通信领域取得成功的推动，Weaver 自 1949 年提出的语义通信理念引起了人们的关注。它打破了香农的经典设计范式，旨在传输消息的含义，即语义，而不是其确切版本，从而节省信息率。在这项工作中，我们扩展了 Basu 等人的基本方法。用于对完整通信马尔可夫链进行语义建模。因此，我们通过隐藏的随机变量对语义进行建模，并将语义通信任务定义为通过通信通道进行数据减少且可靠的消息传输，从而最好地保留语义。我们将此任务视为端到端信息瓶颈问题，允许压缩，同时保留最多的相关信息。作为一种解决方案，我们提出了基于 ML 的语义通信系统 SINFONY 并将其用于分布式多点场景：SINFONY 将不同发送方观察到的多个消息背后的含义传达给单个接收方以进行语义恢复。我们通过将图像处理为消息示例来分析 SINFONY。数值结果表明，与经典设计的通信系统相比，速率归一化 SNR 发生了高达 20 dB 的巨大变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于机器学习的语义通信系统SINFONY，用于在无线网络中恢复多点场景下的语义信息。
AI.motivation: 受机器学习在无线通信中的成功应用启发，传统香农范式传输精确信息效率低下，需探索语义层面的信息传输以提升通信效率。
AI.method: 扩展Basu等人的语义建模方法至完整通信链，通过隐藏变量表征语义，将任务转化为端到端信息瓶颈问题，并设计SINFONY系统实现多点语义恢复。
AI.result: 在图像传输实验中，SINFONY相比传统系统实现高达20dB的信噪比提升，验证了语义通信的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SINFONY系统证明了语义通信在无线网络中的潜力，为未来高效通信设计提供新方向。

title: Poly-CAM: High resolution class activation map for convolutional neural networks
title_zh: Poly-CAM：卷积神经网络的高分辨率类激活图
comment: The PolyCAM method was accepted at ICPR 2022 under the name "Backward recursive Class Activation Map refinement for high resolution saliency map"
comments: The PolyCAM method was accepted at ICPR 2022 under the name "Backward recursive Class Activation Map refinement for high resolution saliency map"
abstract: The need for Explainable AI is increasing with the development of deep learning. The saliency maps derived from convolutional neural networks generally fail in localizing with accuracy the image features justifying the network prediction. This is because those maps are either low-resolution as for CAM [Zhou et al., 2016], or smooth as for perturbation-based methods [Zeiler and Fergus, 2014], or do correspond to a large number of widespread peaky spots as for gradient-based approaches [Sundararajan et al., 2017, Smilkov et al., 2017]. In contrast, our work proposes to combine the information from earlier network layers with the one from later layers to produce a high resolution Class Activation Map that is competitive with the previous art in term of insertion-deletion faithfulness metrics, while outperforming it in term of precision of class-specific features localization.
summary: The need for Explainable AI is increasing with the development of deep learning. The saliency maps derived from convolutional neural networks generally fail in localizing with accuracy the image features justifying the network prediction. This is because those maps are either low-resolution as for CAM [Zhou et al., 2016], or smooth as for perturbation-based methods [Zeiler and Fergus, 2014], or do correspond to a large number of widespread peaky spots as for gradient-based approaches [Sundararajan et al., 2017, Smilkov et al., 2017]. In contrast, our work proposes to combine the information from earlier network layers with the one from later layers to produce a high resolution Class Activation Map that is competitive with the previous art in term of insertion-deletion faithfulness metrics, while outperforming it in term of precision of class-specific features localization.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的发展，对可解释人工智能的需求不断增加。从卷积神经网络导出的显着性图通常无法准确定位证明网络预测合理的图像特征。这是因为这些地图要么对于 CAM 来说是低分辨率的 [Zhou et al., 2016]，要么对于基于扰动的方法来说是平滑的 [Zeiler and Fergus, 2014]，或者对于基于梯度的方法来说确实对应于大量广泛的峰值点 [Sundararajan et al., 2017, Smilkov et al., 2017]。相比之下，我们的工作建议将早期网络层的信息与后面层的信息结合起来，生成高分辨率的类激活图，该图在插入删除忠实度指标方面与先前的技术具有竞争力，同时在特定于类的特征定位的精度方面优于先前的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高分辨率的类激活图方法Poly-CAM，以提高卷积神经网络预测结果的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有类激活图方法存在分辨率低、定位模糊或产生大量离散峰值的问题，难以准确定位图像中支持网络预测的关键特征。
AI.method: 通过融合网络早期层与后期层的信息，生成高分辨率且精确的类激活图。
AI.result: 在插入-删除忠实度指标上达到现有水平，同时在类特定特征定位精度上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Poly-CAM有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为深度学习模型提供了更精确的可视化解释工具。

authors_text: Yang Yang,Zhiying Cui,Junjie Xu,Changhong Zhong,Wei-Shi Zheng,Ruixuan Wang
title: Continual Learning with Bayesian Model based on a Fixed Pre-trained Feature Extractor
title_zh: 基于固定预训练特征提取器的贝叶斯模型持续学习
abstract: Deep learning has shown its human-level performance in various applications. However, current deep learning models are characterised by catastrophic forgetting of old knowledge when learning new classes. This poses a challenge particularly in intelligent diagnosis systems where initially only training data of a limited number of diseases are available. In this case, updating the intelligent system with data of new diseases would inevitably downgrade its performance on previously learned diseases. Inspired by the process of learning new knowledge in human brains, we propose a Bayesian generative model for continual learning built on a fixed pre-trained feature extractor. In this model, knowledge of each old class can be compactly represented by a collection of statistical distributions, e.g. with Gaussian mixture models, and naturally kept from forgetting in continual learning over time. Unlike existing class-incremental learning methods, the proposed approach is not sensitive to the continual learning process and can be additionally well applied to the data-incremental learning scenario. Experiments on multiple medical and natural image classification tasks showed that the proposed approach outperforms state-of-the-art approaches which even keep some images of old classes during continual learning of new classes.
summary: Deep learning has shown its human-level performance in various applications. However, current deep learning models are characterised by catastrophic forgetting of old knowledge when learning new classes. This poses a challenge particularly in intelligent diagnosis systems where initially only training data of a limited number of diseases are available. In this case, updating the intelligent system with data of new diseases would inevitably downgrade its performance on previously learned diseases. Inspired by the process of learning new knowledge in human brains, we propose a Bayesian generative model for continual learning built on a fixed pre-trained feature extractor. In this model, knowledge of each old class can be compactly represented by a collection of statistical distributions, e.g. with Gaussian mixture models, and naturally kept from forgetting in continual learning over time. Unlike existing class-incremental learning methods, the proposed approach is not sensitive to the continual learning process and can be additionally well applied to the data-incremental learning scenario. Experiments on multiple medical and natural image classification tasks showed that the proposed approach outperforms state-of-the-art approaches which even keep some images of old classes during continual learning of new classes.
abstract_zh: 深度学习已经在各种应用中展示了其人类水平的性能。然而，当前的深度学习模型的特点是在学习新课程时会灾难性地忘记旧知识。这在智能诊断系统中尤其提出了挑战，因为智能诊断系统最初只能获得有限数量的疾病的训练数据。在这种情况下，用新疾病的数据更新智能系统将不可避免地降低其对先前已知疾病的性能。受人类大脑学习新知识过程的启发，我们提出了一种基于固定的预训练特征提取器的持续学习贝叶斯生成模型。在这个模型中，每个旧类别的知识可以通过统计分布的集合来紧凑地表示，例如使用高斯混合模型，随着时间的推移，在不断学习中自然不会忘记。与现有的类增量学习方法不同，所提出的方法对持续学习过程不敏感，并且可以很好地应用于数据增量学习场景。对多个医学和自然图像分类任务的实验表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的方法，甚至在不断学习新类别的过程中保留旧类别的一些图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于固定预训练特征提取器的贝叶斯生成模型，用于解决持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在新增类别时易遗忘旧知识，这对医疗诊断等需要持续更新的场景造成性能下降，现有方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 构建基于固定特征提取器的贝叶斯模型，通过高斯混合模型等统计分布压缩表示旧类知识，实现类增量和数据增量学习。
AI.result: 在多个医学和自然图像分类任务中，该方法优于现有技术，即使保留旧类样本也能保持性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解灾难性遗忘，适用于动态知识更新场景，为智能诊断系统提供可靠解决方案。

title: Deep Generalized Unfolding Networks for Image Restoration
title_zh: 用于图像恢复的深度广义展开网络
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNN) have achieved great success in image restoration. However, most DNN methods are designed as a black box, lacking transparency and interpretability. Although some methods are proposed to combine traditional optimization algorithms with DNN, they usually demand pre-defined degradation processes or handcrafted assumptions, making it difficult to deal with complex and real-world applications. In this paper, we propose a Deep Generalized Unfolding Network (DGUNet) for image restoration. Concretely, without loss of interpretability, we integrate a gradient estimation strategy into the gradient descent step of the Proximal Gradient Descent (PGD) algorithm, driving it to deal with complex and real-world image degradation. In addition, we design inter-stage information pathways across proximal mapping in different PGD iterations to rectify the intrinsic information loss in most deep unfolding networks (DUN) through a multi-scale and spatial-adaptive way. By integrating the flexible gradient descent and informative proximal mapping, we unfold the iterative PGD algorithm into a trainable DNN. Extensive experiments on various image restoration tasks demonstrate the superiority of our method in terms of state-of-the-art performance, interpretability, and generalizability. The source code is available at https://github.com/MC-E/Deep-Generalized-Unfolding-Networks-for-Image-Restoration.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNN) have achieved great success in image restoration. However, most DNN methods are designed as a black box, lacking transparency and interpretability. Although some methods are proposed to combine traditional optimization algorithms with DNN, they usually demand pre-defined degradation processes or handcrafted assumptions, making it difficult to deal with complex and real-world applications. In this paper, we propose a Deep Generalized Unfolding Network (DGUNet) for image restoration. Concretely, without loss of interpretability, we integrate a gradient estimation strategy into the gradient descent step of the Proximal Gradient Descent (PGD) algorithm, driving it to deal with complex and real-world image degradation. In addition, we design inter-stage information pathways across proximal mapping in different PGD iterations to rectify the intrinsic information loss in most deep unfolding networks (DUN) through a multi-scale and spatial-adaptive way. By integrating the flexible gradient descent and informative proximal mapping, we unfold the iterative PGD algorithm into a trainable DNN. Extensive experiments on various image restoration tasks demonstrate the superiority of our method in terms of state-of-the-art performance, interpretability, and generalizability. The source code is available at https://github.com/MC-E/Deep-Generalized-Unfolding-Networks-for-Image-Restoration.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在图像恢复方面取得了巨大成功。然而，大多数 DNN 方法被设计为黑匣子，缺乏透明度和可解释性。尽管提出了一些将传统优化算法与 DNN 相结合的方法，但它们通常需要预定义的退化过程或手工假设，从而难以处理复杂的实际应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于图像恢复的深度广义展开网络（DGUNet）。具体来说，在不损失可解释性的情况下，我们将梯度估计策略集成到近端梯度下降（PGD）算法的梯度下降步骤中，驱动它处理复杂和现实世界的图像退化。此外，我们设计了不同PGD迭代中跨近端映射的阶段间信息路径，以通过多尺度和空间自适应的方式纠正大多数深层展开网络（DUN）中的内在信息丢失。通过集成灵活的梯度下降和信息丰富的近端映射，我们将迭代 PGD 算法展开为可训练的 DNN。对各种图像恢复任务的大量实验证明了我们的方法在最先进的性能、可解释性和通用性方面的优越性。源代码可在 https://github.com/MC-E/Deep-Generalized-Unfolding-Networks-for-Image-Restoration 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DGUNet的深度通用展开网络，用于图像修复任务，旨在提高模型的可解释性和实际应用效果。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络（DNN）方法在图像修复中缺乏透明度和可解释性，而结合传统优化算法的方法依赖预定义退化过程或手工设计假设，难以应对复杂真实场景。
AI.method: 将梯度估计策略融入近端梯度下降（PGD）算法的梯度下降步骤，并设计跨不同PGD迭代的多尺度空间自适应信息路径，以减少信息丢失，构建可训练的深度展开网络。
AI.result: 在多种图像修复任务中，DGUNet在性能、可解释性和泛化能力方面均优于现有方法，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: DGUNet通过灵活的梯度下降与信息保留机制，有效结合优化算法与深度学习，为复杂图像修复提供了更可靠且可解释的解决方案。

title: A Closer Look at Branch Classifiers of Multi-exit Architectures
title_zh: 仔细观察多出口架构的分支分类器
comment: under consideration at Computer Vision and Image Understanding
comments: under consideration at Computer Vision and Image Understanding
abstract: Multi-exit architectures consist of a backbone and branch classifiers that offer shortened inference pathways to reduce the run-time of deep neural networks. In this paper, we analyze different branching patterns that vary in their allocation of computational complexity for the branch classifiers. Constant-complexity branching keeps all branches the same, while complexity-increasing and complexity-decreasing branching place more complex branches later or earlier in the backbone respectively. Through extensive experimentation on multiple backbones and datasets, we find that complexity-decreasing branches are more effective than constant-complexity or complexity-increasing branches, which achieve the best accuracy-cost trade-off. We investigate a cause by using knowledge consistency to probe the effect of adding branches onto a backbone. Our findings show that complexity-decreasing branching yields the least disruption to the feature abstraction hierarchy of the backbone, which explains the effectiveness of the branching patterns.
summary: Multi-exit architectures consist of a backbone and branch classifiers that offer shortened inference pathways to reduce the run-time of deep neural networks. In this paper, we analyze different branching patterns that vary in their allocation of computational complexity for the branch classifiers. Constant-complexity branching keeps all branches the same, while complexity-increasing and complexity-decreasing branching place more complex branches later or earlier in the backbone respectively. Through extensive experimentation on multiple backbones and datasets, we find that complexity-decreasing branches are more effective than constant-complexity or complexity-increasing branches, which achieve the best accuracy-cost trade-off. We investigate a cause by using knowledge consistency to probe the effect of adding branches onto a backbone. Our findings show that complexity-decreasing branching yields the least disruption to the feature abstraction hierarchy of the backbone, which explains the effectiveness of the branching patterns.
abstract_zh: 多出口架构由主干和分支分类器组成，提供缩短的推理路径以减少深度神经网络的运行时间。在本文中，我们分析了不同的分支模式，这些模式在分支分类器的计算复杂性分配上有所不同。恒定复杂性分支使所有分支保持相同，而复杂性增加和复杂性减少分支分别将更复杂的分支放置在主干的后面或前面。通过对多个主干网和数据集的广泛实验，我们发现复杂性降低的分支比复杂性恒定或复杂性增加的分支更有效，从而实现了最佳的准确性与成本权衡。我们通过使用知识一致性来探究在主干上添加分支的影响来调查原因。我们的研究结果表明，降低复杂性的分支对主干的特征抽象层次结构的破坏最小，这解释了分支模式的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了多出口架构中分支分类器的不同分支模式，旨在找到最佳的精度与计算成本平衡方案。
AI.motivation: 多出口架构通过分支分类器缩短推理路径以提升效率，但不同分支模式对模型性能影响尚不明确，需系统研究其最优设计。
AI.method: 通过在多种主干网络和数据集上进行大量实验，对比常量复杂度、复杂度递增和递减分支模式，并结合知识一致性分析分支对特征抽象层级的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，复杂度递减分支在精度与计算成本的权衡上表现最佳，且对主干网络特征层级的干扰最小。
AI.conclusion: 复杂度递减分支模式通过最小化对主干特征抽象层级的干扰，成为多出口架构中更优的分支设计选择。

ai_content.tldr: 本文分析了多出口架构中分支分类器的不同分支模式，旨在找到最佳的精度与计算成本平衡方案。
ai_content.motivation: 多出口架构通过分支分类器缩短推理路径以提升效率，但不同分支模式对模型性能影响尚不明确，需系统研究其最优设计。
ai_content.method: 通过在多种主干网络和数据集上进行大量实验，对比常量复杂度、复杂度递增和递减分支模式，并结合知识一致性分析分支对特征抽象层级的影响。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，复杂度递减分支在精度与计算成本的权衡上表现最佳，且对主干网络特征层级的干扰最小。
ai_content.conclusion: 复杂度递减分支模式通过最小化对主干特征抽象层级的干扰，成为多出口架构中更优的分支设计选择。

search_text: A Closer Look at Branch Classifiers of Multi-exit Architectures 仔细观察多出口架构的分支分类器 Multi-exit architectures consist of a backbone and branch classifiers that offer shortened inference pathways to reduce the run-time of deep neural networks. In this paper, we analyze different branching patterns that vary in their allocation of computational complexity for the branch classifiers. Constant-complexity branching keeps all branches the same, while complexity-increasing and complexity-decreasing branching place more complex branches later or earlier in the backbone respectively. Through extensive experimentation on multiple backbones and datasets, we find that complexity-decreasing branches are more effective than constant-complexity or complexity-increasing branches, which achieve the best accuracy-cost trade-off. We investigate a cause by using knowledge consistency to probe the effect of adding branches onto a backbone. Our findings show that complexity-decreasing branching yields the least disruption to the feature abstraction hierarchy of the backbone, which explains the effectiveness of the branching patterns. 多出口架构由主干和分支分类器组成，提供缩短的推理路径以减少深度神经网络的运行时间。在本文中，我们分析了不同的分支模式，这些模式在分支分类器的计算复杂性分配上有所不同。恒定复杂性分支使所有分支保持相同，而复杂性增加和复杂性减少分支分别将更复杂的分支放置在主干的后面或前面。通过对多个主干网和数据集的广泛实验，我们发现复杂性降低的分支比复杂性恒定或复杂性增加的分支更有效，从而实现了最佳的准确性与成本权衡。我们通过使用知识一致性来探究在主干上添加分支的影响来调查原因。我们的研究结果表明，降低复杂性的分支对主干的特征抽象层次结构的破坏最小，这解释了分支模式的有效性。 本文分析了多出口架构中分支分类器的不同分支模式，旨在找到最佳的精度与计算成本平衡方案。 Shaohui Lin,Bo Ji,Rongrong Ji,Angela Yao cs.CV

authors_text: Gongping Chen,Yuming Liu,Yu Dai,Jianxun Zhang,Liang Cui,Xiaotao Yin
title: BAGNet: Bidirectional Aware Guidance Network for Malignant Breast lesions Segmentation
title_zh: BAGNet：用于恶性乳腺病变分割的双向感知指导网络
comment: This paper has been accepted by 2022 7th Asia-Pacific Conference on Intelligent Robot Systems (ACIRS 2022)
comments: This paper has been accepted by 2022 7th Asia-Pacific Conference on Intelligent Robot Systems (ACIRS 2022)
abstract: Breast lesions segmentation is an important step of computer-aided diagnosis system, and it has attracted much attention. However, accurate segmentation of malignant breast lesions is a challenging task due to the effects of heterogeneous structure and similar intensity distributions. In this paper, a novel bidirectional aware guidance network (BAGNet) is proposed to segment the malignant lesion from breast ultrasound images. Specifically, the bidirectional aware guidance network is used to capture the context between global (low-level) and local (high-level) features from the input coarse saliency map. The introduction of the global feature map can reduce the interference of surrounding tissue (background) on the lesion regions. To evaluate the segmentation performance of the network, we compared with several state-of-the-art medical image segmentation methods on the public breast ultrasound dataset using six commonly used evaluation metrics. Extensive experimental results indicate that our method achieves the most competitive segmentation results on malignant breast ultrasound images.
summary: Breast lesions segmentation is an important step of computer-aided diagnosis system, and it has attracted much attention. However, accurate segmentation of malignant breast lesions is a challenging task due to the effects of heterogeneous structure and similar intensity distributions. In this paper, a novel bidirectional aware guidance network (BAGNet) is proposed to segment the malignant lesion from breast ultrasound images. Specifically, the bidirectional aware guidance network is used to capture the context between global (low-level) and local (high-level) features from the input coarse saliency map. The introduction of the global feature map can reduce the interference of surrounding tissue (background) on the lesion regions. To evaluate the segmentation performance of the network, we compared with several state-of-the-art medical image segmentation methods on the public breast ultrasound dataset using six commonly used evaluation metrics. Extensive experimental results indicate that our method achieves the most competitive segmentation results on malignant breast ultrasound images.
abstract_zh: 乳腺病灶分割是计算机辅助诊断系统的重要一步，备受关注。然而，由于异质结构和相似强度分布的影响，恶性乳腺病灶的准确分割是一项具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，提出了一种新颖的双向感知引导网络（BAGNet）来分割乳腺超声图像中的恶性病变。具体来说，双向感知引导网络用于从输入的粗显着性图中捕获全局（低级）和局部（高级）特征之间的上下文。全局特征图的引入可以减少周围组织（背景）对病变区域的干扰。为了评估网络的分割性能，我们使用六种常用的评估指标在公共乳腺超声数据集上与几种最先进的医学图像分割方法进行了比较。大量的实验结果表明，我们的方法在恶性乳腺超声图像上取得了最具竞争力的分割结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新型双向感知引导网络（BAGNet）用于乳腺超声图像中恶性病变的分割
AI.motivation: 乳腺恶性病变分割因异构结构和相似强度分布导致准确率不足，需改进分割算法以提升计算机辅助诊断效果
AI.method: 设计双向感知引导网络（BAGNet），通过融合全局低级特征与局部高级特征，利用全局特征图抑制背景干扰，提升病变区域分割精度
AI.result: 在公共乳腺超声数据集上，使用六种评价指标与多种先进方法对比，实验结果表明该方法在恶性病变分割上表现最优
AI.conclusion: BAGNet通过双向特征交互有效解决异质性干扰问题，验证了方法在乳腺恶性病变分割任务中的有效性，为临床辅助诊断提供技术支撑

title: The Wisdom of Crowds: Temporal Progressive Attention for Early Action Prediction
title_zh: 群体的智慧：早期行动预测的时间渐进注意力
comment: Accepted at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2023
comments: Accepted at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2023
abstract: Early action prediction deals with inferring the ongoing action from partially-observed videos, typically at the outset of the video. We propose a bottleneck-based attention model that captures the evolution of the action, through progressive sampling over fine-to-coarse scales. Our proposed Temporal Progressive (TemPr) model is composed of multiple attention towers, one for each scale. The predicted action label is based on the collective agreement considering confidences of these towers. Extensive experiments over four video datasets showcase state-of-the-art performance on the task of Early Action Prediction across a range of encoder architectures. We demonstrate the effectiveness and consistency of TemPr through detailed ablations.
summary: Early action prediction deals with inferring the ongoing action from partially-observed videos, typically at the outset of the video. We propose a bottleneck-based attention model that captures the evolution of the action, through progressive sampling over fine-to-coarse scales. Our proposed Temporal Progressive (TemPr) model is composed of multiple attention towers, one for each scale. The predicted action label is based on the collective agreement considering confidences of these towers. Extensive experiments over four video datasets showcase state-of-the-art performance on the task of Early Action Prediction across a range of encoder architectures. We demonstrate the effectiveness and consistency of TemPr through detailed ablations.
abstract_zh: 早期动作预测涉及从部分观察的视频（通常在视频开始时）推断正在进行的动作。我们提出了一种基于瓶颈的注意力模型，通过从细到粗的尺度进行渐进采样来捕获动作的演变。我们提出的时间渐进（TemPr）模型由多个注意力塔组成，每个尺度一个。预测的动作标签基于考虑这些塔的置信度的集体协议。对四个视频数据集的广泛实验展示了跨一系列编码器架构的早期动作预测任务的最先进性能。我们通过详细的消融来证明 Tempr 的有效性和一致性。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于瓶颈注意力模型的时间渐进方法，用于从部分观察的视频中进行早期动作预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在捕捉动作演变和多尺度时间特征方面存在不足，需要一种能够整合不同时间尺度信息的模型以提高早期动作预测的准确性。
AI.method: 提出Temporal Progressive (TemPr)模型，包含多个注意力塔，每个处理不同时间尺度，通过渐进采样和多尺度特征融合，结合各塔的置信度进行最终预测。
AI.result: 在四个视频数据集上实现最先进的早期动作预测性能，且在不同编码器架构下均表现优异，消融实验证明方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TemPr模型通过多尺度注意力机制和渐进采样有效捕捉动作演变，显著提升早期动作预测性能，具有广泛适用性。

title: An Overview of Color Transfer and Style Transfer for Images and Videos
title_zh: 图像和视频的颜色迁移和风格迁移概述
abstract: Image or video appearance features (e.g., color, texture, tone, illumination, and so on) reflect one's visual perception and direct impression of an image or video. Given a source image (video) and a target image (video), the image (video) color transfer technique aims to process the color of the source image or video (note that the source image or video is also referred to the reference image or video in some literature) to make it look like that of the target image or video, i.e., transferring the appearance of the target image or video to that of the source image or video, which can thereby change one's perception of the source image or video. As an extension of color transfer, style transfer refers to rendering the content of a target image or video in the style of an artist with either a style sample or a set of images through a style transfer model. As an emerging field, the study of style transfer has attracted the attention of a large number of researchers. After decades of development, it has become a highly interdisciplinary research with a variety of artistic expression styles can be achieved. This paper provides an overview of color transfer and style transfer methods over the past years.
summary: Image or video appearance features (e.g., color, texture, tone, illumination, and so on) reflect one's visual perception and direct impression of an image or video. Given a source image (video) and a target image (video), the image (video) color transfer technique aims to process the color of the source image or video (note that the source image or video is also referred to the reference image or video in some literature) to make it look like that of the target image or video, i.e., transferring the appearance of the target image or video to that of the source image or video, which can thereby change one's perception of the source image or video. As an extension of color transfer, style transfer refers to rendering the content of a target image or video in the style of an artist with either a style sample or a set of images through a style transfer model. As an emerging field, the study of style transfer has attracted the attention of a large number of researchers. After decades of development, it has become a highly interdisciplinary research with a variety of artistic expression styles can be achieved. This paper provides an overview of color transfer and style transfer methods over the past years.
abstract_zh: 图像或视频的外观特征（例如颜色、纹理、色调、光照等）反映了人们对图像或视频的视觉感知和直接印象。给定源图像（视频）和目标图像（视频），图像（视频）颜色迁移技术旨在对源图像或视频（注意，源图像或视频在某些文献中也称为参考图像或视频）进行颜色处理，使其看起来像目标图像或视频的颜色，即将目标图像或视频的外观迁移到源图像或视频的外观，从而改变人们对源图像或视频的感知。作为颜色迁移的延伸，风格迁移是指通过风格迁移模型，使用风格样本或一组图像以艺术家的风格渲染目标图像或视频的内容。作为一个新兴领域，风格迁移的研究吸引了大批研究者的关注。经过几十年的发展，它已成为一门高度跨学科的研究，可以实现多种艺术表现风格。本文概述了过去几年的颜色转移和风格转移方法。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了图像和视频的颜色迁移与风格迁移方法，探讨了如何通过技术手段改变视觉感知和艺术表达。
AI.motivation: 颜色和风格迁移技术能够改变图像或视频的视觉表现，提升艺术创作灵活性，并满足个性化视觉需求。
AI.method: 通过回顾近十年的研究成果，系统分类并分析颜色迁移与风格迁移的技术原理、算法框架及应用场景。
AI.result: 总结了多种颜色迁移与风格迁移方法，包括基于色彩空间变换、优化模型及深度学习的主流技术路线。
AI.conclusion: 颜色迁移与风格迁移作为跨学科领域，未来将向更高效、更自然的视觉生成方向发展，推动艺术与技术的深度融合。
