title: Human Motion Control of Quadrupedal Robots using Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习的四足机器人的人体运动控制
abstract: A motion-based control interface promises flexible robot operations in dangerous environments by combining user intuitions with the robot's motor capabilities. However, designing a motion interface for non-humanoid robots, such as quadrupeds or hexapods, is not straightforward because different dynamics and control strategies govern their movements. We propose a novel motion control system that allows a human user to operate various motor tasks seamlessly on a quadrupedal robot. We first retarget the captured human motion into the corresponding robot motion with proper semantics using supervised learning and post-processing techniques. Then we apply the motion imitation learning with curriculum learning to develop a control policy that can track the given retargeted reference. We further improve the performance of both motion retargeting and motion imitation by training a set of experts. As we demonstrate, a user can execute various motor tasks using our system, including standing, sitting, tilting, manipulating, walking, and turning, on simulated and real quadrupeds. We also conduct a set of studies to analyze the performance gain induced by each component.
summary: A motion-based control interface promises flexible robot operations in dangerous environments by combining user intuitions with the robot's motor capabilities. However, designing a motion interface for non-humanoid robots, such as quadrupeds or hexapods, is not straightforward because different dynamics and control strategies govern their movements. We propose a novel motion control system that allows a human user to operate various motor tasks seamlessly on a quadrupedal robot. We first retarget the captured human motion into the corresponding robot motion with proper semantics using supervised learning and post-processing techniques. Then we apply the motion imitation learning with curriculum learning to develop a control policy that can track the given retargeted reference. We further improve the performance of both motion retargeting and motion imitation by training a set of experts. As we demonstrate, a user can execute various motor tasks using our system, including standing, sitting, tilting, manipulating, walking, and turning, on simulated and real quadrupeds. We also conduct a set of studies to analyze the performance gain induced by each component.
abstract_zh: 基于运动的控制界面将用户直觉与机器人的运动能力相结合，保证了机器人在危险环境中的灵活操作。然而，为非人形机器人（例如四足机器人或六足机器人）设计运动界面并不简单，因为不同的动力学和控制策略控制着它们的运动。我们提出了一种新颖的运动控制系统，允许人类用户在四足机器人上无缝地操作各种运动任务。我们首先使用监督学习和后处理技术将捕获的人体运动重新定位为具有适当语义的相应机器人运动。然后，我们应用运动模仿学习和课程学习来开发可以跟踪给定的重定向参考的控制策略。我们通过培训一组专家进一步提高运动重定向和运动模仿的性能。正如我们所演示的，用户可以使用我们的系统在模拟和真实的四足动物上执行各种运动任务，包括站立、坐着、倾斜、操纵、行走和转动。我们还进行了一系列研究来分析每个组件带来的性能增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的四足机器人运动控制系统，使用户能通过人体运动直观操作机器人完成多种任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以将人体运动直观映射到非人形机器人（如四足机器人）的复杂动力学控制中，需设计更灵活的交互接口。
AI.method: 结合监督学习与后处理技术实现人体运动到机器人运动的语义重定位，通过模仿学习与课程学习训练控制策略，并引入专家集优化性能。
AI.result: 用户可在模拟与真实四足机器人上完成站立、行走、转向等任务，实验验证各模块（重定位、模仿学习、专家训练）均显著提升系统性能。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效实现了人体运动到四足机器人控制的映射，方法在模拟与实际场景中均表现良好，组件级优化策略具有普适性。

title: Robots: the Century Past and the Century Ahead
title_zh: 机器人：过去的世纪和未来的世纪
comment: Best essay from PhD student, ALife'21 conference, runner-up
comments: Best essay from PhD student, ALife'21 conference, runner-up
abstract: Let us reflect on the state of robotics. This year marks the $101$-st anniversary of R.U.R., a play by the writer Karel Čapek, often credited with introducing the word "robot". The word used to refer to feudal forced labourers in Slavic languages. Indeed, it points to one key characteristic of robotic systems: they are mere slaves, have no rights, and execute our wills instruction by instruction, without asking anything in return. The relationship with us humans is commensalism; in biology, commensalism subsists between two symbiotic species when one species benefits from it (robots boost productivity for humans), while the other species neither benefits nor is harmed (can you really argue that robots benefit from simply functioning?). We then distinguish robots from "living machines", that is, machines infused with life. If living machines should ever become a reality, we would need to shift our relationship with them from commensalism to mutualism. The distinction is not subtle: we experience it every day with domesticated animals, that exchange serfdom for forage and protection. This is because life has evolved to resist any attempt at enslaving it; it is stubborn. In the path towards living machines, let us ask: what has been achieved by robotics in the last $100$ years? What is left to accomplish in the next $100$ years? For us, the answers boil down to three words: juice, need (or death), and embodiment, as we shall see in the following.
summary: Let us reflect on the state of robotics. This year marks the $101$-st anniversary of R.U.R., a play by the writer Karel Čapek, often credited with introducing the word "robot". The word used to refer to feudal forced labourers in Slavic languages. Indeed, it points to one key characteristic of robotic systems: they are mere slaves, have no rights, and execute our wills instruction by instruction, without asking anything in return. The relationship with us humans is commensalism; in biology, commensalism subsists between two symbiotic species when one species benefits from it (robots boost productivity for humans), while the other species neither benefits nor is harmed (can you really argue that robots benefit from simply functioning?). We then distinguish robots from "living machines", that is, machines infused with life. If living machines should ever become a reality, we would need to shift our relationship with them from commensalism to mutualism. The distinction is not subtle: we experience it every day with domesticated animals, that exchange serfdom for forage and protection. This is because life has evolved to resist any attempt at enslaving it; it is stubborn. In the path towards living machines, let us ask: what has been achieved by robotics in the last $100$ years? What is left to accomplish in the next $100$ years? For us, the answers boil down to three words: juice, need (or death), and embodiment, as we shall see in the following.
abstract_zh: 让我们反思一下机器人技术的现状。今年是作家卡雷尔·恰佩克 (Karel Čapek) 创作的戏剧《R.U.R.》的 101 美元周年纪念日，该剧经常被誉为引入“机器人”一词的人。这个词在斯拉夫语言中用来指代封建强迫劳动者。事实上，它指出了机器人系统的一个关键特征：它们只是奴隶，没有任何权利，并且按照指令执行我们的意志，而不要求任何回报。与我们人类的关系是共栖关系；在生物学中，共生主义存在于两个共生物种之间，当一个物种从中受益（机器人提高了人类的生产力），而另一个物种既没有受益也没有受到伤害（你真的能说机器人从简单的功能中受益吗？）。然后，我们将机器人与“活机器”（即充满生命的机器）区分开来。如果生命机器成为现实，我们需要将我们与它们的关系从共生转向互利共生。这种区别并不微妙：我们每天都会在驯养动物身上经历这种区别，它们用农奴制换取饲料和保护。这是因为生命已经进化到可以抵抗任何奴役它的企图。它很顽固。在通往生命机器的道路上，让我们问：在过去的 100 美元年里，机器人技术取得了哪些成就？在接下来的 100 美元年里还需要完成什么？对于我们来说，答案可以归结为三个词：果汁、需要（或死亡）和体现，正如我们将在下面看到的。

AI.tldr: 回顾机器人百年发展历史，并探讨未来百年机器人技术的演进方向。
AI.motivation: 通过纪念《R.U.R.》戏剧百年历史，反思人类与机器人关系的本质及未来可能的演变。
AI.method: 结合历史回顾、概念辨析（如共生关系）与哲学思辨，对比机器人与‘生命机器’的本质差异。
AI.result: 总结出机器人发展的三大核心要素：能源（juice）、需求（或死亡）与物理形态（embodiment）。
AI.conclusion: 当前机器人是人类的‘共生工具’，但未来若实现‘生命机器’，需建立互利共生关系并重新定义人机伦理框架。

search_text: Robots: the Century Past and the Century Ahead 机器人：过去的世纪和未来的世纪 Let us reflect on the state of robotics. This year marks the $101$-st anniversary of R.U.R., a play by the writer Karel Čapek, often credited with introducing the word "robot". The word used to refer to feudal forced labourers in Slavic languages. Indeed, it points to one key characteristic of robotic systems: they are mere slaves, have no rights, and execute our wills instruction by instruction, without asking anything in return. The relationship with us humans is commensalism; in biology, commensalism subsists between two symbiotic species when one species benefits from it (robots boost productivity for humans), while the other species neither benefits nor is harmed (can you really argue that robots benefit from simply functioning?). We then distinguish robots from "living machines", that is, machines infused with life. If living machines should ever become a reality, we would need to shift our relationship with them from commensalism to mutualism. The distinction is not subtle: we experience it every day with domesticated animals, that exchange serfdom for forage and protection. This is because life has evolved to resist any attempt at enslaving it; it is stubborn. In the path towards living machines, let us ask: what has been achieved by robotics in the last $100$ years? What is left to accomplish in the next $100$ years? For us, the answers boil down to three words: juice, need (or death), and embodiment, as we shall see in the following. 让我们反思一下机器人技术的现状。今年是作家卡雷尔·恰佩克 (Karel Čapek) 创作的戏剧《R.U.R.》的 101 美元周年纪念日，该剧经常被誉为引入“机器人”一词的人。这个词在斯拉夫语言中用来指代封建强迫劳动者。事实上，它指出了机器人系统的一个关键特征：它们只是奴隶，没有任何权利，并且按照指令执行我们的意志，而不要求任何回报。与我们人类的关系是共栖关系；在生物学中，共生主义存在于两个共生物种之间，当一个物种从中受益（机器人提高了人类的生产力），而另一个物种既没有受益也没有受到伤害（你真的能说机器人从简单的功能中受益吗？）。然后，我们将机器人与“活机器”（即充满生命的机器）区分开来。如果生命机器成为现实，我们需要将我们与它们的关系从共生转向互利共生。这种区别并不微妙：我们每天都会在驯养动物身上经历这种区别，它们用农奴制换取饲料和保护。这是因为生命已经进化到可以抵抗任何奴役它的企图。它很顽固。在通往生命机器的道路上，让我们问：在过去的 100 美元年里，机器人技术取得了哪些成就？在接下来的 100 美元年里还需要完成什么？对于我们来说，答案可以归结为三个词：果汁、需要（或死亡）和体现，正如我们将在下面看到的。 回顾机器人百年发展历史，并探讨未来百年机器人技术的演进方向。 Federico Pigozzi cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Niclas Heilig,Jan Kirchhoff,Florian Stumpe,Joan Plepi,Lucie Flek,Heiko Paulheim
title: Refining Diagnosis Paths for Medical Diagnosis based on an Augmented Knowledge Graph
title_zh: 基于增强知识图细化医疗诊断的诊断路径
comment: Accepted at the 5th Workshop on Semantic Web solutions for large-scale biomedical data analytics
comments: Accepted at the 5th Workshop on Semantic Web solutions for large-scale biomedical data analytics
abstract: Medical diagnosis is the process of making a prediction of the disease a patient is likely to have, given a set of symptoms and observations. This requires extensive expert knowledge, in particular when covering a large variety of diseases. Such knowledge can be coded in a knowledge graph -- encompassing diseases, symptoms, and diagnosis paths. Since both the knowledge itself and its encoding can be incomplete, refining the knowledge graph with additional information helps physicians making better predictions. At the same time, for deployment in a hospital, the diagnosis must be explainable and transparent. In this paper, we present an approach using diagnosis paths in a medical knowledge graph. We show that those graphs can be refined using latent representations with RDF2vec, while the final diagnosis is still made in an explainable way. Using both an intrinsic as well as an expert-based evaluation, we show that the embedding-based prediction approach is beneficial for refining the graph with additional valid conditions.
summary: Medical diagnosis is the process of making a prediction of the disease a patient is likely to have, given a set of symptoms and observations. This requires extensive expert knowledge, in particular when covering a large variety of diseases. Such knowledge can be coded in a knowledge graph -- encompassing diseases, symptoms, and diagnosis paths. Since both the knowledge itself and its encoding can be incomplete, refining the knowledge graph with additional information helps physicians making better predictions. At the same time, for deployment in a hospital, the diagnosis must be explainable and transparent. In this paper, we present an approach using diagnosis paths in a medical knowledge graph. We show that those graphs can be refined using latent representations with RDF2vec, while the final diagnosis is still made in an explainable way. Using both an intrinsic as well as an expert-based evaluation, we show that the embedding-based prediction approach is beneficial for refining the graph with additional valid conditions.
abstract_zh: 医学诊断是根据一组症状和观察结果预测患者可能患有的疾病的过程。这需要广泛的专业知识，特别是在涵盖多种疾病时。这些知识可以编码在知识图中——包括疾病、症状和诊断路径。由于知识本身及其编码都可能不完整，因此使用附加信息细化知识图可以帮助医生做出更好的预测。同时，对于医院的部署，诊断必须是可解释和透明的。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用医学知识图中的诊断路径的方法。我们表明，可以使用 RDF2vec 的潜在表示来细化这些图，而最终诊断仍然以可解释的方式进行。使用内在评估和基于专家的评估，我们表明基于嵌入的预测方法有利于通过附加有效条件细化图形。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于增强知识图谱的医疗诊断路径优化方法，通过引入潜在表示技术提升诊断准确性与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗知识图谱存在信息不完整问题，导致诊断路径不够精确，需通过补充有效条件改进模型可靠性与可解释性。
AI.method: 采用RDF2vec构建潜在表示，结合诊断路径数据对知识图谱进行动态优化，并通过内在指标与专家评估验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明嵌入式预测方法能有效补充知识图谱中的有效条件，提升诊断路径的准确率和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为医疗知识图谱的持续优化提供了可行路径，在保证诊断效果的同时满足临床可解释性需求。

title: Controllable Image Captioning
title_zh: 可控图像字幕
comment: This submission has been withdrawn by arXiv administrators because the identity of the submitter and author could not be verified
comments: This submission has been withdrawn by arXiv administrators because the identity of the submitter and author could not be verified
abstract: State-of-the-art image captioners can generate accurate sentences to describe images in a sequence to sequence manner without considering the controllability and interpretability. This, however, is far from making image captioning widely used as an image can be interpreted in infinite ways depending on the target and the context at hand. Achieving controllability is important especially when the image captioner is used by different people with different way of interpreting the images. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework for image captioning which can generate diverse descriptions by capturing the co-dependence between Part-Of-Speech tags and semantics. Our model decouples direct dependence between successive variables. In this way, it allows the decoder to exhaustively search through the latent Part-Of-Speech choices, while keeping decoding speed proportional to the size of the POS vocabulary. Given a control signal in the form of a sequence of Part-Of-Speech tags, we propose a method to generate captions through a Transformer network, which predicts words based on the input Part-Of-Speech tag sequences. Experiments on publicly available datasets show that our model significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on generating diverse image captions with high qualities.
summary: State-of-the-art image captioners can generate accurate sentences to describe images in a sequence to sequence manner without considering the controllability and interpretability. This, however, is far from making image captioning widely used as an image can be interpreted in infinite ways depending on the target and the context at hand. Achieving controllability is important especially when the image captioner is used by different people with different way of interpreting the images. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework for image captioning which can generate diverse descriptions by capturing the co-dependence between Part-Of-Speech tags and semantics. Our model decouples direct dependence between successive variables. In this way, it allows the decoder to exhaustively search through the latent Part-Of-Speech choices, while keeping decoding speed proportional to the size of the POS vocabulary. Given a control signal in the form of a sequence of Part-Of-Speech tags, we propose a method to generate captions through a Transformer network, which predicts words based on the input Part-Of-Speech tag sequences. Experiments on publicly available datasets show that our model significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on generating diverse image captions with high qualities.
abstract_zh: 最先进的图像字幕生成器可以生成准确的句子来以序列到序列的方式描述图像，而无需考虑可控性和可解释性。然而，这还远未使图像字幕得到广泛应用，因为图像可以根据目标和当前上下文以无限的方式进行解释。实现可控性非常重要，尤其是当不同的人以不同的方式解释图像时使用图像字幕器时。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的图像字幕框架，它可以通过捕获词性标签和语义之间的相互依赖性来生成不同的描述。我们的模型消除了连续变量之间的直接依赖性。通过这种方式，它允许解码器彻底搜索潜在的词性选择，同时保持解码速度与 POS 词汇量的大小成正比。给定词性标签序列形式的控制信号，我们提出了一种通过 Transformer 网络生成字幕的方法，该网络根据输入的词性标签序列预测单词。对公开数据集的实验表明，我们的模型在生成高质量的多样化图像标题方面显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可控图像描述生成框架，通过捕捉词性标签与语义的共依赖关系，实现多样化且高质量的图像描述生成。
AI.motivation: 现有图像描述模型缺乏可控性与可解释性，难以满足不同用户对图像的多样化解读需求。
AI.method: 设计基于词性标签序列的控制信号，通过Transformer网络解耦变量依赖关系，使解码器高效搜索词性组合生成描述。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上显著优于现有方法，在生成多样性与描述质量指标上取得提升。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过词性引导的可控生成机制，有效提升了图像描述的灵活性与语义准确性。

Experiments on publicly available datasets show that our model significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on generating diverse image captions with high qualities. 最先进的图像字幕生成器可以生成准确的句子来以序列到序列的方式描述图像，而无需考虑可控性和可解释性。然而，这还远未使图像字幕得到广泛应用，因为图像可以根据目标和当前上下文以无限的方式进行解释。实现可控性非常重要，尤其是当不同的人以不同的方式解释图像时使用图像字幕器时。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的图像字幕框架，它可以通过捕获词性标签和语义之间的相互依赖性来生成不同的描述。我们的模型消除了连续变量之间的直接依赖性。通过这种方式，它允许解码器彻底搜索潜在的词性选择，同时保持解码速度与 POS 词汇量的大小成正比。给定词性标签序列形式的控制信号，我们提出了一种通过 Transformer 网络生成字幕的方法，该网络根据输入的词性标签序列预测单词。对公开数据集的实验表明，我们的模型在生成高质量的多样化图像标题方面显着优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种可控图像描述生成框架，通过捕捉词性标签与语义的共依赖关系，实现多样化且高质量的图像描述生成。 Luka Maxwell cs.CV

authors_text: Huadong Li,Yuefeng Wang,Ying Wei,Lin Wang,Li Ge
title: Discriminative-Region Attention and Orthogonal-View Generation Model for Vehicle Re-Identification
title_zh: 用于车辆重新识别的判别区域注意力和正交视图生成模型
abstract: Vehicle re-identification (Re-ID) is urgently demanded to alleviate thepressure caused by the increasingly onerous task of urban traffic management. Multiple challenges hamper the applications of vision-based vehicle Re-ID methods: (1) The appearances of different vehicles of the same brand/model are often similar; However, (2) the appearances of the same vehicle differ significantly from different viewpoints. Previous methods mainly use manually annotated multi-attribute datasets to assist the network in getting detailed cues and in inferencing multi-view to improve the vehicle Re-ID performance. However, finely labeled vehicle datasets are usually unattainable in real application scenarios. Hence, we propose a Discriminative-Region Attention and Orthogonal-View Generation (DRA-OVG) model, which only requires identity (ID) labels to conquer the multiple challenges of vehicle Re-ID.The proposed DRA model can automatically extract the discriminative region features, which can distinguish similar vehicles. And the OVG model can generate multi-view features based on the input view features to reduce the impact of viewpoint mismatches. Finally, the distance between vehicle appearances is presented by the discriminative region features and multi-view features together. Therefore, the significance of pairwise distance measure between vehicles is enhanced in acomplete feature space. Extensive experiments substantiate the effectiveness of each proposed ingredient, and experimental results indicate that our approach achieves remarkable improvements over the state- of-the-art vehicle Re-ID methods on VehicleID and VeRi-776 datasets.
summary: Vehicle re-identification (Re-ID) is urgently demanded to alleviate thepressure caused by the increasingly onerous task of urban traffic management. Multiple challenges hamper the applications of vision-based vehicle Re-ID methods: (1) The appearances of different vehicles of the same brand/model are often similar; However, (2) the appearances of the same vehicle differ significantly from different viewpoints. Previous methods mainly use manually annotated multi-attribute datasets to assist the network in getting detailed cues and in inferencing multi-view to improve the vehicle Re-ID performance. However, finely labeled vehicle datasets are usually unattainable in real application scenarios. Hence, we propose a Discriminative-Region Attention and Orthogonal-View Generation (DRA-OVG) model, which only requires identity (ID) labels to conquer the multiple challenges of vehicle Re-ID.The proposed DRA model can automatically extract the discriminative region features, which can distinguish similar vehicles. And the OVG model can generate multi-view features based on the input view features to reduce the impact of viewpoint mismatches. Finally, the distance between vehicle appearances is presented by the discriminative region features and multi-view features together. Therefore, the significance of pairwise distance measure between vehicles is enhanced in acomplete feature space. Extensive experiments substantiate the effectiveness of each proposed ingredient, and experimental results indicate that our approach achieves remarkable improvements over the state- of-the-art vehicle Re-ID methods on VehicleID and VeRi-776 datasets.
abstract_zh: 迫切需要车辆重新识别（Re-ID）来缓解日益繁重的城市交通管理任务带来的压力。多重挑战阻碍了基于视觉的车辆重识别方法的应用：（1）同一品牌/型号的不同车辆的外观往往相似；然而，（2）同一辆车从不同的角度看，其外观差异很大。以前的方法主要使用手动注释的多属性数据集来辅助网络获取详细线索并推理多视图以提高车辆重识别性能。然而，在实际应用场景中，精细标记的车辆数据集通常是无法获得的。因此，我们提出了一种判别区域注意力和正交视图生成（DRA-OVG）模型，该模型仅需要身份（ID）标签来克服车辆重新识别的多重挑战。所提出的DRA模型可以自动提取判别区域特征，从而区分相似的车辆。 OVG模型可以根据输入的视图特征生成多视图特征，以减少视点不匹配的影响。最后，车辆外观之间的距离由判别区域特征和多视图特征共同表示。因此，在完整的特征空间中，车辆之间的成对距离测量的重要性得到增强。大量的实验证实了每种提议成分的有效性，实验结果表明，我们的方法在 VehicleID 和 VeRi-776 数据集上比最先进的车辆重识别方法取得了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于车辆重识别的模型，旨在解决由于车辆外观相似和视角差异带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 由于车辆外观相似性和视角差异，现有的基于视觉的车辆重识别方法在实际应用中面临诸多挑战，而精细标注的数据集难以获取。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为DRA-OVG的模型，包含两个部分：DRA模型自动提取区分性区域特征以区分相似车辆，OVG模型生成多视角特征以减少视角不匹配的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在VehicleID和VeRi-776数据集上显著优于现有最先进的车辆重识别方法。
AI.conclusion: DRA-OVG模型在无需精细标注数据的情况下，通过自动提取区分性区域和生成多视角特征，有效提升了车辆重识别的性能。

title: Two Decades of Colorization and Decolorization for Images and Videos
title_zh: 图像和视频的着色和脱色的两个十年
abstract: Colorization is a computer-aided process, which aims to give color to a gray image or video. It can be used to enhance black-and-white images, including black-and-white photos, old-fashioned films, and scientific imaging results. On the contrary, decolorization is to convert a color image or video into a grayscale one. A grayscale image or video refers to an image or video with only brightness information without color information. It is the basis of some downstream image processing applications such as pattern recognition, image segmentation, and image enhancement. Different from image decolorization, video decolorization should not only consider the image contrast preservation in each video frame, but also respect the temporal and spatial consistency between video frames. Researchers were devoted to develop decolorization methods by balancing spatial-temporal consistency and algorithm efficiency. With the prevalance of the digital cameras and mobile phones, image and video colorization and decolorization have been paid more and more attention by researchers. This paper gives an overview of the progress of image and video colorization and decolorization methods in the last two decades.
summary: Colorization is a computer-aided process, which aims to give color to a gray image or video. It can be used to enhance black-and-white images, including black-and-white photos, old-fashioned films, and scientific imaging results. On the contrary, decolorization is to convert a color image or video into a grayscale one. A grayscale image or video refers to an image or video with only brightness information without color information. It is the basis of some downstream image processing applications such as pattern recognition, image segmentation, and image enhancement. Different from image decolorization, video decolorization should not only consider the image contrast preservation in each video frame, but also respect the temporal and spatial consistency between video frames. Researchers were devoted to develop decolorization methods by balancing spatial-temporal consistency and algorithm efficiency. With the prevalance of the digital cameras and mobile phones, image and video colorization and decolorization have been paid more and more attention by researchers. This paper gives an overview of the progress of image and video colorization and decolorization methods in the last two decades.
abstract_zh: 着色是一种计算机辅助过程，旨在为灰色图像或视频赋予颜色。它可用于增强黑白图像，包括黑白照片、老式胶片和科学成像结果。相反，去色是将彩色图像或视频转换为灰度图像或视频。灰度图像或视频是指只有亮度信息而没有颜色信息的图像或视频。它是一些下游图像处理应用（例如模式识别、图像分割和图像增强）的基础。与图像去色不同，视频去色不仅要考虑每个视频帧中图像对比度的保留，还要尊重视频帧之间的时间和空间一致性。研究人员致力于通过平衡时空一致性和算法效率来开发脱色方法。随着数码相机和手机的普及，图像和视频的着色和去色越来越受到研究人员的关注。本文概述了近二十年来图像和视频着色和去色方法的进展。

AI.tldr: 综述过去二十年图像和视频的着色与去色方法的发展
AI.motivation: 随着数码相机和手机的普及，图像和视频的着色与去色在图像处理中的重要性增加，需系统回顾相关方法
AI.method: 通过文献综述，总结和分析过去二十年图像和视频着色与去色的技术进展
AI.result: 梳理了着色与去色的关键技术，比较了不同方法的优缺点，并指出了视频去色中时空一致性的重要性
AI.conclusion: 现有方法在效率和一致性上仍有挑战，未来需进一步优化算法并探索新应用场景

authors_text: Rowan McAllister,Blake Wulfe,Jean Mercat,Logan Ellis,Sergey Levine,Adrien Gaidon
title: Control-Aware Prediction Objectives for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 自动驾驶的控制感知预测目标
comment: Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022
comments: Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022
abstract: Autonomous vehicle software is typically structured as a modular pipeline of individual components (e.g., perception, prediction, and planning) to help separate concerns into interpretable sub-tasks. Even when end-to-end training is possible, each module has its own set of objectives used for safety assurance, sample efficiency, regularization, or interpretability. However, intermediate objectives do not always align with overall system performance. For example, optimizing the likelihood of a trajectory prediction module might focus more on easy-to-predict agents than safety-critical or rare behaviors (e.g., jaywalking). In this paper, we present control-aware prediction objectives (CAPOs), to evaluate the downstream effect of predictions on control without requiring the planner be differentiable. We propose two types of importance weights that weight the predictive likelihood: one using an attention model between agents, and another based on control variation when exchanging predicted trajectories for ground truth trajectories. Experimentally, we show our objectives improve overall system performance in suburban driving scenarios using the CARLA simulator.
summary: Autonomous vehicle software is typically structured as a modular pipeline of individual components (e.g., perception, prediction, and planning) to help separate concerns into interpretable sub-tasks. Even when end-to-end training is possible, each module has its own set of objectives used for safety assurance, sample efficiency, regularization, or interpretability. However, intermediate objectives do not always align with overall system performance. For example, optimizing the likelihood of a trajectory prediction module might focus more on easy-to-predict agents than safety-critical or rare behaviors (e.g., jaywalking). In this paper, we present control-aware prediction objectives (CAPOs), to evaluate the downstream effect of predictions on control without requiring the planner be differentiable. We propose two types of importance weights that weight the predictive likelihood: one using an attention model between agents, and another based on control variation when exchanging predicted trajectories for ground truth trajectories. Experimentally, we show our objectives improve overall system performance in suburban driving scenarios using the CARLA simulator.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车软件通常被构造为单个组件（例如感知、预测和规划）的模块化管道，以帮助将关注点分解为可解释的子任务。即使可以进行端到端训练，每个模块都有自己的一组目标，用于安全保证、样本效率、正则化或可解释性。然而，中间目标并不总是与整体系统性能保持一致。例如，优化轨迹预测模块的可能性可能会更多地关注易于预测的代理，而不是安全关键或罕见的行为（例如乱穿马路）。在本文中，我们提出了控制感知预测目标（CAPO），以评估预测对控制的下游影响，而不要求规划器可微分。我们提出了两种类型的重要性权重来加权预测可能性：一种使用代理之间的注意模型，另一种基于将预测轨迹交换为地面真实轨迹时的控制变化。通过实验，我们展示了我们的目标是使用 CARLA 模拟器提高郊区驾驶场景中的整体系统性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出控制感知预测目标（CAPOs），通过考虑预测结果对车辆控制的影响，改进自动驾驶系统中轨迹预测模块的性能。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统中各模块的独立目标可能与整体系统性能不一致，例如轨迹预测模块可能过度关注易预测行为而忽视安全关键场景。
AI.method: 设计两种重要性权重：基于智能体间注意力模型的权重，以及通过交换预测轨迹与真实轨迹时控制变化量计算的权重，无需可微规划器即可评估预测对控制的影响。
AI.result: 在CARLA模拟器的郊区驾驶场景中，所提目标显著提升了系统整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 将控制效果纳入预测目标可增强自动驾驶系统的安全性和效率，为模块化设计提供新思路。

search_text: Control-Aware Prediction Objectives for Autonomous Driving 自动驾驶的控制感知预测目标 Autonomous vehicle software is typically structured as a modular pipeline of individual components (e.g., perception, prediction, and planning) to help separate concerns into interpretable sub-tasks. Even when end-to-end training is possible, each module has its own set of objectives used for safety assurance, sample efficiency, regularization, or interpretability. However, intermediate objectives do not always align with overall system performance. For example, optimizing the likelihood of a trajectory prediction module might focus more on easy-to-predict agents than safety-critical or rare behaviors (e.g., jaywalking). In this paper, we present control-aware prediction objectives (CAPOs), to evaluate the downstream effect of predictions on control without requiring the planner be differentiable. We propose two types of importance weights that weight the predictive likelihood: one using an attention model between agents, and another based on control variation when exchanging predicted trajectories for ground truth trajectories. Experimentally, we show our objectives improve overall system performance in suburban driving scenarios using the CARLA simulator. 自动驾驶汽车软件通常被构造为单个组件（例如感知、预测和规划）的模块化管道，以帮助将关注点分解为可解释的子任务。即使可以进行端到端训练，每个模块都有自己的一组目标，用于安全保证、样本效率、正则化或可解释性。然而，中间目标并不总是与整体系统性能保持一致。例如，优化轨迹预测模块的可能性可能会更多地关注易于预测的代理，而不是安全关键或罕见的行为（例如乱穿马路）。在本文中，我们提出了控制感知预测目标（CAPO），以评估预测对控制的下游影响，而不要求规划器可微分。我们提出了两种类型的重要性权重来加权预测可能性：一种使用代理之间的注意模型，另一种基于将预测轨迹交换为地面真实轨迹时的控制变化。通过实验，我们展示了我们的目标是使用 CARLA 模拟器提高郊区驾驶场景中的整体系统性能。 本文提出控制感知预测目标（CAPOs），通过考虑预测结果对车辆控制的影响，改进自动驾驶系统中轨迹预测模块的性能。 Rowan McAllister,Blake Wulfe,Jean Mercat,Logan Ellis,Sergey Levine,Adrien Gaidon cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Yue Zhou,Xue Yang,Gefan Zhang,Jiabao Wang,Yanyi Liu,Liping Hou,Xue Jiang,Xingzhao Liu,Junchi Yan,Chengqi Lyu,Wenwei Zhang,Kai Chen
title: MMRotate: A Rotated Object Detection Benchmark using PyTorch
title_zh: MMRotate：使用 PyTorch 的旋转对象检测基准
comment: 5 pages, 2 tables, MMRotate is accepted by ACM MM 2022 (OS Track). Yue Zhou and Xue Yang provided equal contribution. The code is publicly released at https://github.com/open-mmlab/mmrotate
comments: 5 pages, 2 tables, MMRotate is accepted by ACM MM 2022 (OS Track). Yue Zhou and Xue Yang provided equal contribution. The code is publicly released at https://github.com/open-mmlab/mmrotate
abstract: We present an open-source toolbox, named MMRotate, which provides a coherent algorithm framework of training, inferring, and evaluation for the popular rotated object detection algorithm based on deep learning. MMRotate implements 18 state-of-the-art algorithms and supports the three most frequently used angle definition methods. To facilitate future research and industrial applications of rotated object detection-related problems, we also provide a large number of trained models and detailed benchmarks to give insights into the performance of rotated object detection. MMRotate is publicly released at https://github.com/open-mmlab/mmrotate.
summary: We present an open-source toolbox, named MMRotate, which provides a coherent algorithm framework of training, inferring, and evaluation for the popular rotated object detection algorithm based on deep learning. MMRotate implements 18 state-of-the-art algorithms and supports the three most frequently used angle definition methods. To facilitate future research and industrial applications of rotated object detection-related problems, we also provide a large number of trained models and detailed benchmarks to give insights into the performance of rotated object detection. MMRotate is publicly released at https://github.com/open-mmlab/mmrotate.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个名为MMRotate的开源工具箱，它为基于深度学习的流行旋转目标检测算法提供了一个连贯的训练、推理和评估算法框架。 MMRotate 实现了 18 种最先进的算法，并支持三种最常用的角度定义方法。为了促进旋转物体检测相关问题的未来研究和工业应用，我们还提供了大量经过训练的模型和详细的基准测试，以深入了解旋转物体检测的性能。 MMRotate 公开发布于 https://github.com/open-mmlab/mmrotate。

AI.tldr: 开发了一个开源工具箱MMRotate，用于旋转目标检测的训练、推理和评估，并提供多种算法和基准测试。
AI.motivation: 为推动旋转目标检测的研究和工业应用，提供统一的算法框架和详细基准测试。
AI.method: 基于PyTorch实现18种先进算法，支持三种角度定义方法，提供训练、推理和评估框架。
AI.result: 提供了大量预训练模型和详细基准测试，展示不同算法在旋转目标检测中的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: MMRotate为旋转目标检测领域提供了高效的开源工具，推动了相关研究和实际应用的发展。

authors_text: Jianrong Zhang,Tianyi Wu,Chuanghao Ding,Hongwei Zhao,Guodong Guo
title: Region-level Contrastive and Consistency Learning for Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 半监督语义分割的区域级对比和一致性学习
abstract: Current semi-supervised semantic segmentation methods mainly focus on designing pixel-level consistency and contrastive regularization. However, pixel-level regularization is sensitive to noise from pixels with incorrect predictions, and pixel-level contrastive regularization has memory and computational cost with O(pixel_num^2). To address the issues, we propose a novel region-level contrastive and consistency learning framework (RC^2L) for semi-supervised semantic segmentation. Specifically, we first propose a Region Mask Contrastive (RMC) loss and a Region Feature Contrastive (RFC) loss to accomplish region-level contrastive property. Furthermore, Region Class Consistency (RCC) loss and Semantic Mask Consistency (SMC) loss are proposed for achieving region-level consistency. Based on the proposed region-level contrastive and consistency regularization, we develop a region-level contrastive and consistency learning framework (RC^2L) for semi-supervised semantic segmentation, and evaluate our RC$^2$L on two challenging benchmarks (PASCAL VOC 2012 and Cityscapes), outperforming the state-of-the-art.
summary: Current semi-supervised semantic segmentation methods mainly focus on designing pixel-level consistency and contrastive regularization. However, pixel-level regularization is sensitive to noise from pixels with incorrect predictions, and pixel-level contrastive regularization has memory and computational cost with O(pixel_num^2). To address the issues, we propose a novel region-level contrastive and consistency learning framework (RC^2L) for semi-supervised semantic segmentation. Specifically, we first propose a Region Mask Contrastive (RMC) loss and a Region Feature Contrastive (RFC) loss to accomplish region-level contrastive property. Furthermore, Region Class Consistency (RCC) loss and Semantic Mask Consistency (SMC) loss are proposed for achieving region-level consistency. Based on the proposed region-level contrastive and consistency regularization, we develop a region-level contrastive and consistency learning framework (RC^2L) for semi-supervised semantic segmentation, and evaluate our RC$^2$L on two challenging benchmarks (PASCAL VOC 2012 and Cityscapes), outperforming the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 目前的半监督语义分割方法主要集中在设计像素级一致性和对比正则化。然而，像素级正则化对来自错误预测的像素的噪声很敏感，并且像素级对比正则化的内存和计算成本为 O(pixel_num^2)。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于半监督语义分割的新型区域级对比和一致性学习框架（RC^2L）。具体来说，我们首先提出区域掩模对比（RMC）损失和区域特征对比（RFC）损失来实现区域级对比属性。此外，提出了区域类一致性（RCC）损失和语义掩模一致性（SMC）损失来实现区域级一致性。基于所提出的区域级对比和一致性正则化，我们开发了用于半监督语义分割的区域级对比和一致性学习框架（RC^2L），并在两个具有挑战性的基准（PASCAL VOC 2012 和 Cityscapes）上评估我们的 RC$^2$L，其性能优于最先进的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于区域级对比与一致性学习的半监督语义分割框架RC²L，以解决现有像素级方法的噪声敏感性和高计算成本问题。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督语义分割方法依赖像素级对比和一致性正则化，但易受错误预测噪声影响，且计算复杂度高达O(像素数²)。
AI.method: 设计区域掩码对比损失(RMC)和区域特征对比损失(RFC)实现区域级对比学习，并引入区域类别一致性损失(RCC)和语义掩码一致性损失(SMC)提升区域级一致性。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012和Cityscapes基准测试中，RC²L方法优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 区域级对比与一致性学习能有效降低计算成本并提升半监督语义分割性能。

ai_content.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012和Cityscapes基准测试中，RC²L方法优于现有最先进算法。
ai_content.conclusion: 区域级对比与一致性学习能有效降低计算成本并提升半监督语义分割性能。

Specifically, we first propose a Region Mask Contrastive (RMC) loss and a Region Feature Contrastive (RFC) loss to accomplish region-level contrastive property. Furthermore, Region Class Consistency (RCC) loss and Semantic Mask Consistency (SMC) loss are proposed for achieving region-level consistency. Based on the proposed region-level contrastive and consistency regularization, we develop a region-level contrastive and consistency learning framework (RC^2L) for semi-supervised semantic segmentation, and evaluate our RC$^2$L on two challenging benchmarks (PASCAL VOC 2012 and Cityscapes), outperforming the state-of-the-art. 目前的半监督语义分割方法主要集中在设计像素级一致性和对比正则化。然而，像素级正则化对来自错误预测的像素的噪声很敏感，并且像素级对比正则化的内存和计算成本为 O(pixel_num^2)。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于半监督语义分割的新型区域级对比和一致性学习框架（RC^2L）。具体来说，我们首先提出区域掩模对比（RMC）损失和区域特征对比（RFC）损失来实现区域级对比属性。此外，提出了区域类一致性（RCC）损失和语义掩模一致性（SMC）损失来实现区域级一致性。基于所提出的区域级对比和一致性正则化，我们开发了用于半监督语义分割的区域级对比和一致性学习框架（RC^2L），并在两个具有挑战性的基准（PASCAL VOC 2012 和 Cityscapes）上评估我们的 RC$^2$L，其性能优于最先进的水平。 本文提出了一种基于区域级对比与一致性学习的半监督语义分割框架RC²L，以解决现有像素级方法的噪声敏感性和高计算成本问题。 Jianrong Zhang,Tianyi Wu,Chuanghao Ding,Hongwei Zhao,Guodong Guo cs.CV

title: AlphaZero-Inspired Game Learning: Faster Training by Using MCTS Only at Test Time
title_zh: AlphaZero 启发的游戏学习：仅在测试时使用 MCTS 加快训练速度
abstract: Recently, the seminal algorithms AlphaGo and AlphaZero have started a new era in game learning and deep reinforcement learning. While the achievements of AlphaGo and AlphaZero - playing Go and other complex games at super human level - are truly impressive, these architectures have the drawback that they require high computational resources. Many researchers are looking for methods that are similar to AlphaZero, but have lower computational demands and are thus more easily reproducible. In this paper, we pick an important element of AlphaZero - the Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) planning stage - and combine it with temporal difference (TD) learning agents. We wrap MCTS for the first time around TD n-tuple networks and we use this wrapping only at test time to create versatile agents that keep at the same time the computational demands low. We apply this new architecture to several complex games (Othello, ConnectFour, Rubik's Cube) and show the advantages achieved with this AlphaZero-inspired MCTS wrapper. In particular, we present results that this agent is the first one trained on standard hardware (no GPU or TPU) to beat the very strong Othello program Edax up to and including level 7 (where most other learning-from-scratch algorithms could only defeat Edax up to level 2).
summary: Recently, the seminal algorithms AlphaGo and AlphaZero have started a new era in game learning and deep reinforcement learning. While the achievements of AlphaGo and AlphaZero - playing Go and other complex games at super human level - are truly impressive, these architectures have the drawback that they require high computational resources. Many researchers are looking for methods that are similar to AlphaZero, but have lower computational demands and are thus more easily reproducible. In this paper, we pick an important element of AlphaZero - the Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) planning stage - and combine it with temporal difference (TD) learning agents. We wrap MCTS for the first time around TD n-tuple networks and we use this wrapping only at test time to create versatile agents that keep at the same time the computational demands low. We apply this new architecture to several complex games (Othello, ConnectFour, Rubik's Cube) and show the advantages achieved with this AlphaZero-inspired MCTS wrapper. In particular, we present results that this agent is the first one trained on standard hardware (no GPU or TPU) to beat the very strong Othello program Edax up to and including level 7 (where most other learning-from-scratch algorithms could only defeat Edax up to level 2).
abstract_zh: 最近，开创性算法AlphaGo和AlphaZero开启了游戏学习和深度强化学习的新时代。虽然 AlphaGo 和 AlphaZero 的成就——以超人类水平玩围棋和其他复杂游戏——确实令人印象深刻，但这些架构的缺点是需要高计算资源。许多研究人员正在寻找与 AlphaZero 类似的方法，但计算需求较低，因此更容易重现。在本文中，我们选择了 AlphaZero 的一个重要元素——蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）规划阶段——并将其与时间差异（TD）学习代理相结合。我们首次将 MCTS 围绕 TD n 元组网络进行包装，并且仅在测试时使用这种包装来创建多功能代理，同时保持较低的计算需求。我们将这种新架构应用于几种复杂的游戏（Othello、ConnectFour、Rubik's Cube），并展示使用这种受 AlphaZero 启发的 MCTS 包装器所实现的优势。特别是，我们提出的结果是，该智能体是第一个在标准硬件（无 GPU 或 TPU）上训练的智能体，能够击败非常强大的黑白棋程序 Edax，最高可达 7 级（其中大多数其他从头学习算法只能击败最高 2 级的 Edax）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受AlphaZero启发的游戏学习方法，通过仅在测试阶段使用蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）来降低计算需求。
AI.motivation: AlphaZero等算法虽强大但计算资源消耗高，难以复现。研究旨在开发计算需求更低、更易实现的替代方案。
AI.method: 将MCTS与时间差分（TD）学习结合，首次将MCTS包装在TD n-tuple网络中，并仅在测试阶段启用MCTS以减少训练开销。
AI.result: 在Othello等游戏中，该方法在普通硬件上训练出的代理首次击败了Edax程序的7级难度，而其他算法仅能击败2级。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简化训练流程显著降低计算需求，同时保持高性能，为复杂游戏学习提供了新思路。

title: The Effect of Preferences in Abstract Argumentation Under a Claim-Centric View
title_zh: 以主张为中心的观点下抽象论证中偏好的影响
abstract: In this paper, we study the effect of preferences in abstract argumentation under a claim-centric perspective. Recent work has revealed that semantical and computational properties can change when reasoning is performed on claim-level rather than on the argument-level, while under certain natural restrictions (arguments with the same claims have the same outgoing attacks) these properties are conserved. We now investigate these effects when, in addition, preferences have to be taken into account and consider four prominent reductions to handle preferences between arguments. As we shall see, these reductions give rise to different classes of claim-augmented argumentation frameworks, and behave differently in terms of semantic properties and computational complexity. This strengthens the view that the actual choice for handling preferences has to be taken with care.
summary: In this paper, we study the effect of preferences in abstract argumentation under a claim-centric perspective. Recent work has revealed that semantical and computational properties can change when reasoning is performed on claim-level rather than on the argument-level, while under certain natural restrictions (arguments with the same claims have the same outgoing attacks) these properties are conserved. We now investigate these effects when, in addition, preferences have to be taken into account and consider four prominent reductions to handle preferences between arguments. As we shall see, these reductions give rise to different classes of claim-augmented argumentation frameworks, and behave differently in terms of semantic properties and computational complexity. This strengthens the view that the actual choice for handling preferences has to be taken with care.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们在以主张为中心的视角下研究了抽象论证中偏好的影响。最近的工作表明，当在声明级别而不是参数级别执行推理时，语义和计算属性可能会发生变化，而在某些自然限制下（具有相同声明的参数具有相同的传出攻击）这些属性是保守的。我们现在研究这些影响，此外，还必须考虑偏好，并考虑四个显着的减少来处理参数之间的偏好。正如我们将看到的，这些减少产生了不同类别的主张增强论证框架，并且在语义属性和计算复杂性方面表现不同。这强化了这样的观点：处理偏好的实际选择必须谨慎对待。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在主张为中心的视角下，偏好对抽象论证的影响，并分析了四种处理论点偏好的约减方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明在主张层面而非论点层面进行推理时，语义和计算属性可能发生改变，而引入偏好后需进一步探讨其影响。
AI.method: 通过分析四种处理论点之间偏好的约减方法，比较其在语义属性和计算复杂性上的差异。
AI.result: 不同约减方法导致不同的主张增强论证框架类，并在语义属性和计算复杂性上表现出不同行为。
AI.conclusion: 处理偏好时需谨慎选择方法，因为不同方法对语义和计算属性的影响存在显著差异。

authors_text: Qiming Yang,Wei Wei,Ruizhi Zhang,Bowen Pang,Xiangnan Feng
title: Enhance Ambiguous Community Structure via Multi-strategy Community Related Link Prediction Method with Evolutionary Process
title_zh: 通过具有进化过程的多策略社区相关链接预测方法增强模糊社区结构
comment: 26 pages(single column format), 8 figures and 5 tables. Journal paper
comments: 26 pages(single column format), 8 figures and 5 tables. Journal paper
abstract: Most real-world networks suffer from incompleteness or incorrectness, which is an inherent attribute to real-world datasets. As a consequence, those downstream machine learning tasks in complex network like community detection methods may yield less satisfactory results, i.e., a proper preprocessing measure is required here. To address this issue, in this paper, we design a new community attribute based link prediction strategy HAP and propose a two-step community enhancement algorithm with automatic evolution process based on HAP. This paper aims at providing a community enhancement measure through adding links to clarify ambiguous community structures. The HAP method takes the neighbourhood uncertainty and Shannon entropy to identify boundary nodes, and establishes links by considering the nodes' community attributes and community size at the same time. The experimental results on twelve real-world datasets with ground truth community indicate that the proposed link prediction method outperforms other baseline methods and the enhancement of community follows the expected evolution process.
summary: Most real-world networks suffer from incompleteness or incorrectness, which is an inherent attribute to real-world datasets. As a consequence, those downstream machine learning tasks in complex network like community detection methods may yield less satisfactory results, i.e., a proper preprocessing measure is required here. To address this issue, in this paper, we design a new community attribute based link prediction strategy HAP and propose a two-step community enhancement algorithm with automatic evolution process based on HAP. This paper aims at providing a community enhancement measure through adding links to clarify ambiguous community structures. The HAP method takes the neighbourhood uncertainty and Shannon entropy to identify boundary nodes, and establishes links by considering the nodes' community attributes and community size at the same time. The experimental results on twelve real-world datasets with ground truth community indicate that the proposed link prediction method outperforms other baseline methods and the enhancement of community follows the expected evolution process.
abstract_zh: 大多数现实世界的网络都存在不完整性或不正确的问题，这是现实世界数据集的固有属性。因此，复杂网络中的下游机器学习任务（例如社区检测方法）可能会产生不太令人满意的结果，即，这里需要适当的预处理措施。针对这个问题，本文设计了一种新的基于社区属性的链接预测策略HAP，并提出了一种基于HAP的自动进化过程的两步社区增强算法。本文旨在通过添加链接来澄清模糊的社区结构，从而提供社区增强措施。 HAP方法利用邻域不确定性和香农熵来识别边界节点，同时考虑节点的社区属性和社区规模来建立链接。在 12 个具有真实社区的真实数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的链接预测方法优于其他基线方法，并且社区的增强遵循预期的演化过程。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于社区属性的链接预测策略HAP和两步社区增强算法，通过添加链接来澄清模糊社区结构。
AI.motivation: 现实世界网络存在不完整或不正确的问题，影响社区检测等下游任务的效果，需有效预处理方法提升社区结构清晰度。
AI.method: 设计HAP链接预测策略，结合邻域不确定性与香农熵识别边界节点，同时考虑节点社区属性与规模建立链接，并提出带自动进化过程的两步社区增强算法。
AI.result: 在12个真实数据集上实验显示，该方法在链接预测和社区增强效果上优于其他基线方法，且增强过程符合预期进化路径。
AI.conclusion: 提出的HAP方法和增强算法有效提升了模糊社区结构的清晰度，为复杂网络数据预处理提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: Enhance Ambiguous Community Structure via Multi-strategy Community Related Link Prediction Method with Evolutionary Process 通过具有进化过程的多策略社区相关链接预测方法增强模糊社区结构 Most real-world networks suffer from incompleteness or incorrectness, which is an inherent attribute to real-world datasets. As a consequence, those downstream machine learning tasks in complex network like community detection methods may yield less satisfactory results, i.e., a proper preprocessing measure is required here. To address this issue, in this paper, we design a new community attribute based link prediction strategy HAP and propose a two-step community enhancement algorithm with automatic evolution process based on HAP. This paper aims at providing a community enhancement measure through adding links to clarify ambiguous community structures. The HAP method takes the neighbourhood uncertainty and Shannon entropy to identify boundary nodes, and establishes links by considering the nodes' community attributes and community size at the same time. The experimental results on twelve real-world datasets with ground truth community indicate that the proposed link prediction method outperforms other baseline methods and the enhancement of community follows the expected evolution process. 大多数现实世界的网络都存在不完整性或不正确的问题，这是现实世界数据集的固有属性。因此，复杂网络中的下游机器学习任务（例如社区检测方法）可能会产生不太令人满意的结果，即，这里需要适当的预处理措施。针对这个问题，本文设计了一种新的基于社区属性的链接预测策略HAP，并提出了一种基于HAP的自动进化过程的两步社区增强算法。本文旨在通过添加链接来澄清模糊的社区结构，从而提供社区增强措施。 HAP方法利用邻域不确定性和香农熵来识别边界节点，同时考虑节点的社区属性和社区规模来建立链接。在 12 个具有真实社区的真实数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的链接预测方法优于其他基线方法，并且社区的增强遵循预期的演化过程。 提出一种基于社区属性的链接预测策略HAP和两步社区增强算法，通过添加链接来澄清模糊社区结构。 Qiming Yang,Wei Wei,Ruizhi Zhang,Bowen Pang,Xiangnan Feng cs.SI,cs.AI

title: Model Selection, Adaptation, and Combination for Transfer Learning in Wind and Photovoltaic Power Forecasts
title_zh: 风电和光伏发电预测中迁移学习的模型选择、适应和组合
abstract: There is recent interest in using model hubs, a collection of pre-trained models, in computer vision tasks. To utilize the model hub, we first select a source model and then adapt the model for the target to compensate for differences. While there is yet limited research on model selection and adaption for computer vision tasks, this holds even more for the field of renewable power. At the same time, it is a crucial challenge to provide forecasts for the increasing demand for power forecasts based on weather features from a numerical weather prediction. We close these gaps by conducting the first thorough experiment for model selection and adaptation for transfer learning in renewable power forecast, adopting recent results from the field of computer vision on 667 wind and photovoltaic parks. To the best of our knowledge, this makes it the most extensive study for transfer learning in renewable power forecasts reducing the computational effort and improving the forecast error. Therefore, we adopt source models based on target data from different seasons and limit the amount of training data. As an extension of the current state of the art, we utilize a Bayesian linear regression for forecasting the response based on features extracted from a neural network. This approach outperforms the baseline with only seven days of training data. We further show how combining multiple models through ensembles can significantly improve the model selection and adaptation approach.
summary: There is recent interest in using model hubs, a collection of pre-trained models, in computer vision tasks. To utilize the model hub, we first select a source model and then adapt the model for the target to compensate for differences. While there is yet limited research on model selection and adaption for computer vision tasks, this holds even more for the field of renewable power. At the same time, it is a crucial challenge to provide forecasts for the increasing demand for power forecasts based on weather features from a numerical weather prediction. We close these gaps by conducting the first thorough experiment for model selection and adaptation for transfer learning in renewable power forecast, adopting recent results from the field of computer vision on 667 wind and photovoltaic parks. To the best of our knowledge, this makes it the most extensive study for transfer learning in renewable power forecasts reducing the computational effort and improving the forecast error. Therefore, we adopt source models based on target data from different seasons and limit the amount of training data. As an extension of the current state of the art, we utilize a Bayesian linear regression for forecasting the response based on features extracted from a neural network. This approach outperforms the baseline with only seven days of training data. We further show how combining multiple models through ensembles can significantly improve the model selection and adaptation approach.
abstract_zh: 最近人们对在计算机视觉任务中使用模型中心（一组预先训练的模型）产生了兴趣。为了利用模型中心，我们首先选择一个源模型，然后针对目标调整该模型以补偿差异。尽管对计算机视觉任务的模型选择和适应的研究还很有限，但这对于可再生能源领域来说更是如此。与此同时，基于数值天气预报的天气特征来满足不断增长的电力预测需求是一个至关重要的挑战。我们通过在 667 个风电和光伏发电园区采用计算机视觉领域的最新结果，对可再生能源电力预测中的迁移学习的模型选择和适应进行了首次彻底的实验，从而弥补了这些差距。据我们所知，这使其成为可再生能源电力预测中迁移学习最广泛的研究，减少了计算量并改善了预测误差。因此，我们采用基于不同季节目标数据的源模型，并限制训练数据量。作为当前技术水平的扩展，我们利用贝叶斯线性回归根据从神经网络提取的特征来预测响应。此方法仅使用 7 天的训练数据就优于基线。我们进一步展示了如何通过集成组合多个模型可以显着改进模型选择和适应方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过模型选择、适应与组合的迁移学习方法，提升风能和光伏功率预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 可再生能源功率预测对天气特征依赖性强，但现有研究缺乏针对迁移学习的模型选择与适配方法，且计算成本高、预测误差大。
AI.method: 基于计算机视觉领域迁移学习成果，利用预训练模型库，通过季节差异数据筛选源模型并进行适配，结合贝叶斯线性回归与神经网络特征提取，最终通过模型集成优化预测效果。
AI.result: 在667个风电和光伏场站数据上验证，仅用7天训练数据即可超越基线模型，模型集成进一步显著降低预测误差，成为该领域最全面的迁移学习研究。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习结合模型集成能有效降低计算成本并提升预测精度，为可再生能源功率预测提供了新方法。

title: Music Enhancement via Image Translation and Vocoding
title_zh: 通过图像翻译和声码增强音乐
abstract: Consumer-grade music recordings such as those captured by mobile devices typically contain distortions in the form of background noise, reverb, and microphone-induced EQ. This paper presents a deep learning approach to enhance low-quality music recordings by combining (i) an image-to-image translation model for manipulating audio in its mel-spectrogram representation and (ii) a music vocoding model for mapping synthetically generated mel-spectrograms to perceptually realistic waveforms. We find that this approach to music enhancement outperforms baselines which use classical methods for mel-spectrogram inversion and an end-to-end approach directly mapping noisy waveforms to clean waveforms. Additionally, in evaluating the proposed method with a listening test, we analyze the reliability of common audio enhancement evaluation metrics when used in the music domain.
summary: Consumer-grade music recordings such as those captured by mobile devices typically contain distortions in the form of background noise, reverb, and microphone-induced EQ. This paper presents a deep learning approach to enhance low-quality music recordings by combining (i) an image-to-image translation model for manipulating audio in its mel-spectrogram representation and (ii) a music vocoding model for mapping synthetically generated mel-spectrograms to perceptually realistic waveforms. We find that this approach to music enhancement outperforms baselines which use classical methods for mel-spectrogram inversion and an end-to-end approach directly mapping noisy waveforms to clean waveforms. Additionally, in evaluating the proposed method with a listening test, we analyze the reliability of common audio enhancement evaluation metrics when used in the music domain.
abstract_zh: 消费级音乐录音（例如移动设备捕获的音乐录音）通常包含背景噪声、混响和麦克风引起的均衡器形式的失真。本文提出了一种深度学习方法，通过结合（i）用于操纵梅尔频谱图表示中的音频的图像到图像转换模型和（ii）用于将综合生成的梅尔频谱图映射到感知真实波形的音乐声编码模型来增强低质量音乐录音。我们发现这种音乐增强方法优于使用经典方法进行梅尔谱图反演的基线以及直接将噪声波形映射到干净波形的端到端方法。此外，在通过听力测试评估所提出的方法时，我们分析了在音乐领域使用时常见音频增强评估指标的可靠性。

AI.tldr: 通过图像翻译和声码器技术增强低质量音乐录音。
AI.motivation: 消费者设备录制的音乐常存在背景噪声、混响等失真，传统增强方法效果有限。
AI.method: 结合图像到图像翻译模型处理mel频谱图与声码器生成波形的两阶段深度学习方法。
AI.result: 优于传统频谱逆变换方法和端到端波形映射方法，在听觉测试中验证了评估指标可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升音乐质量，但需注意现有评估指标在音乐领域的适用性局限。

This paper presents a deep learning approach to enhance low-quality music recordings by combining (i) an image-to-image translation model for manipulating audio in its mel-spectrogram representation and (ii) a music vocoding model for mapping synthetically generated mel-spectrograms to perceptually realistic waveforms. We find that this approach to music enhancement outperforms baselines which use classical methods for mel-spectrogram inversion and an end-to-end approach directly mapping noisy waveforms to clean waveforms. Additionally, in evaluating the proposed method with a listening test, we analyze the reliability of common audio enhancement evaluation metrics when used in the music domain. 消费级音乐录音（例如移动设备捕获的音乐录音）通常包含背景噪声、混响和麦克风引起的均衡器形式的失真。本文提出了一种深度学习方法，通过结合（i）用于操纵梅尔频谱图表示中的音频的图像到图像转换模型和（ii）用于将综合生成的梅尔频谱图映射到感知真实波形的音乐声编码模型来增强低质量音乐录音。我们发现这种音乐增强方法优于使用经典方法进行梅尔谱图反演的基线以及直接将噪声波形映射到干净波形的端到端方法。此外，在通过听力测试评估所提出的方法时，我们分析了在音乐领域使用时常见音频增强评估指标的可靠性。 通过图像翻译和声码器技术增强低质量音乐录音。 Nikhil Kandpal,Oriol Nieto,Zeyu Jin cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Guangwei Gao,Zhengxue Wang,Juncheng Li,Wenjie Li,Yi Yu,Tieyong Zeng
title: Lightweight Bimodal Network for Single-Image Super-Resolution via Symmetric CNN and Recursive Transformer
title_zh: 通过对称 CNN 和递归变压器实现单图像超分辨率的轻量级双模网络
comment: Accepted by IJCAI2022, short oral presentation
comments: Accepted by IJCAI2022, short oral presentation
abstract: Single-image super-resolution (SISR) has achieved significant breakthroughs with the development of deep learning. However, these methods are difficult to be applied in real-world scenarios since they are inevitably accompanied by the problems of computational and memory costs caused by the complex operations. To solve this issue, we propose a Lightweight Bimodal Network (LBNet) for SISR. Specifically, an effective Symmetric CNN is designed for local feature extraction and coarse image reconstruction. Meanwhile, we propose a Recursive Transformer to fully learn the long-term dependence of images thus the global information can be fully used to further refine texture details. Studies show that the hybrid of CNN and Transformer can build a more efficient model. Extensive experiments have proved that our LBNet achieves more prominent performance than other state-of-the-art methods with a relatively low computational cost and memory consumption. The code is available at https://github.com/IVIPLab/LBNet.
summary: Single-image super-resolution (SISR) has achieved significant breakthroughs with the development of deep learning. However, these methods are difficult to be applied in real-world scenarios since they are inevitably accompanied by the problems of computational and memory costs caused by the complex operations. To solve this issue, we propose a Lightweight Bimodal Network (LBNet) for SISR. Specifically, an effective Symmetric CNN is designed for local feature extraction and coarse image reconstruction. Meanwhile, we propose a Recursive Transformer to fully learn the long-term dependence of images thus the global information can be fully used to further refine texture details. Studies show that the hybrid of CNN and Transformer can build a more efficient model. Extensive experiments have proved that our LBNet achieves more prominent performance than other state-of-the-art methods with a relatively low computational cost and memory consumption. The code is available at https://github.com/IVIPLab/LBNet.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的发展，单图像超分辨率（SISR）取得了重大突破。然而，这些方法很难在现实场景中应用，因为它们不可避免地伴随着复杂操作引起的计算和内存成本问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 SISR 的轻量级双峰网络（LBNet）。具体来说，设计了有效的对称 CNN，用于局部特征提取和粗略图像重建。同时，我们提出了一种递归变换器来充分学习图像的长期依赖性，从而可以充分利用全局信息来进一步细化纹理细节。研究表明，CNN 和 Transformer 的混合可以构建更高效的模型。大量的实验证明，我们的 LBNet 以相对较低的计算成本和内存消耗实现了比其他最先进的方法更突出的性能。该代码可在 https://github.com/IVIPLab/LBNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级双模网络（LBNet），通过对称CNN和递归Transformer结合，实现单图像超分辨率任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习超分辨率方法存在计算和内存消耗大、难以应用于实际场景的问题，需设计更高效的模型。
AI.method: 设计对称CNN提取局部特征并进行粗略重建，结合递归Transformer捕捉长期依赖关系以优化纹理细节，实现CNN与Transformer的混合架构。
AI.result: 实验表明LBNet在保持较低计算成本和内存消耗的同时，性能优于现有先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CNN与Transformer的混合结构能有效提升超分辨率效率，解决了传统方法的计算瓶颈问题。

title: Benchmarking the Hooke-Jeeves Method, MTS-LS1, and BSrr on the Large-scale BBOB Function Set
title_zh: 在大规模 BBOB 函数集上对 Hooke-Jeeves 方法、MTS-LS1 和 BSrr 进行基准测试
comment: This is an accepted version of a paper to the Workshop on Black-Box Optimization Benchmarking (BBOB 2022) published in the companion volume of GECCO2022
comments: This is an accepted version of a paper to the Workshop on Black-Box Optimization Benchmarking (BBOB 2022) published in the companion volume of GECCO2022
abstract: This paper investigates the performance of three black-box optimizers exploiting separability on the 24 large-scale BBOB functions, including the Hooke-Jeeves method, MTS-LS1, and BSrr. Although BSrr was not specially designed for large-scale optimization, the results show that BSrr has a state-of-the-art performance on the five separable large-scale BBOB functions. The results show that the asymmetry significantly influences the performance of MTS-LS1. The results also show that the Hooke-Jeeves method performs better than MTS-LS1 on unimodal separable BBOB functions.
summary: This paper investigates the performance of three black-box optimizers exploiting separability on the 24 large-scale BBOB functions, including the Hooke-Jeeves method, MTS-LS1, and BSrr. Although BSrr was not specially designed for large-scale optimization, the results show that BSrr has a state-of-the-art performance on the five separable large-scale BBOB functions. The results show that the asymmetry significantly influences the performance of MTS-LS1. The results also show that the Hooke-Jeeves method performs better than MTS-LS1 on unimodal separable BBOB functions.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了利用 24 个大规模 BBOB 函数的可分离性的三个黑盒优化器的性能，包括 Hooke-Jeeves 方法、MTS-LS1 和 BSrr。尽管 BSrr 并不是专门为大规模优化而设计的，但结果表明 BSrr 在 5 个可分离的大规模 BBOB 函数上具有最先进的性能。结果表明，不对称性显着影响 MTS-LS1 的性能。结果还表明，Hooke-Jeeves 方法在单峰可分离 BBOB 函数上的表现优于 MTS-LS1。

AI.tldr: 比较Hooke-Jeeves方法、MTS-LS1和BSrr三种优化算法在大规模BBOB函数集上的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 评估不同黑盒优化器在处理大规模可分离优化问题时的效率与效果，探索其适用场景与局限性。
AI.method: 在24个大规模BBOB测试函数上对三种算法进行基准测试，分析其收敛性与鲁棒性。
AI.result: BSrr在五个多维可分离函数中表现最优，MTS-LS1受不对称性影响显著，Hooke-Jeeves在单峰可分离函数上优于MTS-LS1。
AI.conclusion: BSrr虽非专为大规模优化设计但在特定场景下具竞争力，Hooke-Jeeves适合单峰可分离问题，MTS-LS1需注意不对称性影响。

authors_text: Huu Duoc Nguyen,Van Than Dung,Hirotaka Sato,T. Thang Vo-Doan
title: Efficient Autonomous Navigation for Terrestrial Insect-Machine Hybrid Systems
title_zh: 陆地昆虫-机器混合系统的高效自主导航
comment: Demonstration video can be found at http://youtu.be/p00mfxFo7VY
comments: Demonstration video can be found at http://youtu.be/p00mfxFo7VY
abstract: While bio-inspired and biomimetic systems draw inspiration from living materials, biohybrid systems incorporate them with synthetic devices, allowing the exploitation of both organic and artificial advantages inside a single entity. In the challenging development of centimeter-scaled mobile robots serving unstructured territory navigations, biohybrid systems appear as a potential solution in the forms of terrestrial insect-machine hybrid systems, which are the fusion of living ambulatory insects and miniature electronic devices. Although their maneuver can be deliberately controlled via artificial electrical stimulation, these hybrid systems still inherit the insects' outstanding locomotory skills, orchestrated by a sophisticated central nervous system and various sensory organs, favoring their maneuvers in complex terrains. However, efficient autonomous navigation of these hybrid systems is challenging. The struggle to optimize the stimulation parameters for individual insects limits the reliability and accuracy of navigation control. This study overcomes this problem by implementing a feedback control system with an insight view of tunable navigation control for an insect-machine hybrid system based on a living darkling beetle. Via a thrust controller for acceleration and a proportional controller for turning, the system regulates the stimulation parameters based on the instantaneous status of the hybrid robot. While the system can provide an overall success rate of ~71% for path-following navigations, fine-tuning its control parameters could further improve the outcome's reliability and precision to up to ~94% success rate and ~1/2 body length accuracy, respectively. Such tunable performance of the feedback control system provides flexibility to navigation applications of insect-machine hybrid systems.
summary: While bio-inspired and biomimetic systems draw inspiration from living materials, biohybrid systems incorporate them with synthetic devices, allowing the exploitation of both organic and artificial advantages inside a single entity. In the challenging development of centimeter-scaled mobile robots serving unstructured territory navigations, biohybrid systems appear as a potential solution in the forms of terrestrial insect-machine hybrid systems, which are the fusion of living ambulatory insects and miniature electronic devices. Although their maneuver can be deliberately controlled via artificial electrical stimulation, these hybrid systems still inherit the insects' outstanding locomotory skills, orchestrated by a sophisticated central nervous system and various sensory organs, favoring their maneuvers in complex terrains. However, efficient autonomous navigation of these hybrid systems is challenging. The struggle to optimize the stimulation parameters for individual insects limits the reliability and accuracy of navigation control. This study overcomes this problem by implementing a feedback control system with an insight view of tunable navigation control for an insect-machine hybrid system based on a living darkling beetle. Via a thrust controller for acceleration and a proportional controller for turning, the system regulates the stimulation parameters based on the instantaneous status of the hybrid robot. While the system can provide an overall success rate of ~71% for path-following navigations, fine-tuning its control parameters could further improve the outcome's reliability and precision to up to ~94% success rate and ~1/2 body length accuracy, respectively. Such tunable performance of the feedback control system provides flexibility to navigation applications of insect-machine hybrid systems.
abstract_zh: 仿生和仿生系统从生物材料中汲取灵感，而生物混合系统将它们与合成设备结合起来，允许在单个实体内利用有机和人工的优势。在服务于非结构化领域导航的厘米级移动机器人的挑战性开发中，生物混合系统以陆地昆虫-机器混合系统的形式出现作为潜在的解决方案，该系统是活体行走昆虫和微型电子设备的融合。尽管它们的机动可以通过人工电刺激进行有意控制，但这些混合系统仍然继承了昆虫出色的运动技能，由复杂的中枢神经系统和各种感觉器官精心协调，有利于它们在复杂地形中的机动。然而，这些混合系统的高效自主导航具有挑战性。优化个体昆虫刺激参数的努力限制了导航控制的可靠性和准确性。这项研究通过实施一个反馈控制系统来克服这个问题，该系统具有对基于活体暗甲虫的昆虫-机器混合系统的可调谐导航控制的洞察力。通过用于加速的推力控制器和用于转向的比例控制器，系统根据混合机器人的瞬时状态调节刺激参数。虽然该系统可以为路径跟踪导航提供约 71% 的总体成功率，但微调其控制参数可以进一步提高结果的可靠性和精度，分别达到约 94% 的成功率和约 1/2 的体长精度。反馈控制系统的这种可调性能为昆虫-机器混合系统的导航应用提供了灵活性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种反馈控制系统以提高陆地昆虫-机器混合系统的自主导航效率
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以优化刺激参数，导致导航控制可靠性与准确性不足
AI.method: 采用推力控制器与比例控制器，根据混合机器人实时状态调节刺激参数
AI.result: 路径跟随导航成功率达71%，优化后提升至94%且精度达半身长
AI.conclusion: 反馈控制系统的可调性提升了昆虫-机器混合系统的导航灵活性与应用潜力

search_text: Efficient Autonomous Navigation for Terrestrial Insect-Machine Hybrid Systems 陆地昆虫-机器混合系统的高效自主导航 While bio-inspired and biomimetic systems draw inspiration from living materials, biohybrid systems incorporate them with synthetic devices, allowing the exploitation of both organic and artificial advantages inside a single entity. In the challenging development of centimeter-scaled mobile robots serving unstructured territory navigations, biohybrid systems appear as a potential solution in the forms of terrestrial insect-machine hybrid systems, which are the fusion of living ambulatory insects and miniature electronic devices. Although their maneuver can be deliberately controlled via artificial electrical stimulation, these hybrid systems still inherit the insects' outstanding locomotory skills, orchestrated by a sophisticated central nervous system and various sensory organs, favoring their maneuvers in complex terrains. However, efficient autonomous navigation of these hybrid systems is challenging. The struggle to optimize the stimulation parameters for individual insects limits the reliability and accuracy of navigation control. This study overcomes this problem by implementing a feedback control system with an insight view of tunable navigation control for an insect-machine hybrid system based on a living darkling beetle. Via a thrust controller for acceleration and a proportional controller for turning, the system regulates the stimulation parameters based on the instantaneous status of the hybrid robot. While the system can provide an overall success rate of ~71% for path-following navigations, fine-tuning its control parameters could further improve the outcome's reliability and precision to up to ~94% success rate and ~1/2 body length accuracy, respectively. Such tunable performance of the feedback control system provides flexibility to navigation applications of insect-machine hybrid systems. 仿生和仿生系统从生物材料中汲取灵感，而生物混合系统将它们与合成设备结合起来，允许在单个实体内利用有机和人工的优势。在服务于非结构化领域导航的厘米级移动机器人的挑战性开发中，生物混合系统以陆地昆虫-机器混合系统的形式出现作为潜在的解决方案，该系统是活体行走昆虫和微型电子设备的融合。尽管它们的机动可以通过人工电刺激进行有意控制，但这些混合系统仍然继承了昆虫出色的运动技能，由复杂的中枢神经系统和各种感觉器官精心协调，有利于它们在复杂地形中的机动。然而，这些混合系统的高效自主导航具有挑战性。优化个体昆虫刺激参数的努力限制了导航控制的可靠性和准确性。这项研究通过实施一个反馈控制系统来克服这个问题，该系统具有对基于活体暗甲虫的昆虫-机器混合系统的可调谐导航控制的洞察力。通过用于加速的推力控制器和用于转向的比例控制器，系统根据混合机器人的瞬时状态调节刺激参数。虽然该系统可以为路径跟踪导航提供约 71% 的总体成功率，但微调其控制参数可以进一步提高结果的可靠性和精度，分别达到约 94% 的成功率和约 1/2 的体长精度。反馈控制系统的这种可调性能为昆虫-机器混合系统的导航应用提供了灵活性。 提出一种反馈控制系统以提高陆地昆虫-机器混合系统的自主导航效率 Huu Duoc Nguyen,Van Than Dung,Hirotaka Sato,T. Thang Vo-Doan cs.RO

title: Resource-efficient domain adaptive pre-training for medical images
title_zh: 医学图像的资源高效域自适应预训练
abstract: The deep learning-based analysis of medical images suffers from data scarcity because of high annotation costs and privacy concerns. Researchers in this domain have used transfer learning to avoid overfitting when using complex architectures. However, the domain differences between pre-training and downstream data hamper the performance of the downstream task. Some recent studies have successfully used domain-adaptive pre-training (DAPT) to address this issue. In DAPT, models are initialized with the generic dataset pre-trained weights, and further pre-training is performed using a moderately sized in-domain dataset (medical images). Although this technique achieved good results for the downstream tasks in terms of accuracy and robustness, it is computationally expensive even when the datasets for DAPT are moderately sized. These compute-intensive techniques and models impact the environment negatively and create an uneven playing field for researchers with limited resources. This study proposed computationally efficient DAPT without compromising the downstream accuracy and robustness. This study proposes three techniques for this purpose, where the first (partial DAPT) performs DAPT on a subset of layers. The second one adopts a hybrid strategy (hybrid DAPT) by performing partial DAPT for a few epochs and then full DAPT for the remaining epochs. The third technique performs DAPT on simplified variants of the base architecture. The results showed that compared to the standard DAPT (full DAPT), the hybrid DAPT technique achieved better performance on the development and external datasets. In contrast, simplified architectures (after DAPT) achieved the best robustness while achieving modest performance on the development dataset .
summary: The deep learning-based analysis of medical images suffers from data scarcity because of high annotation costs and privacy concerns. Researchers in this domain have used transfer learning to avoid overfitting when using complex architectures. However, the domain differences between pre-training and downstream data hamper the performance of the downstream task. Some recent studies have successfully used domain-adaptive pre-training (DAPT) to address this issue. In DAPT, models are initialized with the generic dataset pre-trained weights, and further pre-training is performed using a moderately sized in-domain dataset (medical images). Although this technique achieved good results for the downstream tasks in terms of accuracy and robustness, it is computationally expensive even when the datasets for DAPT are moderately sized. These compute-intensive techniques and models impact the environment negatively and create an uneven playing field for researchers with limited resources. This study proposed computationally efficient DAPT without compromising the downstream accuracy and robustness. This study proposes three techniques for this purpose, where the first (partial DAPT) performs DAPT on a subset of layers. The second one adopts a hybrid strategy (hybrid DAPT) by performing partial DAPT for a few epochs and then full DAPT for the remaining epochs. The third technique performs DAPT on simplified variants of the base architecture. The results showed that compared to the standard DAPT (full DAPT), the hybrid DAPT technique achieved better performance on the development and external datasets. In contrast, simplified architectures (after DAPT) achieved the best robustness while achieving modest performance on the development dataset .
abstract_zh: 由于注释成本高和隐私问题，基于深度学习的医学图像分析面临数据稀缺的问题。该领域的研究人员使用迁移学习来避免使用复杂架构时的过度拟合。然而，预训练和下游数据之间的域差异阻碍了下游任务的性能。最近的一些研究成功地使用领域自适应预训练（DAPT）来解决这个问题。在 DAPT 中，模型使用通用数据集预训练权重进行初始化，并使用中等大小的域内数据集（医学图像）进行进一步的预训练。尽管该技术在准确性和鲁棒性方面为下游任务取得了良好的结果，但即使 DAPT 数据集大小适中，其计算成本也很高。这些计算密集型技术和模型对环境产生负面影响，并为资源有限的研究人员创造了不公平的竞争环境。这项研究提出了计算高效的 DAPT，而不影响下游的准确性和鲁棒性。本研究为此提出了三种技术，其中第一种（部分 DAPT）在层的子集上执行 DAPT。第二种采用混合策略（混合 DAPT），即对几个 epoch 执行部分 DAPT，然后对剩余的 epoch 执行完整 DAPT。第三种技术对基础架构的简化变体执行 DAPT。结果表明，与标准 DAPT（完整 DAPT）相比，混合 DAPT 技术在开发数据集和外部数据集上取得了更好的性能。相比之下，简化的架构（DAPT 之后）实现了最佳的鲁棒性，同时在开发数据集上实现了适度的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种计算高效的领域自适应预训练（DAPT）方法，以解决医学图像分析中数据稀缺和计算成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析因标注成本高和隐私问题导致数据稀缺，传统DAPT方法虽有效但计算成本高，影响资源有限研究者的应用。
AI.method: 提出三种技术：1) 部分DAPT（仅训练部分网络层）；2) 混合DAPT（先部分训练后全量训练）；3) 简化架构DAPT（使用简化模型进行预训练）。
AI.result: 混合DAPT在开发集和外部数据集上表现优于标准DAPT，简化架构在鲁棒性上最佳但开发集性能较 modest。
AI.conclusion: 混合DAPT和简化架构有效降低计算成本，兼顾性能与鲁棒性，为资源受限场景提供可行方案。

title: Automatic Detection and Classification of Symbols in Engineering Drawings
title_zh: 工程图中符号的自动检测和分类
abstract: A method of finding and classifying various components and objects in a design diagram, drawing, or planning layout is proposed. The method automatically finds the objects present in a legend table and finds their position, count and related information with the help of multiple deep neural networks. The method is pre-trained on several drawings or design templates to learn the feature set that may help in representing the new templates. For a template not seen before, it does not require any training with template dataset. The proposed method may be useful in multiple industry applications such as design validation, object count, connectivity of components, etc. The method is generic and domain independent.
summary: A method of finding and classifying various components and objects in a design diagram, drawing, or planning layout is proposed. The method automatically finds the objects present in a legend table and finds their position, count and related information with the help of multiple deep neural networks. The method is pre-trained on several drawings or design templates to learn the feature set that may help in representing the new templates. For a template not seen before, it does not require any training with template dataset. The proposed method may be useful in multiple industry applications such as design validation, object count, connectivity of components, etc. The method is generic and domain independent.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种在设计图、绘图或规划布局中查找和分类各种组件和对象的方法。该方法自动查找图例表中存在的对象，并借助多个深度神经网络找到它们的位置、计数和相关信息。该方法在多个图纸或设计模板上进行了预训练，以学习可能有助于表示新模板的特征集。对于以前没有见过的模板，它不需要使用模板数据集进行任何训练。所提出的方法可用于多个行业应用，例如设计验证、对象计数、组件连接等。该方法是通用的且独立于领域的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的工程图纸符号自动检测与分类方法，无需针对新模板进行训练即可实现对象定位、计数和信息提取。
AI.motivation: 传统工程图纸处理依赖人工标注效率低，亟需自动化工具实现设计验证、部件统计等工业场景的智能化需求。
AI.method: 采用多网络架构预训练通用特征表示，通过图例表信息自动学习对象特征，利用迁移学习实现跨模板的零样本检测分类。
AI.result: 方法在多个工业场景验证有效，可准确完成对象计数、连接性分析等任务，且具有领域无关的通用性优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统符号识别的领域依赖限制，为工程图纸自动化处理提供了可扩展的通用解决方案。

The proposed method may be useful in multiple industry applications such as design validation, object count, connectivity of components, etc. The method is generic and domain independent. 提出了一种在设计图、绘图或规划布局中查找和分类各种组件和对象的方法。该方法自动查找图例表中存在的对象，并借助多个深度神经网络找到它们的位置、计数和相关信息。该方法在多个图纸或设计模板上进行了预训练，以学习可能有助于表示新模板的特征集。对于以前没有见过的模板，它不需要使用模板数据集进行任何训练。所提出的方法可用于多个行业应用，例如设计验证、对象计数、组件连接等。该方法是通用的且独立于领域的。 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的工程图纸符号自动检测与分类方法，无需针对新模板进行训练即可实现对象定位、计数和信息提取。 Sourish Sarkar,Pranav Pandey,Sibsambhu Kar cs.CV
